When bhav samadhi occurs during kirtan and the body dances without instruction, or when tears flow at Ganga aarti, that is Maharati. This is not external pleasure but inner bliss.
nri_context: When a bhajan at a small overseas satsang suddenly transports you so deeply that you forget where you are, that overwhelming devotional bliss is Maharati crossing all geographical boundaries.
usage_context: Chant during kirtan, ecstatic devotion, or when seeking the deepest spiritual joy. Also during Ananda meditation and bhakti-rasa cultivation.

meaning_en: She who enjoys the supreme experience of all creation
meaning_hi: सृष्टि के सर्वोच्च भोग (अनुभव) को प्राप्त करने वाली
modern_context: भोग और त्याग दोनों भारतीय संस्कृति के अंग हैं। देवी को 56 भोग लगाए जाते हैं, यह सिखाता है कि जीवन का आनन्द लेना पाप नहीं है। जब होली पर गुझिया खाएँ, दीवाली पर मिठाई बाँटें, या किसी अच्छे restaurant में जाएँ, तो बिना guilt के आनन्द लें क्योंकि देवी स्वयं महाभोगा हैं।
modern_context_en: Both bhoga (enjoyment) and tyaga (renunciation) are part of Indian culture. Devi is offered 56 bhog items, teaching that enjoying life is not sinful. When eating gujiya on Holi, distributing sweets on Diwali, or visiting a fine restaurant, enjoy without guilt because Devi herself is Mahabhoga.
nri_context: When spiritual guilt makes you feel bad about enjoying the comforts your hard work abroad has earned, this name liberates you: Devi herself delights in mahā bhoga.
usage_context: Chant during festival feasts, before offering bhog to deity, or when seeking to balance enjoyment with mindfulness. Also during Annakut celebrations.

meaning_en: She who possesses the greatest sovereignty and divine wealth
meaning_hi: महान् ऐश्वर्य (सम्प्रभुता और दैवी सम्पदा) वाली
modern_context: ऐश्वर्या केवल धन नहीं, बल्कि अष्ट ऐश्वर्य हैं: अणिमा, महिमा, गरिमा, लघिमा, प्राप्ति, प्राकाम्य, ईशित्व, वशित्व। ये सब सिद्धियाँ देवी के पास हैं। जब Ambani या Tata जैसे उद्योगपति अपनी सम्पत्ति को समाज सेवा में लगाते हैं, वह ऐश्वर्य का सही उपयोग है।
modern_context_en: Aishvarya is not just money but the eight divine powers: Anima, Mahima, Garima, Laghima, Prapti, Prakamya, Ishitva, Vashitva. Devi possesses all these siddhis. When industrialists like Ambani or Tata channel their wealth into social service, that is the right use of aishvarya.
nri_context: When you achieve significant financial success abroad, this name guides you to use that aishvarya for community welfare, scholarship funds, or supporting causes back in India.
usage_context: Chant when aspiring for holistic prosperity, during Ashta Siddhi meditation, or when wealth needs direction and purpose. Also during Kubera puja.

meaning_en: She who possesses supreme valour and vital potency
meaning_hi: महान् वीर्य (पराक्रम और जीवन-शक्ति) वाली
modern_context: वीर्य केवल शारीरिक बल नहीं, बल्कि मानसिक और आत्मिक ओज भी है। जब Kargil के सैनिक हाड़ कँपाती ठण्ड में लड़े, जब Nirbhaya case के बाद लड़कियों ने सड़कों पर आकर न्याय माँगा, वह सब महावीर्य था। Olympics में भारतीय खिलाड़ी जब पदक जीतें, वह भी महावीर्या की कृपा है।
modern_context_en: Virya is not just physical strength but mental and spiritual vigour too. When Kargil soldiers fought in bone-chilling cold, when women took to the streets demanding justice after the Nirbhaya case, all of that was Mahavirya. When Indian athletes win Olympic medals, that too is Mahavirya's grace.
nri_context: The courage to leave everything familiar and build a new life in a strange land, often against your parents' wishes, is a quiet act of mahāvīrya that this name honours.
usage_context: Chant before acts requiring great courage, during physical training, or when honouring soldiers and warriors. Also during Vira Rasa cultivation and competitive events.

meaning_en: She who possesses the greatest strength
meaning_hi: महान् बल वाली, सर्वाधिक शक्तिशाली
modern_context: बल तीन प्रकार का होता है: शारीरिक, मानसिक और आर्थिक। देवी तीनों में महाबला हैं। जब गाँव में बाढ़ आए और एक माँ अपने तीन बच्चों को उठाकर ऊँची जगह पहुँचाए, वह महाबला है। जब एक widow single-handedly बच्चों को पढ़ाकर IAS बनवाए, वह भी महाबला है।
modern_context_en: Strength is of three kinds: physical, mental, and financial. Devi is Mahabala in all three. When a mother during a village flood carries her three children to high ground, that is Mahabala. When a widow single-handedly educates her children to become IAS officers, that too is Mahabala.
nri_context: The single immigrant parent working two jobs abroad to fund children's education while wiring money home to ageing parents carries Mahabala strength that no gym can build.
usage_context: Chant when seeking strength in crisis, during Hanuman puja for physical power, or when honouring strong women. Also during wrestling and martial arts training.

meaning_en: She who possesses the greatest intellect and discernment
meaning_hi: महान् बुद्धि (विवेक और प्रज्ञा) वाली
modern_context: बुद्धि सही और ग़लत में भेद करने की शक्ति है। AI आज बुद्धि की नक़ल कर रहा है, लेकिन विवेक अभी मनुष्य के पास है। जब ChatGPT कोई उत्तर दे तो बुद्धि से जाँचें कि सही है या नहीं। परीक्षा में cramming से marks आ सकते हैं, लेकिन बुद्धि से समझ आती है। महाबुद्धि वह प्रज्ञा है जो ज्ञान से भी ऊपर है।
modern_context_en: Buddhi is the power to distinguish right from wrong. AI today mimics intelligence, but discernment is still human. When ChatGPT gives an answer, use buddhi to verify it. Cramming for exams may bring marks, but buddhi brings understanding. Mahabuddhi is that wisdom which transcends even knowledge.
nri_context: Navigating complex decisions abroad, which school system for kids, which investment strategy, when to return, all require the discerning mahābuddhi that this name cultivates.
usage_context: Chant before important decisions, during Saraswati puja for intellect, or when seeking discernment beyond mere knowledge. Also during Buddhi Yoga meditation.

meaning_en: She who is the supreme attainment and perfection
meaning_hi: महान् सिद्धि (परम उपलब्धि और पूर्णता) स्वरूपा
modern_context: सिद्धि का अर्थ है किसी भी कार्य में पूर्णता प्राप्त करना। गणेश जी सिद्धिविनायक कहलाते हैं, लेकिन देवी स्वयं महासिद्धि हैं। UPSC crack करना एक सिद्धि है, PhD पूरी करना एक सिद्धि है, लेकिन महासिद्धि आत्मज्ञान है। जीवन की सबसे बड़ी सिद्धि अपने आप को जानना है।
modern_context_en: Siddhi means attaining perfection in any endeavour. Ganesha is called Siddhivinayaka, but Devi herself is Mahasiddhi. Cracking UPSC is a siddhi, completing a PhD is a siddhi, but Mahasiddhi is self-knowledge. Life's greatest achievement is knowing yourself.
nri_context: When every career milestone abroad has been achieved yet inner fulfilment remains elusive, this name redirects your quest from external siddhi to the mahāsiddhi of self-realization.
usage_context: Chant when seeking accomplishment in any field, during Siddhi Vinayak puja, or when aspiring for spiritual perfection. Also on Ganesh Chaturthi.

meaning_en: She who is the sovereign ruler over even the greatest masters of yoga
meaning_hi: महान् योगेश्वरों (योग के स्वामियों) की भी ईश्वरी
modern_context: पतंजलि, गोरखनाथ, मत्स्येन्द्रनाथ जैसे महान् योगी भी देवी के अधीन हैं। आज जब yoga teachers celebrities बन गए हैं और yoga एक billion-dollar industry है, तो याद रखें कि सबसे बड़े yoga guru भी देवी के शिष्य हैं। International Yoga Day पर इस नाम का जाप करें।
modern_context_en: Even great yogis like Patanjali, Gorakhnath, and Matsyendranath are under Devi's sovereignty. Today when yoga teachers have become celebrities and yoga is a billion-dollar industry, remember that even the greatest yoga gurus are Devi's disciples. Chant this name on International Yoga Day.
nri_context: When your yoga teacher abroad teaches asanas without acknowledging the divine source, this name quietly restores the sacred hierarchy: Devi is the guru of all gurus.
usage_context: Chant during Guru Purnima, International Yoga Day, or when seeking mastery in yogic practices. Also during Nath Sampradaya worship.

meaning_en: She who is the great tantra, the supreme system of spiritual practice
meaning_hi: महातन्त्र, आध्यात्मिक साधना की सर्वोच्च प्रणाली स्वरूपा
modern_context: तन्त्र का शाब्दिक अर्थ है 'तनोति त्रायति इति तन्त्रम्', जो विस्तार करे और रक्षा करे। यह केवल पूजा पद्धति नहीं, जीवन जीने की पूरी प्रणाली है। आज management में 'systems thinking' जो सिखाया जाता है, वह तन्त्र का ही आधुनिक रूप है। देवी स्वयं वह महातन्त्र हैं जिसमें सम्पूर्ण ज्ञान समाहित है।
modern_context_en: The literal meaning of Tantra is 'tanoti trayati iti tantram', that which expands and protects. It is not just a worship method but a complete system for living. Today's 'systems thinking' taught in management is a modern form of Tantra. Devi herself is that Mahatantra containing all knowledge.
nri_context: When you build systems abroad to manage your complex life, automating bills, scheduling, meal planning, you are unknowingly practising tantra: the art of systematic living that this name sanctifies.
usage_context: Chant during systematic spiritual practice, Tantra study, or when seeking to organize life holistically. Also during Shri Vidya initiation.

meaning_en: She who is the supreme mantra itself
meaning_hi: सर्वोच्च महामन्त्र स्वरूपा

mantrā.en: mantra, sacred utterance, that which protects the mind
mantrā.hi: मन्त्र, पवित्र उच्चारण, मन की रक्षा करने वाला

modern_context: मन्त्र का अर्थ है 'मननात् त्रायते इति मन्त्रः', जो मनन (चिन्तन) से रक्षा करे। महामन्त्र सबसे शक्तिशाली मन्त्र है। जब कोई मन्त्र याद न आए, बस 'माँ' बोल दें, यही सबसे छोटा और सबसे बड़ा महामन्त्र है। रामकृष्ण परमहंस कहते थे कि 'माँ' बोलना ही सबसे बड़ा जाप है।
modern_context_en: Mantra means 'mananat trayate iti mantrah', that which protects through contemplation. Mahamantra is the most powerful mantra. When no mantra comes to mind, just say 'Maa'; this is the shortest and greatest Mahamantra. Ramakrishna Paramahamsa said that saying 'Maa' is the greatest japa.
nri_context: When elaborate puja is impossible abroad and you only have a moment between meetings, one whispered 'Maa' is the Mahamantra that this name validates as complete worship.
usage_context: Chant as the essence of all mantras, when simplifying practice, or when no other mantra is available. Universal name suitable for any moment.

meaning_en: She who is the supreme yantra (Sri Chakra)
meaning_hi: सर्वोच्च यन्त्र (श्री चक्र) स्वरूपा
modern_context: श्री चक्र (श्री यन्त्र) सबसे पवित्र और जटिल यन्त्र है, जिसमें 9 interlocking triangles, 43 छोटे त्रिकोण, और बिन्दु (केन्द्र बिन्दु) हैं। यह ब्रह्माण्ड का नक्शा है। IIT और MIT के mathematicians ने श्री यन्त्र की geometry का अध्ययन किया है और इसे 'perfect sacred geometry' कहा है।
modern_context_en: The Sri Chakra (Sri Yantra) is the most sacred and complex yantra, with 9 interlocking triangles, 43 smaller triangles, and the bindu (central point). It is a map of the cosmos. Mathematicians at IIT and MIT have studied Sri Yantra's geometry and called it 'perfect sacred geometry.'
nri_context: When a colleague abroad asks about the geometric design on your desk, explaining the Sri Yantra as 'the universe mapped in mathematics' bridges science and spirituality in a way they can appreciate.
usage_context: Chant during Sri Yantra meditation, yantra drawing practice, or when studying sacred geometry. Also during Meru (3D Sri Chakra) puja.

meaning_en: She who sits upon the supreme throne (the Sri Chakra itself)
meaning_hi: महान् आसन (श्री चक्र रूपी सर्वोच्च सिंहासन) पर विराजमान
modern_context: योग में आसन का अर्थ है स्थिर और सुखपूर्वक बैठना। देवी का आसन स्वयं श्री चक्र है। जब ध्यान में बैठें तो अपने आसन को देवी का सिंहासन समझें। पद्मासन, सुखासन या कुर्सी पर भी जब सीधी कमर से बैठें, तो वह आसन पवित्र हो जाता है। बैठने की मुद्रा ही ध्यान की नींव है।
modern_context_en: In yoga, asana means sitting steadily and comfortably. Devi's seat is the Sri Chakra itself. When sitting for meditation, consider your seat as Devi's throne. Padmasana, Sukhasana, or even sitting straight on a chair makes that seat sacred. Posture is the foundation of meditation.
nri_context: When your meditation space abroad is just a corner of a shared apartment with a cushion on the floor, this name transforms that humble seat into Devi's Mahasana.
usage_context: Chant before sitting for meditation, during asana practice, or when consecrating a meditation seat. Also during Peethasthapana rituals.

meaning_en: She who is worshipped through the elaborate sequence of the great yagna
meaning_hi: महायाग (महान् यज्ञ) के विधिवत् क्रम से आराधित
modern_context: यज्ञ वैदिक संस्कृति का मूल है। आज भी गृह प्रवेश, विवाह, मुण्डन सब में हवन होता है। लेकिन महायाग साधारण हवन नहीं, बल्कि विस्तृत अनुष्ठान है जो कई दिनों तक चलता है। नवरात्रि में जो नौ दिन का अनुष्ठान करते हैं, वह भी एक महायाग है। क्रम (विधि) का पालन ज़रूरी है।
modern_context_en: Yagna is the foundation of Vedic culture. Even today, Griha Pravesh, marriage, and mundan all include havan. But Mahayaga is not ordinary havan but an elaborate ritual lasting many days. The nine-day Navratri worship is also a Mahayaga. Following the krama (proper sequence) is essential.
nri_context: When organizing a multi-day Navratri puja abroad with limited resources and no pandit, following even a simplified krama with devotion satisfies Mahayagakramaradhya.
usage_context: Chant during elaborate yagna ceremonies, Navratri anushthan, or when performing any systematic multi-step worship. Also during Ati Rudra Maha Yagna.

meaning_en: She who is worshipped by Mahabhairava (the fierce form of Shiva)
meaning_hi: महाभैरव (शिव के उग्रतम रूप) द्वारा पूजित
modern_context: भैरव शिव का सबसे उग्र रूप है जो काशी विश्वनाथ मन्दिर के कोतवाल (रक्षक) माने जाते हैं। जब शिव का उग्रतम रूप भी देवी की पूजा करता है, तो देवी की शक्ति की कल्पना करें। काल भैरव अष्टमी पर जब काशी में भैरव पूजा हो, तब इस नाम का विशेष जाप करें।
modern_context_en: Bhairava is Shiva's fiercest form, considered the kotwal (guardian) of Kashi Vishwanath temple. When even Shiva's most terrifying form worships Devi, imagine her power. On Kala Bhairav Ashtami when Bhairava puja happens in Kashi, chant this name especially.
nri_context: When even the most intimidating challenges abroad bow before your inner strength, that is the living experience of Mahabhairava himself bowing to the Devi within you.
usage_context: Chant during Bhairav puja, Kala Bhairav Ashtami, or when facing terrifying situations. Also during Tantric Bhairava sadhana.

meaning_en: She who witnesses the great cosmic dance of Shiva at the end of each mahā-kalpa
meaning_hi: महाकल्प के अन्त में महेश्वर के महाताण्डव (प्रलय नृत्य) की साक्षिणी

mahātāṇḍava.en: the great cosmic dance of dissolution

modern_context: जब समस्त ब्रह्माण्ड का प्रलय होता है और शिव ताण्डव करते हैं, तब भी देवी साक्षी भाव से देखती रहती हैं, शान्त, अविचलित। यह नाम सिखाता है कि जीवन में सबसे बड़े तूफ़ान में भी एक शान्त साक्षी भाव बनाए रखना सम्भव है। जब सब ख़त्म होता दिखे, आप साक्षी बनें, प्रतिक्रिया न दें।
modern_context_en: When the entire universe dissolves and Shiva performs his Tandava, Devi watches as a calm, unmoved witness. This name teaches that even in life's greatest storms, maintaining a quiet witness awareness is possible. When everything seems to be ending, become the witness; do not react.
nri_context: When global crises, market crashes, or geopolitical upheavals abroad trigger panic in your immigrant community, this name teaches you to observe calmly like Devi watching the cosmic dance.
usage_context: Chant during existential contemplation, Nataraja meditation, or when cultivating Sakshi Bhava (witness consciousness). The most cosmically expansive name in this batch.

meaning_en: She who is the chief queen of the great Kameshvara (Shiva)
meaning_hi: महाकामेश्वर (शिव) की पटरानी (प्रमुख रानी)
modern_context: महिषी का अर्थ है पटरानी, अर्थात् सबसे प्रमुख रानी। देवी शिव की केवल पत्नी नहीं, पटरानी हैं। भारतीय विवाह में पत्नी को अर्धांगिनी (आधा अंग) कहते हैं, अर्थात् बराबर का साझेदार। यह नाम याद दिलाता है कि विवाह में पत्नी सेविका नहीं, सम्राज्ञी है।
modern_context_en: Mahishi means chief queen, the most prominent consort. Devi is not merely Shiva's wife but his chief queen. In Indian marriage, a wife is called Ardhangini (half of the body), meaning an equal partner. This name reminds that in marriage, the wife is not a servant but an empress.
nri_context: When traditional expectations abroad reduce the wife to a support role while the husband gets all career priority, this name restores the balance: she is Mahishi, the chief queen.
usage_context: Chant during wedding ceremonies, for marital equality, or when honouring the partnership between spouses. Also during Shiva-Shakti puja.

meaning_en: She who is the great beauty of the three worlds (Tripurasundari)
meaning_hi: तीनों लोकों (त्रिपुर) की महान् सुन्दरी
modern_context: त्रिपुरसुन्दरी श्रीविद्या उपासना की प्रमुख देवी हैं। तीन लोक (स्थूल शरीर, सूक्ष्म शरीर, कारण शरीर) तीनों में वे सुन्दरतम हैं। सौन्दर्य प्रतियोगिताओं में बाहरी रूप आँका जाता है, लेकिन देवी तीनों स्तरों पर सुन्दर हैं: शरीर, मन और आत्मा। सच्चा सौन्दर्य त्रिस्तरीय होता है।
modern_context_en: Tripurasundari is the chief deity of Sri Vidya worship. Across three worlds (gross body, subtle body, causal body), she is the most beautiful. Beauty pageants judge outer appearance, but Devi is beautiful on all three levels: body, mind, and soul. True beauty is three-dimensional.
nri_context: When beauty standards abroad or back home reduce worth to skin colour or body shape, this name redefines beauty as a triple phenomenon encompassing physical, mental, and spiritual radiance.
usage_context: Chant during Sri Vidya sadhana, Lalita Jayanti, or when contemplating the nature of beauty. The primary identity name of the Lalita tradition.

meaning_en: She who is worshipped with the sixty-four sacred offerings
meaning_hi: चौसठ उपचारों (पूजा सामग्रियों) से पूजित

upacāra.en: offerings, acts of worship, ritual services

modern_context: 64 उपचार में स्नान, वस्त्र, आभूषण, चन्दन, पुष्प, धूप, दीप, नैवेद्य आदि शामिल हैं। पंचोपचार (5) और षोडशोपचार (16) सामान्य हैं, लेकिन चतुःषष्टि उपचार सबसे विस्तृत पूजा है। नवरात्रि की अष्टमी पर यदि 64 उपचारों से पूजा करें तो यह सर्वोच्च अर्चना है।
modern_context_en: The 64 upachara include bathing, clothing, ornaments, sandalwood, flowers, incense, lamp, naivedya, and more. Panchopachara (5) and Shodashopachara (16) are common, but Chatuhshashti Upachara is the most elaborate worship. If you perform 64-upachara puja on Navratri Ashtami, it is the supreme archana.
nri_context: Even if 64 items are impossible abroad, the intention to offer the most elaborate worship you can manage, even with substitutes, satisfies the spirit of this name.
usage_context: Chant during elaborate Devi puja, when performing Shodashopachara or Chatuhshashti Upachara worship. Also when learning detailed puja vidhi.

meaning_en: She who embodies all sixty-four arts and sciences
meaning_hi: चौसठ कलाओं से परिपूर्ण
modern_context: प्राचीन भारत में 64 कलाएँ गिनाई गई हैं: संगीत, नृत्य, चित्रकला, वास्तुकला, रसोई, सिलाई, आभूषण बनाना, और बहुत कुछ। आज coding, photography, graphic design भी कलाएँ हैं। देवी 64 कलाओं की मूर्ति हैं। जब बच्चे extra-curricular activities में हिस्सा लें तो कहें कि हर कला देवी का एक अंश है।
modern_context_en: Ancient India enumerated 64 arts: music, dance, painting, architecture, cooking, sewing, jewellery-making, and much more. Today coding, photography, graphic design are also arts. Devi is the embodiment of all 64 arts. When children participate in extracurricular activities, tell them every art is a fragment of Devi.
nri_context: When your child abroad wants to learn Bharatanatyam AND coding AND piano AND football, let them: each is one of the 64 kalas that this name blesses as divine.
usage_context: Chant during art classes, creative pursuits, or when exploring a new skill. Also during Lalita Jayanti and Vasant Panchami for arts.

root_word: mahā + catuḥṣaṣṭi + koṭi + yoginī + gaṇa + sevitā
meaning_en: She who is served by the great assembly of sixty-four crore yoginis
meaning_hi: चौसठ करोड़ महायोगिनियों के गणों द्वारा सेवित
modern_context: चौसठ योगिनी मन्दिर भारत में कुछ ही बचे हैं, जैसे हीरापुर (ओडिशा) और मितावली (मध्य प्रदेश)। ये गोलाकार मन्दिर हैं जहाँ 64 योगिनियों की मूर्तियाँ वृत्ताकार में बैठी हैं। भारतीय संसद भवन की गोलाकार संरचना भी इन मन्दिरों से प्रेरित मानी जाती है।
modern_context_en: Only a few Chausath Yogini temples survive in India, such as Hirapur (Odisha) and Mitawali (Madhya Pradesh). These circular temples have 64 yogini murtis seated in a ring. Even the Indian Parliament's circular structure is believed to be inspired by these temples.
nri_context: When you visit the few surviving Yogini temples during an India trip, you encounter a 1000-year-old tradition of feminine power that pre-dates and inspires even modern democratic architecture.
usage_context: Chant during Yogini puja, when visiting Chausath Yogini temples, or during full-moon rituals associated with Yogini worship. Also during Yogini Ekadashi.

meaning_en: She who is the sacred knowledge contained in the Manu (Panchadashi mantra)
meaning_hi: मनु (पंचदशी मन्त्र) में निहित पवित्र विद्या स्वरूपा

manu.en: Manu (here: a specific name for the Panchadashi mantra; also: progenitor of humanity)
manu.hi: मनु (यहाँ: पंचदशी मन्त्र का एक नाम; मानवजाति के प्रजनक भी)

modern_context: मनुविद्या पंचदशी मन्त्र का ही दूसरा नाम है। विद्या का अर्थ है वह ज्ञान जो मुक्ति दे। स्कूल-कॉलेज की पढ़ाई information है, लेकिन विद्या transformation है। IIT बताता है कैसे bridge बनाएँ, लेकिन विद्या बताती है कि bridge बनाने वाला 'मैं कौन हूँ'। यह अन्तर है information और विद्या में।
modern_context_en: Manuvidya is another name for the Panchadashi mantra. Vidya means knowledge that liberates. School and college education is information, but vidya is transformation. IIT teaches how to build a bridge, but vidya asks 'who am I that builds the bridge.' This is the difference between information and vidya.
nri_context: After collecting degrees, certifications, and credentials abroad, the question 'but do I know myself?' is the beginning of Manuvidya, the knowledge that no university teaches.
usage_context: Chant during Panchadashi mantra japa, Sri Vidya diksha, or when seeking knowledge that transforms rather than merely informs. A bridge between names 85-89 and the next series.

meaning_en: She who is the sacred knowledge embodied in the Chandra (moon) mantra
meaning_hi: चन्द्र मन्त्र में निहित पवित्र विद्या स्वरूपा

candra.en: moon; here also refers to a specific form of the Panchadashi mantra
candra.hi: चन्द्रमा; यहाँ पंचदशी मन्त्र के एक विशेष रूप को भी सूचित करता है

modern_context: चन्द्रविद्या पंचदशी मन्त्र का चन्द्रकला रूप है जो शीतलता और शान्ति देता है। जैसे चन्द्रमा की रोशनी सूर्य जैसी तीखी नहीं बल्कि शीतल होती है, वैसे ही चन्द्रविद्या शान्त ज्ञान है। परीक्षा की तैयारी में जब दिमाग़ जले तो शाम को चाँदनी में बैठकर इस नाम का जाप शीतलता देता है।
modern_context_en: Chandravidya is the Chandrakala form of the Panchadashi mantra that gives coolness and peace. Just as moonlight is not harsh like sunlight but soothing, Chandravidya is calm knowledge. During exam preparation when the mind overheats, sitting in moonlight and chanting this name in the evening brings cooling relief.
nri_context: When the relentless pace of work abroad leaves your mind burning, this name is the cool moonlight that soothes without dimming your intelligence.
usage_context: Chant during full moon meditation, evening sadhana, or when mental agitation needs cooling. Also during Chandra puja on Mondays and Purnima nights.

meaning_en: She who dwells at the centre of the lunar orb
meaning_hi: चन्द्रमण्डल (चन्द्रमा के वृत्त) के मध्य में विराजमान
modern_context: सहस्रार चक्र में एक चन्द्रमण्डल माना जाता है जहाँ से अमृत टपकता है। जब ध्यान में शिखर पर शीतलता अनुभव हो, वह चन्द्रमण्डलमध्यगा देवी का स्पर्श है। करवा चौथ पर जब छलनी से चाँद देखें, तो उसके बीचोंबीच देवी को देखें, न कि केवल चन्द्रमा को।
modern_context_en: In the Sahasrara chakra there is a Chandra Mandala from which nectar drips. When coolness is felt at the crown during meditation, that is Chandramandala Madhyaga Devi's touch. On Karwa Chauth when viewing the moon through a sieve, see Devi at its very centre, not merely the moon.
nri_context: On a clear night abroad when the full moon seems closer and brighter than it ever did in the polluted city skies of India, that luminous centre is where Devi dwells.
usage_context: Chant during Sahasrara meditation, Chandra Darshan, Karwa Chauth, or any full moon worship. Also during Soma (moon) related Ayurvedic practices.

meaning_en: She who has an enchantingly beautiful form
meaning_hi: अत्यन्त मनमोहक और सुन्दर रूप वाली
modern_context: चारु का अर्थ है वह सौन्दर्य जो मन को सहज ही आकर्षित कर ले। मन्दिर में जब देवी की मूर्ति का शृंगार देखकर मन मुग्ध हो जाए, वह चारुरूपा का दर्शन है। दुर्गा पूजा के पण्डालों में कारीगर जो मूर्तियाँ बनाते हैं, वे अनजाने में चारुरूपा को साकार कर रहे होते हैं।
modern_context_en: Charu means the beauty that effortlessly captivates the mind. When Devi's decorated murti at the temple leaves you spellbound, that is Charurupa's darshan. The artisans who craft murtis for Durga Puja pandals are unknowingly giving form to Charurupa.
nri_context: When you see a beautifully crafted Durga murti at a small overseas community puja and tears well up from its sheer beauty, you are experiencing Chārurūpā across continents.
usage_context: Chant during Devi murti darshan, art appreciation, or when seeking to see divine beauty in the world. Also during Durga Puja murti-making.

meaning_en: She who has the most enchanting and graceful smile
meaning_hi: अत्यन्त मोहक और मधुर मुस्कान वाली
modern_context: एक सच्ची मुस्कान दुनिया की सबसे शक्तिशाली औषधि है। जब doctor बुरी ख़बर दे और माँ की मुस्कान कहे 'सब ठीक होगा', वह चारुहासा है। बच्चे की पहली मुस्कान में भी वही दैवी चमक है। जब ज़िन्दगी कठिन हो, तो मुस्कुराएँ, क्योंकि मुस्कान देवी का प्रसाद है।
modern_context_en: A genuine smile is the world's most powerful medicine. When a doctor delivers bad news and a mother's smile says 'everything will be alright', that is Charuhasa. A baby's first smile carries the same divine sparkle. When life is hard, smile, because a smile is Devi's prasad.
nri_context: When homesickness hits and nothing feels right, forcing yourself to smile at a stranger who smiles back creates a micro-moment of Charuhasa's grace in a foreign land.
usage_context: Chant to cultivate a positive disposition, during laughter yoga, or when offering a smile to someone in pain. Also during Annapurna puja for the smile that feeds.

meaning_en: She who wears the lovely crescent moon as her ornament
meaning_hi: मनोहर चन्द्रकला (अर्धचन्द्र) धारण करने वाली
modern_context: शिव जटाओं में चन्द्रमा धारण करते हैं, और देवी भी चन्द्रकला धारण करती हैं। यह शिव-शक्ति की एकता का प्रतीक है। द्वितीया के नन्हे चाँद से लेकर पूर्णिमा तक, हर कला देवी के शृंगार का अंश है। ईद का चाँद देखने की परम्परा हो या करवा चौथ की, चन्द्रमा सभी संस्कृतियों में पवित्र है।
modern_context_en: Shiva wears the moon in his matted locks, and Devi too wears the crescent. This symbolizes Shiva-Shakti unity. From the tiny second-day moon to the full moon, every phase is part of Devi's adornment. Whether the tradition of sighting the Eid moon or Karwa Chauth's moon, the crescent is sacred across all cultures.
nri_context: When the crescent moon appears thin and delicate in the sky of a foreign country, it carries the same beauty as the one over your childhood rooftop in India.
usage_context: Chant during Chandra Darshan, at the beginning of any lunar month, or during crescent moon meditation. Also during Chandraghanta puja on Navratri's third day.

meaning_en: She who is the sovereign of the entire world of moving and unmoving beings
meaning_hi: चर (चलने वाले) और अचर (स्थिर) सम्पूर्ण जगत् की स्वामिनी
modern_context: चर जीव हैं मनुष्य, पशु, पक्षी। अचर हैं पर्वत, नदी, वृक्ष। देवी दोनों की नाथा हैं। पर्यावरण संरक्षण का यही आधार है कि जड़ और चेतन दोनों में देवी विद्यमान हैं। जब प्लास्टिक से समुद्र प्रदूषित हो या वायु गन्दी हो, तो याद करें कि प्रकृति को नुक़सान पहुँचाना देवी को नुक़सान पहुँचाना है।
modern_context_en: Moving beings are humans, animals, birds. Unmoving are mountains, rivers, trees. Devi is sovereign of both. This is the foundation of environmental conservation: Devi is present in both animate and inanimate. When oceans are polluted with plastic or air turns foul, remember that harming nature is harming Devi.
nri_context: Adopting eco-friendly practices abroad, recycling diligently, reducing carbon footprint, these are modern acts of reverence to Caracara Jagannatha who rules all of creation.
usage_context: Chant during environmental pujas, World Environment Day, or when contemplating the unity of all creation. Also during Vanmahotsava and nature conservation drives.

meaning_en: She whose abode is the Sri Chakra, the king of all yantras
meaning_hi: चक्रराज (श्री चक्र, सभी यन्त्रों का राजा) को अपना निवास बनाने वाली

cakrarāja.en: Sri Chakra (the king of all chakras/yantras)

modern_context: श्री चक्र देवी का घर है। जब घर के मन्दिर में श्री यन्त्र स्थापित करें, तो वह देवी को घर बुलाने जैसा है। लेकिन श्री चक्र को केवल decoration न बनाएँ, रोज़ उसके सामने दीपक जलाएँ, जल अर्पित करें, और कम से कम एक बार प्रणाम करें। जहाँ श्री चक्र सम्मानित है, वहाँ लक्ष्मी स्थायी हैं।
modern_context_en: Sri Chakra is Devi's home. When installing a Sri Yantra in your home temple, it is like inviting Devi to live in your house. But do not make it mere decoration; daily light a lamp before it, offer water, and bow at least once. Where Sri Chakra is honoured, Lakshmi stays permanently.
nri_context: A properly consecrated Sri Yantra in your overseas apartment transforms rented space into Devi's own niketana, her permanent divine address regardless of your lease terms.
usage_context: Chant during Sri Chakra installation, daily Sri Yantra puja, or when meditating on the geometry of the divine. Also during Lalita Jayanti.

meaning_en: She who is Parvati, the daughter of the mountain king Himalaya
meaning_hi: पर्वतराज हिमालय की पुत्री, पार्वती

pārvatī.en: daughter of Parvata (mountain); Shiva's consort born as Himavan's daughter
pārvatī.hi: पर्वत की पुत्री; हिमवान की बेटी, शिव की पत्नी

modern_context: पार्वती माँ हिमालय की बेटी हैं और उन्होंने कठोर तपस्या से शिव को पति रूप में प्राप्त किया। यह नाम सिखाता है कि इच्छित वस्तु के लिए तप ज़रूरी है। जब UPSC की तैयारी में वर्षों लगें या PhD में 5-6 साल, तो पार्वती की तपस्या याद करें। उन्होंने भी वर्षों तपस्या की तब शिव मिले।
modern_context_en: Parvati Ma is the daughter of Himalaya who obtained Shiva as husband through fierce tapasya. This name teaches that achieving what you desire requires dedication. When UPSC preparation takes years or a PhD stretches to 5-6 years, remember Parvati's tapasya. She too practised for years before Shiva came.
nri_context: The years of patience building a career abroad, waiting for permanent residency, earning recognition in a foreign system, is your personal Parvati-tapasya.
usage_context: Chant during Gauri puja, Teej, Hartalika Teej, or when long-term dedication is required. One of the most beloved and personal names of the Goddess.

meaning_en: She whose eyes are as beautiful and expansive as lotus petals
meaning_hi: कमल के समान सुन्दर और विशाल नेत्रों वाली
modern_context: कमल की पंखुड़ियाँ चौड़ी और कोमल होती हैं। देवी की आँखें भी ऐसी ही हैं, सबको समान दृष्टि से देखने वाली। जब बच्चा ग़लती करे और माँ की बड़ी-बड़ी आँखें प्यार से देखें, डाँटें नहीं, वह पद्मनयना दृष्टि है। Meditation में जब भ्रूमध्य पर ध्यान लगाएँ, तो कल्पना करें कि देवी की कमल-नयन दृष्टि आप पर है।
modern_context_en: Lotus petals are broad and tender. Devi's eyes are the same, viewing everyone with equal love. When a child makes a mistake and a mother's large eyes look with love rather than scolding, that is Padmanayana's gaze. In meditation when focusing on the brow centre, visualize Devi's lotus-eyed gaze resting upon you.
nri_context: When you feel invisible in a foreign country, overlooked and unnoticed, this name assures you that Devi's lotus-wide eyes see you clearly and lovingly, always.
usage_context: Chant when seeking Devi's compassionate gaze, during Trataka meditation, or when feeling unseen. Also during Lotus offering pujas.

meaning_en: She whose radiance equals the glow of the padmaraga ruby
meaning_hi: पद्मराग (माणिक्य) के समान आभा वाली
modern_context: पद्मराग मणि (ruby) ज्योतिष में सूर्य का रत्न है जो आत्मविश्वास और नेतृत्व बढ़ाता है। जब कोई नया व्यवसाय शुरू करें या leadership role में आएँ, तो माणिक्य पहनने से पहले इस नाम का जाप करें। रत्न पहनना शॉर्टकट नहीं, देवी की कृपा का माध्यम है।
modern_context_en: Padmaraga (ruby) is the Sun's gemstone in Jyotish, enhancing confidence and leadership. When starting a new business or stepping into a leadership role, chant this name before wearing a ruby. Wearing gems is not a shortcut but a medium of Devi's grace.
nri_context: When a Jyotishi recommends wearing a ruby for career growth abroad, combining the gem with this name's japa transforms a superstitious act into a devotional practice.
usage_context: Chant when wearing rubies, during Surya-related rituals, or when seeking leadership charisma. Also during Ratna Sthapana pujas.

meaning_en: She who sits upon a throne formed by the five cosmic beings in their inert state
meaning_hi: पाँच प्रेत (निष्क्रिय ब्रह्मा, विष्णु, रुद्र, ईश्वर, सदाशिव) के आसन पर विराजमान

preta.en: inert being (here: the five cosmic deities without Shakti are lifeless like corpses)
preta.hi: प्रेत (यहाँ: शक्ति के बिना पाँच देवता शव-तुल्य हैं)

modern_context: यह नाम सबसे शक्तिशाली दार्शनिक कथन है: शक्ति के बिना शिव 'शव' हैं। ब्रह्मा, विष्णु, रुद्र, ईश्वर, सदाशिव पाँचों शक्ति के बिना निष्क्रिय हैं। जब कोई कहे 'स्त्रियाँ कमज़ोर हैं', तो यह नाम उत्तर है: देवता भी स्त्री शक्ति के बिना शव हैं।
modern_context_en: This name is the most powerful philosophical statement: without Shakti, Shiva is 'shava' (corpse). Brahma, Vishnu, Rudra, Ishvara, Sadashiva, all five are inert without Shakti. When someone says 'women are weak', this name answers: even gods are corpses without feminine power.
nri_context: When patriarchal attitudes persist even among educated diaspora families, this name is the ultimate theological argument for feminine supremacy that silences every objection.
usage_context: Chant during feminist spiritual discourse, Shakti puja, or when asserting feminine power. The most theologically radical name in the entire Sahasranama.

meaning_en: She who is the living embodiment of all five Brahmas
meaning_hi: पाँचों ब्रह्माओं (ब्रह्मा, विष्णु, रुद्र, ईश्वर, सदाशिव) का साक्षात् स्वरूप

brahma.en: the five Brahmas (Brahma, Vishnu, Rudra, Ishvara, Sadashiva)
brahma.hi: पाँच ब्रह्म (ब्रह्मा, विष्णु, रुद्र, ईश्वर, सदाशिव)

modern_context: पिछला नाम (251) कहता है पाँचों देवी के बिना निष्क्रिय हैं, और यह नाम कहता है कि पाँचों देवी का ही स्वरूप हैं। सृष्टि (ब्रह्मा), स्थिति (विष्णु), संहार (रुद्र), तिरोभाव (ईश्वर), अनुग्रह (सदाशिव), ये पाँचों कार्य एक ही देवी के हैं। Working woman जो सुबह बनाती है (सृष्टि), दिन में सँभालती है (स्थिति), शाम को clean करती है (संहार), वह पंचब्रह्मस्वरूपिणी है।
modern_context_en: The previous name (251) says the five gods are inert without Devi, and this name says all five are Devi's own form. Creation (Brahma), preservation (Vishnu), destruction (Rudra), concealment (Ishvara), grace (Sadashiva), all five functions belong to one Devi. A working woman who creates in the morning, maintains through the day, and cleans up at night is Panchabrahmasvarupini.
nri_context: The immigrant woman who simultaneously creates a home, preserves cultural values, destroys obstacles, conceals her struggles, and showers grace on her family embodies all five Brahmas.
usage_context: Chant during Panchayatan puja, when contemplating the five cosmic functions, or when honouring multitasking women. Pairs with name 251 as a philosophical duo.

meaning_en: She who is pure consciousness itself
meaning_hi: शुद्ध चैतन्य (चित्) स्वरूपा
modern_context: सच्चिदानन्द (सत्-चित्-आनन्द) ब्रह्म के तीन लक्षण हैं, और देवी चिन्मयी हैं अर्थात् शुद्ध चेतना से बनी हैं। जब ध्यान में विचार रुकें और केवल 'मैं हूँ' का भान रहे, वह चिन्मय अवस्था है। Chinmaya Mission के संस्थापक स्वामी चिन्मयानन्द ने इसी चेतना को जन-जन तक पहुँचाया।
modern_context_en: Sat-Chit-Ananda are the three attributes of Brahman, and Devi is Chinmayi, made of pure consciousness. When thoughts cease in meditation and only the awareness of 'I am' remains, that is the Chinmaya state. Chinmaya Mission's founder Swami Chinmayananda brought this consciousness to the masses.
nri_context: Attending a Chinmaya Mission class abroad where Vedanta is taught in English is one way diaspora families connect with the Chinmayi consciousness this name embodies.
usage_context: Chant during Vedanta meditation, consciousness-focused sadhana, or Chinmaya Mission events. Also during Sat-Chit-Ananda contemplation.

meaning_en: She who is supreme bliss, the highest possible joy
meaning_hi: परम आनन्द स्वरूपा, सर्वोच्च सम्भव सुख
modern_context: आनन्द ही जीवन का लक्ष्य है। तैत्तिरीय उपनिषद कहता है 'आनन्दो ब्रह्मेति व्यजानात्', आनन्द ही ब्रह्म है। Disneyland का आनन्द क्षणिक है, लेकिन परमानन्द शाश्वत है। जब कीर्तन में आँखें बन्द हों और भीतर से आनन्द की लहर उठे जिसका कोई कारण न हो, वही परमानन्द है।
modern_context_en: Bliss is life's ultimate goal. Taittiriya Upanishad says 'Anando Brahmeti Vyajanat', bliss itself is Brahman. Disneyland's joy is momentary, but Paramananda is eternal. When eyes close in kirtan and a wave of causeless joy rises from within, that is Paramananda.
nri_context: When material success abroad has given you everything money can buy yet a nameless joy remains missing, this name points to the Paramananda that no purchase can provide.
usage_context: Chant during bliss meditation, kirtan, or when seeking the joy that transcends circumstances. Also during Taittiriya Upanishad study.

meaning_en: She who is the dense, solidified mass of pure experiential knowledge
meaning_hi: शुद्ध अनुभवात्मक ज्ञान (विज्ञान) के सघन पिण्ड का रूप

vijñāna.en: experiential knowledge, direct knowing (not mere information)
vijñāna.hi: विज्ञान, प्रत्यक्ष अनुभव-जनित ज्ञान (केवल सूचना नहीं)

rūpiṇī.en: embodiment of, in the form of

modern_context: विज्ञान यहाँ modern science नहीं, बल्कि 'वि-ज्ञान' अर्थात् विशेष ज्ञान, अनुभवजन्य ज्ञान है। किताब में पढ़ना ज्ञान है, लेकिन स्वयं अनुभव करना विज्ञान है। Swimming की book पढ़ना ज्ञान है, पानी में कूदना विज्ञान। देवी विज्ञानघनरूपिणी हैं, अर्थात् वे केवल सिद्धान्त नहीं, सघन अनुभव हैं।
modern_context_en: Vijnana here is not modern science but 'vi-jnana', special experiential knowledge. Reading a book is jnana, but experiencing it yourself is vijnana. Reading about swimming is jnana, jumping into water is vijnana. Devi is Vijnanaghanarūpiṇī, meaning she is not theory but dense, lived experience.
nri_context: The difference between reading about India from abroad and actually visiting after years, smelling the soil, tasting the water, that visceral gap between jñāna and vijñāna is what this name bridges.
usage_context: Chant during experiential learning, when seeking direct realization over book knowledge, or during Vijnanamaya Kosha meditation. Also during practical sadhana.

meaning_en: She who is simultaneously the meditation, the meditator, and the object of meditation
meaning_hi: ध्यान, ध्याता (ध्यान करने वाला) और ध्येय (ध्यान का विषय) तीनों का एकीकृत स्वरूप

dhyātṛ.en: the meditator, the one who meditates

modern_context: यह अद्वैत वेदान्त का सार है। ध्यान करने वाला, ध्यान, और जिसका ध्यान किया जा रहा है, तीनों एक ही हैं। जब ध्यान इतना गहरा हो कि 'मैं ध्यान कर रहा हूँ' का भान न रहे और केवल ध्यान बचे, तब त्रिपुटी (triplet) विलीन हो जाती है। यही समाधि है।
modern_context_en: This is the essence of Advaita Vedanta. The meditator, the meditation, and the object of meditation are all one. When meditation goes so deep that the awareness of 'I am meditating' disappears and only meditation remains, the triputi (triplet) dissolves. That is samadhi.
nri_context: In rare moments of deep focus abroad, whether coding, painting, or praying, when the doer, the doing, and the done merge into one flow state, you touch this triputi-dissolving truth.
usage_context: Chant during advanced meditation, Samadhi practice, or Advaita study. One of the most philosophically dense names in the entire Sahasranama.

meaning_en: She who transcends both dharma (righteousness) and adharma (unrighteousness)
meaning_hi: धर्म और अधर्म दोनों से परे
modern_context: यह नाम चौंकाने वाला है: देवी धर्म-अधर्म दोनों से परे हैं? हाँ, क्योंकि धर्म-अधर्म मानवीय अवधारणाएँ हैं, देवी इन श्रेणियों से ऊपर हैं। जैसे सूर्य चोर और साधु दोनों पर बराबर प्रकाश डालता है, वैसे ही देवी सबकी माँ हैं। न्यायाधीश को भी एक कदम पीछे हटकर 'न्याय क्या है' पूछना पड़ता है।
modern_context_en: This name is startling: Devi is beyond both dharma and adharma? Yes, because dharma-adharma are human concepts and Devi is above these categories. Just as the sun shines equally on thief and saint, Devi is mother of all. Even a judge must step back and ask 'what is justice?'
nri_context: When moral frameworks clash between Indian tradition and Western law abroad, this name offers the ultimate perspective: Devi transcends both systems because she IS the source from which all ethics derive.
usage_context: Chant during deep philosophical contemplation, when moral dilemmas have no clear answer, or during Nirguna Brahman meditation. A name for advanced seekers.

meaning_en: She whose form is the entire visible universe
meaning_hi: सम्पूर्ण दृश्य विश्व जिनका स्वरूप है
modern_context: गीता के 11वें अध्याय में अर्जुन ने कृष्ण का विश्वरूप देखा और काँप उठा। देवी का विश्वरूप भी ऐसा ही भव्य और भयंकर है। जब Chandrayaan चन्द्रमा की तस्वीरें भेजे या James Webb Telescope ब्रह्माण्ड के छोर दिखाए, वह सब विश्वरूपा देवी का ही दर्शन है।
modern_context_en: In Gita's 11th chapter, Arjuna saw Krishna's cosmic form and trembled. Devi's Vishwarupa is equally grand and terrifying. When Chandrayaan sends moon images or the James Webb Telescope shows the edges of the cosmos, all of that is darshan of Vishwarupa Devi.
nri_context: When you watch a space documentary abroad and the immensity of the universe leaves you speechless, that awe is exactly what Arjuna felt, and it is Vishvarupa revealing herself.
usage_context: Chant during cosmic meditation, when watching astronomical events, or during Gita Chapter 11 study. Also during planetarium visits and space-themed pujas.

meaning_en: She who is eternally awake and watchful
meaning_hi: सदा जागृत और सतर्क रहने वाली

jāgariṇī.en: the ever-wakeful one, she who never sleeps
jāgariṇī.hi: सदा जागने वाली, कभी न सोने वाली

modern_context: माँ की नींद सबसे हल्की होती है, बच्चे की हल्की सी हलचल पर भी जाग जाती हैं। देवी जागरिणी हैं, कभी सोती नहीं। नवरात्रि का जागरण (जगराता) इसी भाव से होता है कि जैसे देवी जागती हैं, वैसे ही हम भी एक रात जागकर उनके साथ जागृत रहें।
modern_context_en: A mother's sleep is the lightest; she wakes at the slightest stir of her child. Devi is Jagarini; she never sleeps. The Navratri jagrata (all-night vigil) carries this very sentiment: just as Devi stays awake, we too stay awake one night to be wakeful with her.
nri_context: When jet lag keeps you awake at 3 AM in a foreign country, instead of fighting it, use that wakefulness to connect with Jagarini Devi who is always awake at every hour across every time zone.
usage_context: Chant during jagrata (night vigils), Shivaratri, or when unable to sleep. Also during Pratyahara meditation and awareness practices.

meaning_en: She who manifests as the dream state of consciousness
meaning_hi: स्वप्न अवस्था (चेतना की सपने वाली अवस्था) के रूप में प्रकट होने वाली

svapantī.en: the dreaming one; she who manifests as the dream state
svapantī.hi: स्वप्न देखने वाली; स्वप्न अवस्था के रूप में प्रकट

modern_context: वेदान्त में चेतना की तीन अवस्थाएँ हैं: जाग्रत (जागना), स्वप्न (सपना), सुषुप्ति (गहरी नींद)। देवी तीनों में हैं। स्वप्न अवस्था में मन अपनी दुनिया रचता है। जब सपने में मन्दिर दिखे या देवी का दर्शन हो, तो उसे अर्थहीन न कहें; वह स्वपन्ती देवी का सन्देश हो सकता है।
modern_context_en: Vedanta describes three states of consciousness: Jagrat (waking), Svapna (dreaming), Sushupti (deep sleep). Devi is present in all three. In the dream state, the mind creates its own world. When a temple appears in a dream or Devi gives darshan, do not dismiss it; it may be Svapanti Devi's message.
nri_context: When you dream of your grandmother's puja room or your childhood temple thousands of miles away, Svapanti Devi is using the dream state to keep your spiritual roots alive.
usage_context: Chant before sleep for auspicious dreams, during dream yoga, or when interpreting spiritual dreams. Also during Mandukya Upanishad study on consciousness states.

meaning_en: She who is the luminous self that illuminates the dream world
meaning_hi: तैजस (स्वप्न अवस्था का प्रकाशमान आत्मा) स्वरूपा

taijasa.en: the luminous one; the self as experienced in the dream state (Mandukya Upanishad term)
taijasa.hi: तैजस; स्वप्न अवस्था में अनुभव होने वाला प्रकाशमान आत्मा (माण्डूक्य उपनिषद शब्द)

modern_context: माण्डूक्य उपनिषद में आत्मा के चार पाद हैं: वैश्वानर (जाग्रत), तैजस (स्वप्न), प्राज्ञ (सुषुप्ति), तुरीय (चतुर्थ)। तैजस वह प्रकाश है जो सपने में दिखता है, बिना सूर्य या बल्ब के। यह देवी की वह शक्ति है जो भीतर से प्रकाश देती है। Creative artists जो सपने में inspiration पाते हैं, वे तैजसात्मिका की कृपा से पाते हैं।
modern_context_en: Mandukya Upanishad describes four aspects of the self: Vaishvanara (waking), Taijasa (dreaming), Prajna (deep sleep), Turiya (fourth). Taijasa is the light seen in dreams without sun or bulb. This is Devi's power that illuminates from within. Creative artists who find inspiration in dreams receive it through Taijasatmika's grace.
nri_context: When the solution to a complex problem at work comes to you in a dream, or a creative breakthrough arrives during sleep, that is the Taijasa light illuminating your inner world.
usage_context: Chant during dream journaling, creative visualization, or Mandukya Upanishad study. Also for those seeking artistic inspiration through inner light.

meaning_en: She who manifests as the deep sleep state of consciousness
meaning_hi: सुषुप्ति (गहरी नींद) अवस्था के रूप में प्रकट होने वाली

suptā.en: the deeply sleeping one; she who manifests as deep sleep state
suptā.hi: गहरी नींद अवस्था; सुषुप्ति का रूप

modern_context: गहरी नींद में न सपने आते हैं, न चिन्ताएँ। यह सबसे शान्तिपूर्ण अवस्था है। आयुर्वेद कहता है कि अच्छी नींद सबसे बड़ी औषधि है। जब insomnia हो, नींद की गोलियाँ लेनी पड़ें, तो इस नाम का जाप करते हुए लेटें। देवी सुप्ता वह शक्ति हैं जो गहरी नींद देती हैं ताकि शरीर और मन दोनों ठीक हों।
modern_context_en: In deep sleep there are no dreams, no worries. It is the most peaceful state. Ayurveda says good sleep is the greatest medicine. When insomnia strikes and sleeping pills become necessary, lie down chanting this name. Devi Supta is the power that grants deep sleep so body and mind both heal.
nri_context: When time zone confusion, work stress, and the never-ending to-do list of immigrant life steal your sleep, this name invites the healing darkness of deep, dreamless rest.
usage_context: Chant before sleep for insomnia, during Yoga Nidra, or when seeking deep restorative rest. Also during Sushupti state meditation.

meaning_en: She who is the consciousness experienced in deep sleep, the knower of all
meaning_hi: प्राज्ञ (सुषुप्ति अवस्था में अनुभव होने वाली सर्वज्ञ चेतना) स्वरूपा

prājña.en: the wisdom-self in deep sleep; the one who knows (Mandukya Upanishad term)
prājña.hi: प्राज्ञ; गहरी नींद का ज्ञानमय आत्मा (माण्डूक्य उपनिषद शब्द)

modern_context: प्राज्ञ वह चेतना है जो गहरी नींद में भी जागी रहती है। इसीलिए सोकर उठने पर हम कहते हैं 'बहुत अच्छी नींद आई', अर्थात् कोई जानने वाला था जो अनुभव कर रहा था। देवी प्राज्ञात्मिका वह साक्षी हैं जो सपने में भी, गहरी नींद में भी, और जागने पर भी हमेशा मौजूद हैं।
modern_context_en: Prajna is the consciousness that remains awake even in deep sleep. That is why upon waking we say 'I slept well', meaning someone was there who experienced it. Devi Prajnatmika is that witness present in dreams, in deep sleep, and in waking, always present.
nri_context: Even when exhaustion from double shifts abroad knocks you into unconsciousness, something within you remains aware. That ever-present awareness is Prājñātmikā.
usage_context: Chant during consciousness exploration, Mandukya Upanishad study, or before Yoga Nidra. Completes the consciousness-state series (names 259-263).

meaning_en: She who is the fourth state of consciousness, beyond waking, dreaming, and deep sleep
meaning_hi: तुरीय, जाग्रत, स्वप्न और सुषुप्ति से परे चौथी चेतना अवस्था

turyā.en: the fourth (state); pure consciousness beyond the three states
turyā.hi: तुरीय (चौथी अवस्था); तीनों अवस्थाओं से परे शुद्ध चेतना

modern_context: तुरीय माण्डूक्य उपनिषद का सबसे गहन सिद्धान्त है। यह वह अवस्था है जो जागने में भी है, सपने में भी, और गहरी नींद में भी, लेकिन तीनों से अलग है। ॐ का चौथा भाग (शून्य, silence) तुरीय का प्रतीक है। जब ॐ बोलें और अन्त में जो मौन रहे, वही तुरीय है।
modern_context_en: Turiya is the Mandukya Upanishad's most profound teaching. It is the state present in waking, dreaming, and deep sleep, yet distinct from all three. The fourth part of Om (silence after the sound) symbolizes Turiya. When you chant Om and the silence that follows is the gap, that silence is Turiya.
nri_context: In the silence between two time zones, two cultures, two identities, there exists a fourth space that is neither Indian nor foreign but simply awareness itself. That is Turiya.
usage_context: Chant during Om meditation, Mandukya Upanishad study, or when seeking the ultimate state of consciousness. The pinnacle name of the consciousness series (259-264).

meaning_en: She who transcends all states of consciousness entirely
meaning_hi: सभी चेतना अवस्थाओं (जाग्रत, स्वप्न, सुषुप्ति, तुरीय) से भी परे
modern_context: यह नाम कहता है कि देवी तुरीय से भी परे हैं। कुछ ग्रन्थ 'तुरीयातीत' (तुरीय से भी परे) की बात करते हैं। यह बुद्धि की सीमा से परे का क्षेत्र है। जब साधक सबसे गहरी अवस्था भी पार कर ले और 'अब कुछ नहीं बचा' का अनुभव हो, तब भी देवी और आगे हैं। यात्रा कभी समाप्त नहीं होती।
modern_context_en: This name says Devi is beyond even Turiya. Some texts speak of 'Turiyatita' (beyond the fourth). This is territory beyond the mind's capacity. When a practitioner crosses even the deepest state and feels 'nothing remains', Devi is still further ahead. The journey never ends.
nri_context: Just when you think you have 'figured out' life abroad and reached stability, this name whispers that there are always deeper layers of experience and growth awaiting you.
usage_context: Chant during the most advanced meditation, when all frameworks dissolve, or when contemplating infinity. The conclusive name of the consciousness series.

meaning_en: She who is the creator of the entire universe
meaning_hi: सम्पूर्ण सृष्टि की रचयित्री
modern_context: ब्रह्मा सृष्टिकर्ता माने जाते हैं, लेकिन देवी स्वयं सृष्टिकर्त्री हैं। हर माँ जब बच्चे को जन्म देती है, वह सृष्टिकर्त्री है। जब किसान बीज बोता है और फ़सल उगती है, वह भी सृष्टि है। जब कवि कविता लिखे या entrepreneur startup बनाए, वह भी सृष्टिकर्त्री शक्ति का प्रकटीकरण है।
modern_context_en: Brahma is considered the creator, but Devi herself is Srishtikatri. Every mother giving birth is Srishtikatri. When a farmer sows seeds and crops grow, that too is creation. When a poet writes a poem or an entrepreneur builds a startup, that is also Srishtikatri Shakti manifesting.
nri_context: Every new life you create abroad, a business, a community, a family, a garden, channels the same Sṛṣṭikartrī energy that created the cosmos.
usage_context: Chant during creative endeavours, childbirth, or when beginning any new project. Also during Brahma puja and on Akshaya Tritiya.

meaning_en: She who embodies the form of Brahma the creator
meaning_hi: ब्रह्मा (सृष्टिकर्ता) का रूप धारण करने वाली
modern_context: देवी स्वयं ब्रह्मा का रूप लेकर सृष्टि रचती हैं। Genetic science बताता है कि mitochondrial DNA केवल माँ से आता है, अर्थात् जैविक सृष्टि का मूल स्रोत स्त्री ही है। जब Biology की कक्षा में यह पढ़ें कि 'life comes from the mother', तो ब्रह्मरूपा देवी को याद करें।
modern_context_en: Devi herself takes Brahma's form to create. Genetic science reveals that mitochondrial DNA comes only from the mother, meaning the biological source of creation is the woman. When reading in Biology class that 'life comes from the mother', remember Brahmarupa Devi.
nri_context: When your child's science homework abroad touches on genetics and cellular biology, weaving in this name's teaching creates a bridge between laboratory knowledge and spiritual wisdom.
usage_context: Chant during creation-themed meditations, science-spirituality dialogues, or during Brahma puja. Also during IVF and fertility-related prayers.

meaning_en: She who protects and sustains all creation
meaning_hi: सम्पूर्ण सृष्टि की रक्षा और पालन करने वाली
modern_context: गोप्त्री का अर्थ है रक्षक और पालक दोनों। जैसे गोपालक गायों की रक्षा करता है, वैसे ही देवी सम्पूर्ण जीवों की रक्षा करती हैं। जब बच्चा पहली बार स्कूल जाए और माँ gate पर खड़ी रहे, वह गोप्त्री भाव है। जब सरकार नागरिकों की रक्षा करे, वह भी गोप्त्री का कार्य है।
modern_context_en: Goptri means both protector and sustainer. Just as a cowherd guards cows, Devi protects all beings. When a child goes to school for the first time and the mother stands at the gate watching, that is the Goptri spirit. When a government protects its citizens, that too is Goptri's work.
nri_context: When a senior community member abroad quietly helps newcomer immigrants settle in, find housing, and navigate bureaucracy, they are channelling the Goptrī energy for the diaspora.
usage_context: Chant when seeking protection for dependents, during guardian-related prayers, or when assuming a protective role. Also during Govardhan puja.

meaning_en: She who embodies the form of Govinda (Vishnu the preserver)
meaning_hi: गोविन्द (विष्णु, पालनकर्ता) का रूप धारण करने वाली

govinda.en: Govinda (Vishnu/Krishna; one who gives joy to the earth and senses)
govinda.hi: गोविन्द (विष्णु/कृष्ण; पृथ्वी और इन्द्रियों को आनन्द देने वाले)

rūpiṇī.en: embodiment of, in the form of

modern_context: गोविन्द कृष्ण का सबसे प्यारा नाम है। 'गोविन्द बोलो हरि गोपाल बोलो' यह भजन हर कृष्ण भक्त जानता है। लेकिन गोविन्दरूपिणी कहता है कि जिस कृष्ण को हम पुकारते हैं, वह भी देवी का ही रूप है। वैष्णव और शाक्त में कोई भेद नहीं, यही इस नाम का सन्देश है।
modern_context_en: Govinda is Krishna's most beloved name. 'Govinda Bolo Hari Gopal Bolo' is a bhajan every Krishna devotee knows. But Govindarupini says that the Krishna we call is also Devi's form. There is no difference between Vaishnava and Shakta; that is this name's message.
nri_context: When Vaishnava and Shakta families in the diaspora community argue whose deity is supreme, this name is the peacemaker: Govinda himself is Devi's form.
usage_context: Chant during Krishna bhajans, Janmashtami, or when bridging Vaishnava and Shakta traditions. Also during ecumenical Hindu gatherings.

meaning_en: She who is the power of cosmic dissolution and destruction
meaning_hi: ब्रह्माण्डीय संहार (विनाश और विलय) की शक्ति

saṃhāriṇī.en: the dissolver, she who performs cosmic dissolution
saṃhāriṇī.hi: संहार करने वाली, प्रलय करने वाली

modern_context: संहार विनाश नहीं, परिवर्तन है। पतझड़ में पत्ते गिरते हैं ताकि वसन्त में नए आएँ। जब पुरानी नौकरी छूटे, पुराना रिश्ता ख़त्म हो, या पुराना शहर छोड़ना पड़े, तो समझें कि संहारिणी देवी जगह बना रही हैं नए के लिए। हर ending एक beginning है।
modern_context_en: Samhara is not destruction but transformation. In autumn leaves fall so spring can bring new ones. When an old job ends, an old relationship concludes, or you must leave an old city, understand that Samharini Devi is making space for the new. Every ending is a beginning.
nri_context: When the chapter of life in one country closes and a new one opens, whether through deportation, relocation, or choice, Saṃhāriṇī is the cosmic editor who knows which chapters must end for the story to progress.
usage_context: Chant during life transitions, endings, or when accepting impermanence. Also during Rudra puja and Mahashivaratri. Completes the creation-preservation-destruction trinity (names 266-270).

meaning_en: She who embodies the form of Rudra, the fierce dissolver
meaning_hi: रुद्र (उग्र संहारक शिव) का रूप धारण करने वाली

rudra.en: Rudra (Shiva as the howling destroyer; one who makes enemies weep)
rudra.hi: रुद्र (उग्र शिव; शत्रुओं को रुलाने वाले)

modern_context: रुद्र शिव का सबसे उग्र रूप है जो प्रलय लाता है। लेकिन रुद्र का अर्थ 'रोदयति इति रुद्रः' भी है, जो रुलाता है। कभी-कभी देवी कठोर होती हैं ताकि हम सीखें। जब असफलता रुलाए, बीमारी तोड़े, या हानि तबाह करे, तो जानें कि रुद्ररूपा देवी कठोर प्रेम से सिखा रही हैं।
modern_context_en: Rudra is Shiva's fiercest form that brings dissolution. But Rudra also means 'one who makes you weep'. Sometimes Devi is harsh so we learn. When failure makes you cry, illness breaks you, or loss devastates, know that Rudrarupa Devi is teaching through tough love.
nri_context: When a devastating setback abroad, a failed business, a visa denial, a broken friendship, reduces you to tears, those tears are Rudra's teaching dissolving what no longer serves you.
usage_context: Chant during Rudra Abhishek, when facing harsh life lessons, or during Ekadasha Rudra puja. Completes the Brahma-Vishnu-Rudra trinity with names 267 and 269.

meaning_en: She who performs the cosmic act of concealment and veiling
meaning_hi: तिरोधान (आवरण, छिपाने) का कार्य करने वाली

tirodhāna.en: concealment, veiling, hiding (the fourth cosmic function)

modern_context: तिरोधान पाँचवें कार्य में चौथा है: सृष्टि, स्थिति, संहार, तिरोधान, अनुग्रह। तिरोधान का अर्थ है छिपाना। देवी सत्य को छिपाती हैं ताकि हम खोज करें। जैसे शिक्षक answer नहीं बताता ताकि बच्चा सोचे, वैसे ही देवी सत्य छिपाती हैं ताकि हम तलाश करें। UPSC का interview भी ऐसा ही है, सही उत्तर खोजना आपका काम है।
modern_context_en: Tirodhana is the fourth of five cosmic functions: creation, preservation, destruction, concealment, grace. Tirodhana means hiding. Devi conceals truth so we search for it. Just as a teacher does not reveal the answer so the child thinks, Devi hides truth so we seek. A UPSC interview works the same way: finding the right answer is your task.
nri_context: When the path forward abroad is unclear and every option seems hidden behind fog, this name reframes that confusion as divine concealment designed to sharpen your seeking.
usage_context: Chant when truth seems hidden, during philosophical inquiry, or when life's purpose feels obscured. Also during Maya-related meditation.

meaning_en: She who is the supreme sovereign, the feminine divine ruler
meaning_hi: सर्वोच्च ईश्वरी, परम शासिका

īśvarī.en: sovereign goddess, supreme ruler, the feminine of Ishvara
īśvarī.hi: ईश्वरी, परम शासिका, ईश्वर का स्त्रीलिंग

modern_context: ईश्वरी शब्द ईश्वर का स्त्रीलिंग है। जब हम कहते हैं 'ईश्वर' तो अनजाने में पुल्लिंग सोचते हैं, लेकिन परम सत्ता लिंग से परे है। इस नाम से सिखाएँ कि भगवान माँ भी हो सकती हैं। जब बच्चा पूछे 'God boy है या girl?', तो कहें 'God ईश्वरी भी हैं, माँ भी।'
modern_context_en: Ishvari is the feminine of Ishvara. When we say 'Ishvara' we unconsciously think masculine, but the supreme reality is beyond gender. Through this name, teach that God can be Mother too. When a child asks 'Is God a boy or a girl?', say 'God is also Ishvari, also Mother.'
nri_context: When your child growing up abroad in a predominantly Abrahamic culture asks why your God is female, this name is the proud answer: our supreme sovereign IS feminine.
usage_context: Chant during any divine invocation, gender-inclusive worship, or when teaching children about the feminine face of God. Universal name for all occasions.

meaning_en: She who embodies Sadashiva, the eternally auspicious one who bestows grace
meaning_hi: सदाशिव (शाश्वत कल्याणकारी, अनुग्रहकर्ता) का स्वरूप

śivā.en: auspicious, the gracious one (here: Sadashiva who performs anugraha/grace)
śivā.hi: शिव, मंगलकारी (यहाँ: सदाशिव जो अनुग्रह करते हैं)

modern_context: सदाशिव पाँच ब्रह्माओं में सर्वोच्च हैं जो अनुग्रह (कृपा) का कार्य करते हैं। अनुग्रह पाँचवाँ और अन्तिम कार्य है, अर्थात् सब कुछ बनाने, पालने, मिटाने, छिपाने के बाद अन्त में कृपा ही बचती है। जब जीवन के सारे उतार-चढ़ाव बीत जाएँ और अन्त में शान्ति मिले, वह सदाशिवा का अनुग्रह है।
modern_context_en: Sadashiva is the highest of the five Brahmas who performs anugraha (grace). Grace is the fifth and final cosmic function, meaning after creating, preserving, destroying, and concealing, ultimately only grace remains. When all of life's ups and downs pass and peace finally comes, that is Sadashiva's anugraha.
nri_context: After decades of immigrant struggle when you finally sit in your own home abroad with your family around you and think 'it was all worth it', that peace is Sadāśivā's grace arriving at last.
usage_context: Chant when experiencing unexpected grace, during gratitude meditation, or during Sadashiva puja. Completes the Pancha Brahma series (names 266-274).

meaning_en: She who bestows divine grace upon her devotees
meaning_hi: भक्तों को दिव्य अनुग्रह (कृपा) प्रदान करने वाली

anugraha.en: grace, blessing, favour, the fifth cosmic function

modern_context: अनुग्रह वह कृपा है जो बिना माँगे मिलती है। जब बारिश में भीगते हुए अचानक कोई अनजान छाता दे, या hospital में भर्ती होने पर कोई पुराना मित्र अचानक प्रकट हो, वह अनुग्रह है। देवी अनुग्रहदा हैं, वे बिना condition के, बिना माँगे कृपा बरसाती हैं।
modern_context_en: Anugraha is grace received without asking. When someone unknown offers an umbrella in the rain, or an old friend suddenly appears when you are hospitalized, that is anugraha. Devi is Anugrahada; she showers grace without conditions, without being asked.
nri_context: When a stranger abroad goes out of their way to help you in a moment of crisis without expecting anything in return, that selfless act is Anugrahadā flowing through a human vessel.
usage_context: Chant when expressing gratitude for unexpected blessings, during Guru Kripa meditation, or when seeking grace. Also during Diksha ceremonies where grace is transmitted.

meaning_en: She whose command governs the entire universe
meaning_hi: जिनकी आज्ञा (आदेश) से सम्पूर्ण ब्रह्माण्ड चलता है
modern_context: सूर्य समय पर उगता है, ऋतुएँ बदलती हैं, गुरुत्वाकर्षण काम करता है, सब देवी की आज्ञा से होता है। Newton ने gravity 'खोजी' लेकिन gravity बनाने वाली देवी की आज्ञा है। जब प्रकृति के नियम इतने सटीक हैं कि satellite launch हो सकता है, तो समझें कि देवी की आज्ञा कितनी precise है।
modern_context_en: The sun rises on time, seasons change, gravity works, all by Devi's command. Newton 'discovered' gravity but the one who created gravity is Devi's command. When nature's laws are so precise that satellites can be launched, understand how precise Devi's command is.
nri_context: When flight schedules, tax deadlines, and immigration rules seem to run your life abroad with mechanical precision, this name reveals the divine command behind all systems and structures.
usage_context: Chant when surrendering to divine will, during Ajna Chakra meditation, or when accepting that some things are beyond personal control. Also during Ishvara Pranidhana practice.

meaning_en: She who never fails to fulfil her promises and proclamations
meaning_hi: अपनी प्रतिज्ञाओं (वचनों) को कभी भंग न करने वाली

naṭakīraṭā.en: one who enacts, who performs unfailingly

modern_context: देवी ने वचन दिया है कि जो भक्त शरण में आए, उसकी रक्षा होगी। यह वचन कभी टूटता नहीं। जब भगवान राम ने कहा 'मैं शरणागत की रक्षा करूँगा' और विभीषण को शरण दी, वही प्रतिज्ञा-पालन है। जब आप किसी को वचन दें तो निभाएँ, क्योंकि वचन-भंग सबसे बड़ा पाप है।
modern_context_en: Devi has promised that whoever comes to her refuge will be protected. This promise never breaks. When Lord Rama said 'I will protect those who surrender' and gave shelter to Vibhishana, that was pratijña-palana. When you make a promise, keep it, because breaking a vow is the greatest sin.
nri_context: When you promised your parents you would take care of them from abroad, or promised your child a trip to India, keeping that word is your personal pratijñā-pālana.
usage_context: Chant when making solemn vows, during sankalpa ceremonies, or when seeking strength to keep promises. Also during Satya (truth) practice.

meaning_en: She who is delighted by the devoted recitation of her names
meaning_hi: अपने नामों के भक्तिपूर्ण पारायण (पाठ) से प्रसन्न होने वाली
modern_context: यह नाम स्वयं इस साधना को मान्यता देता है जो आप अभी कर रहे हैं: ललिता सहस्रनाम का पारायण। देवी को सबसे अधिक प्रसन्नता तब होती है जब भक्त उनके नामों का पाठ करे। न बड़ा हवन चाहिए, न महँगा चढ़ावा, बस नामों का प्रेमपूर्वक पाठ। शुक्रवार को ललिता सहस्रनाम का पाठ विशेष फलदायी है।
modern_context_en: This name validates the very practice you are doing right now: reciting the Lalita Sahasranama. Devi is most pleased when devotees recite her names. No grand havan is needed, no expensive offerings, just loving recitation of names. Reciting Lalita Sahasranama on Fridays is especially fruitful.
nri_context: When elaborate puja is impossible abroad but you can play a Sahasranama recording during your commute or read these names before bed, Devi is equally prītā with that simple devotion.
usage_context: Chant as a meta-name during Sahasranama recitation itself. Also when establishing a daily Nama Parayana practice or encouraging others to begin.

meaning_en: She who is the sacred knowledge that brings supreme joy
meaning_hi: परम आनन्द देने वाली पवित्र विद्या

nandi.en: joy, bliss; also Nandi (Shiva's bull-vehicle who taught this vidya)
nandi.hi: आनन्द; नन्दी (शिव का वाहन जिन्होंने यह विद्या सिखाई)

modern_context: नन्दिविद्या वह ज्ञान है जो आनन्द देता है। आज बहुत सा ज्ञान चिन्ता देता है, news पढ़ो तो depression, social media देखो तो comparison। लेकिन सच्ची विद्या वह है जो पढ़ने-सुनने से ही आनन्द दे। रामायण सुनकर, गीता पढ़कर, या सहस्रनाम का पाठ करके जो शान्ति मिलती है, वही नन्दिविद्या है।
modern_context_en: Nandividya is knowledge that brings joy. Much of today's knowledge brings anxiety: reading news causes depression, social media creates comparison. But true vidya is that which gives joy just by hearing or reading. The peace from listening to Ramayana, reading Gita, or reciting Sahasranama is Nandividya.
nri_context: When doomscrolling abroad leaves you anxious and switching to a Sahasranama audio instantly calms you, you have experienced the difference between information and Nandividyā.
usage_context: Chant when seeking joyful learning, during scripture study, or when replacing anxiety-inducing media with uplifting content. Also during Nandi puja.

meaning_en: She who is the sovereign of the cosmic dance
meaning_hi: नृत्य (ब्रह्माण्डीय नटन) की ईश्वरी
modern_context: नटराज शिव का नृत्य रूप है, नटेश्वरी उसका स्त्री रूप। शास्त्रीय नृत्य में 'नृत्ता' (pure dance), 'नृत्य' (expressive dance) और 'नाट्य' (drama) तीनों विधाएँ देवी की ही अभिव्यक्ति हैं। जब भरतनाट्यम की छात्रा अरंगेत्रम में पहली बार मंच पर नाचे, वह नटेश्वरी का आह्वान है।
modern_context_en: Nataraja is Shiva's dancing form, Nateshvari is its feminine counterpart. In classical dance, Nritta (pure dance), Nritya (expressive dance), and Natya (drama) are all Devi's expressions. When a Bharatanatyam student dances on stage for the first time at arangetram, it is invoking Nateshvari.
nri_context: Enrolling your child in Bharatanatyam or Kathak classes abroad keeps Nateshvari's tradition alive, ensuring the cosmic dance continues even on foreign stages.
usage_context: Chant before dance performances, during Nataraja puja, or when celebrating the performing arts. Also during Arangetram and dance festivals.

meaning_en: She who is the embodiment of sacred merit and virtue
meaning_hi: पुण्य (पवित्र सद्कर्म) का साक्षात् स्वरूप
modern_context: पुण्य अच्छे कर्मों का संचित फल है। दान देना, सेवा करना, सत्य बोलना, ये सब पुण्य कर्म हैं। जब गाय को रोटी खिलाएँ, भिखारी को भोजन दें, या मन्दिर में झाड़ू लगाएँ, वह पुण्य है। देवी स्वयं पुण्य हैं, अर्थात् उनका नाम लेना भी पुण्य कर्म है।
modern_context_en: Punya is the accumulated merit of good deeds. Giving charity, serving others, speaking truth, all are punya karmas. Feeding a cow rotis, giving food to a beggar, or sweeping the temple floor is punya. Devi herself is Punya, meaning even taking her name is a meritorious act.
nri_context: Volunteering at a food bank abroad, donating to Indian causes, or helping a fellow immigrant settle in are all punya karmas that this name sanctifies regardless of geography.
usage_context: Chant during charitable activities, seva, or when accumulating spiritual merit. Also during Punya Kala (auspicious time) calculations.

meaning_en: She whose fame itself is sacred and purifying
meaning_hi: जिनकी कीर्ति (यश) स्वयं पवित्र और शुद्धिकारक है
modern_context: देवी की कीर्ति सुनने मात्र से पुण्य मिलता है। इसीलिए सत्संग और कथा का इतना महत्त्व है। जब दादी रात को सोते समय देवी की कहानी सुनाती हैं, बच्चे को बिना जाने पुण्य मिल रहा है। Podcast पर Devi Mahatmya सुनना भी पुण्यकीर्ति का श्रवण है।
modern_context_en: Simply hearing Devi's glory earns punya. That is why satsang and katha are so important. When a grandmother tells Devi's story at bedtime, the child unknowingly earns merit. Listening to Devi Mahatmya on a podcast is also hearing Punyakirti.
nri_context: Playing devotional stories for your children during car rides abroad, where every commute becomes a mobile satsang, is a modern way of spreading Puṇyakīrti.
usage_context: Chant during katha, satsang, or when listening to devotional content. Also when sharing Devi's stories with others.

meaning_en: She whose hearing and singing is itself a sacred meritorious act
meaning_hi: जिनका श्रवण (सुनना) और कीर्तन (गाना) स्वयं पुण्य कर्म है
modern_context: नवधा भक्ति में श्रवण (सुनना) और कीर्तन (गाना) पहली दो भक्ति हैं। Spotify या YouTube पर देवी भजन सुनना श्रवण भक्ति है, और bathroom में नहाते हुए भजन गुनगुनाना कीर्तन भक्ति। दोनों पुण्य कर्म हैं। भक्ति के लिए मन्दिर जाना ज़रूरी नहीं, कान और आवाज़ काफ़ी हैं।
modern_context_en: In Navadha Bhakti, Shravana (hearing) and Kirtana (singing) are the first two forms of devotion. Listening to Devi bhajans on Spotify or YouTube is Shravana Bhakti, and humming bhajans while bathing is Kirtana Bhakti. Both are meritorious. For devotion, going to a temple is not necessary; ears and voice are enough.
nri_context: When your morning commute playlist abroad alternates between Bollywood and Bhajans, every moment spent listening to the divine is punya that this name validates.
usage_context: Chant when beginning bhajan practice, during kirtan, or when listening to devotional music. Also when encouraging others to start their own Shravana-Kirtana practice.

meaning_en: She who is worshipped by Pulomaja (Indrani, queen of the gods)
meaning_hi: पुलोमजा (इन्द्राणी, देवरानी) द्वारा पूजित

pulomajā.en: Pulomaja (Indrani/Shachi, daughter of Puloma, wife of Indra)
pulomajā.hi: पुलोमजा (इन्द्राणी/शची, पुलोम की पुत्री, इन्द्र की पत्नी)

modern_context: इन्द्राणी देवलोक की रानी हैं और वे भी ललिता देवी की उपासना करती हैं। यह बताता है कि चाहे कितनी भी शक्तिशाली स्त्री हो, वह भी देवी के सामने विनम्र है। जब कोई powerful woman boss, minister, या CEO हो और फिर भी मन्दिर में हाथ जोड़कर खड़ी हो, वह पुलोमजार्चिता का भाव है।
modern_context_en: Indrani is the queen of the gods, and even she worships Lalita Devi. This shows that no matter how powerful a woman is, she bows before Devi. When a powerful woman, a boss, minister, or CEO, stands with folded hands at the temple, that is the spirit of Pulomajarchita.
nri_context: When a successful Indian woman abroad who runs a Fortune 500 company still touches her mother's feet on video call and does aarti every morning, she embodies this name.
usage_context: Chant when honouring powerful women who remain humble, during Indrani puja, or when seeking the balance of power and devotion.

meaning_en: She who liberates from all forms of bondage
meaning_hi: सभी प्रकार के बन्धनों से मुक्त करने वाली
modern_context: बन्धन कई प्रकार के हैं: क़र्ज़ का बन्धन, बुरी आदतों का बन्धन, toxic relationship का बन्धन, addiction का बन्धन। देवी बन्धमोचनी सबसे मुक्त करती हैं। जब smoking छोड़ना हो, social media की लत तोड़नी हो, या किसी ज़हरीले रिश्ते से बाहर निकलना हो, तो इस नाम का 108 बार जाप करें।
modern_context_en: Bondage comes in many forms: debt bondage, bad habits, toxic relationships, addiction. Devi Bandhamochani liberates from all of them. When you need to quit smoking, break social media addiction, or exit a toxic relationship, chant this name 108 times.
nri_context: When the golden handcuffs of a high-paying but soul-crushing job abroad keep you trapped, or when immigration status chains you to an abusive employer, this name is the key to liberation.
usage_context: Chant during addiction recovery, when seeking freedom from any bondage, or during Moksha-focused sadhana. Also during Bandha-Vimochana pujas.

meaning_en: She who has beautifully curled and wavy hair
meaning_hi: सुन्दर घुँघराले और लहराते केशों वाली
modern_context: भारतीय सौन्दर्य में सीधे और घुँघराले दोनों बालों की अपनी शोभा है। देवी के बाल लहराते और घुँघराले हैं जो स्वतन्त्रता और प्रकृति का प्रतीक हैं। जब लड़कियाँ अपने natural curls को straighten करें 'सुन्दर दिखने के लिए', तो बताएँ कि देवी स्वयं बर्बरालका हैं, curly hair divine है।
modern_context_en: In Indian beauty, both straight and curly hair have their own grace. Devi's hair is wavy and curled, symbolizing freedom and nature. When girls straighten their natural curls to 'look beautiful', tell them Devi herself is Barbaralaka; curly hair is divine.
nri_context: When beauty standards abroad or in India pressure you to chemically straighten your curly hair, this name celebrates your natural texture as a reflection of the Goddess herself.
usage_context: Chant during hair-care rituals, when celebrating natural beauty, or during Devi shringar puja. Also when combating beauty stereotypes.

meaning_en: She who embodies Vimarsha, the self-reflective power of consciousness
meaning_hi: विमर्श (चेतना की आत्म-चिन्तनशील शक्ति) का स्वरूप

vimarśa.en: self-reflective awareness, the dynamic aspect of consciousness (Kashmir Shaivism term)
vimarśa.hi: विमर्श, आत्म-चिन्तनशील चेतना, चेतना का गतिशील पक्ष (कश्मीर शैव दर्शन)

modern_context: कश्मीर शैवदर्शन में प्रकाश (awareness) और विमर्श (self-reflection) दो मूल तत्त्व हैं। प्रकाश शिव है और विमर्श शक्ति। विमर्श का अर्थ है 'मैं हूँ' यह जानने की शक्ति। जब आत्मचिन्तन करें, diary लिखें, या therapy में अपने विचारों को समझें, वह विमर्श है।
modern_context_en: In Kashmir Shaivism, Prakasha (awareness) and Vimarsha (self-reflection) are the two fundamental principles. Prakasha is Shiva and Vimarsha is Shakti. Vimarsha means the power of knowing 'I am'. When you practise self-reflection, journal writing, or understand your thoughts in therapy, that is Vimarsha.
nri_context: The deep self-reflection that immigration forces upon you, 'who am I without my culture, my language, my family nearby?' is Vimarsha Shakti working to reveal your essential self.
usage_context: Chant during journaling, therapy, self-inquiry, or Kashmir Shaivism study. Also during Pratyabhijna (recognition) meditation.

meaning_en: She who is knowledge itself in its purest form
meaning_hi: शुद्धतम रूप में विद्या (ज्ञान) स्वरूपा
modern_context: विद्या दो प्रकार की है: अपरा विद्या (worldly knowledge) और परा विद्या (spiritual knowledge)। Engineering, medicine, law सब अपरा विद्या हैं। आत्मज्ञान परा विद्या है। दोनों ज़रूरी हैं। IIT पढ़कर bridge बनाओ (अपरा) और गीता पढ़कर स्वयं को जानो (परा)। देवी दोनों विद्याओं का स्रोत हैं।
modern_context_en: Vidya is of two types: Apara Vidya (worldly knowledge) and Para Vidya (spiritual knowledge). Engineering, medicine, law are all Apara Vidya. Self-knowledge is Para Vidya. Both are needed. Study at IIT to build bridges (Apara) and read Gita to know yourself (Para). Devi is the source of both.
nri_context: Collecting degrees abroad is Apara Vidya, but the moment you ask 'what is all this for?' you have stepped onto the path of Para Vidya that this name represents.
usage_context: Chant during any learning activity, on Saraswati puja, or during Vidyarambha ceremony. The most fundamental name for all students and seekers.

meaning_en: She who gave birth to the universe beginning with space (akasha)
meaning_hi: आकाश से लेकर सम्पूर्ण जगत् को जन्म देने वाली
modern_context: पञ्च महाभूत (आकाश, वायु, अग्नि, जल, पृथ्वी) का क्रम आकाश से शुरू होता है। Big Bang theory भी कहती है कि सबसे पहले space आया। देवी ने आकाश से शुरू करके सम्पूर्ण जगत् को जन्म दिया। जब बच्चा science में elements पढ़े, तो बताएँ कि भारतीय दर्शन ने हज़ारों साल पहले पञ्च तत्त्व बताए थे।
modern_context_en: The five great elements (Akasha, Vayu, Agni, Jala, Prithvi) begin with Akasha. Big Bang theory also says space came first. Devi gave birth to the entire universe starting from Akasha. When a child studies elements in science, tell them Indian philosophy described the five elements thousands of years ago.
nri_context: When your child's science class abroad teaches the Big Bang, you can connect it to this name: the Mother who birthed space itself, long before any telescope confirmed it.
usage_context: Chant during Pancha Bhuta meditation, cosmology discussions, or when teaching children about the elements. Also during Akasha Tattva sadhana.

meaning_en: She who cures and pacifies all diseases
meaning_hi: सभी रोगों को शान्त करने और ठीक करने वाली

praśamanī.hi: शान्त करने वाली, ठीक करने वाली

modern_context: COVID-19 ने पूरी दुनिया को सिखाया कि स्वास्थ्य सबसे बड़ा धन है। जब ICU में ventilator पर हों या cancer का diagnosis मिले, तो इस नाम का जाप करें। Dhanvantari (आयुर्वेद के देव) भी देवी की शक्ति से ही चिकित्सा करते हैं। Doctor का इलाज लें और साथ में इस नाम का जाप करें, दोनों मिलकर चमत्कार करते हैं।
modern_context_en: COVID-19 taught the entire world that health is the greatest wealth. When on a ventilator in ICU or receiving a cancer diagnosis, chant this name. Dhanvantari (god of Ayurveda) too heals through Devi's power. Take the doctor's treatment AND chant this name; together they work miracles.
nri_context: When navigating an unfamiliar healthcare system abroad during a health crisis, this name brings divine healing energy to supplement whatever medical treatment you receive.
usage_context: Chant during illness, before surgery, or alongside medical treatment. Also during Dhanvantari puja and Ayurveda Day celebrations.

meaning_en: She who wards off all forms of death, including untimely death
meaning_hi: सभी प्रकार की मृत्यु (अकालमृत्यु सहित) से बचाने वाली
modern_context: अकालमृत्यु (untimely death) सबसे बड़ा भय है। Road accidents, heart attacks, drowning, ये सब अकालमृत्यु हैं। महामृत्युंजय मन्त्र शिव का है, लेकिन सर्वमृत्युनिवारिणी देवी का नाम है। जब बच्चे बाहर जाएँ या परिवार यात्रा पर निकले, तो इस नाम का जाप करके भेजें।
modern_context_en: Untimely death is the greatest fear. Road accidents, heart attacks, drowning are all untimely deaths. Mahamrityunjaya mantra belongs to Shiva, but Sarvamrityunivarini is Devi's name. When children go out or the family starts a journey, send them off with this name's chanting.
nri_context: Before every road trip, flight, or even your child's school bus ride abroad, a silent recitation of this name wraps your family in the divine protection against untimely harm.
usage_context: Chant before travel, during health scares, or alongside Maha Mrityunjaya japa. Also during Yamuna puja and longevity rituals.

meaning_en: She who is foremost, counted first among all
meaning_hi: सबसे आगे, सबमें प्रथम गिनी जाने वाली

gaṇyā.hi: गिनी जाने वाली, मानी जाने वाली

modern_context: अग्रगण्य का अर्थ है सबसे पहले गिने जाने योग्य। Class में first rank, office में top performer, खेल में champion, सब अग्रगण्य हैं। लेकिन देवी सबसे अग्रगण्य हैं, किसी भी श्रेणी में, किसी भी क्षेत्र में। JEE AIR 1 हो या Olympic gold medalist, सबसे ऊपर देवी हैं।
