modern_context_en: Agraganya means counted first. First rank in class, top performer at office, champion in sports, all are agraganya. But Devi is the most agraganya, in any category, in any field. Whether JEE AIR 1 or Olympic gold medalist, above all is Devi.
nri_context: When you are the first in your family to go abroad, first to get a degree, first to break a barrier, that pioneering spirit channels Agragaṇyā's energy of being foremost.
usage_context: Chant when aspiring to be first, during competitive preparations, or when celebrating being a pioneer. Also during Prathama (first) puja rituals.

meaning_en: She whose form is beyond all thought and conception
meaning_hi: जिनका रूप चिन्तन और कल्पना से परे है
modern_context: मन जो सोच सकता है, उससे देवी बड़ी हैं। जैसे चींटी समुद्र की कल्पना नहीं कर सकती, वैसे ही मनुष्य देवी के पूर्ण रूप की कल्पना नहीं कर सकता। यही कारण है कि हम मूर्ति बनाते हैं, क्योंकि अचिन्त्य को सीमित रूप में देखना आसान है। लेकिन मूर्ति अन्तिम सत्य नहीं, द्वार है।
modern_context_en: Devi is greater than anything the mind can conceive. Just as an ant cannot imagine the ocean, a human cannot imagine Devi's complete form. This is why we make murtis, because it is easier to see the inconceivable in a limited form. But the murti is not the final truth; it is a doorway.
nri_context: When explaining Hindu worship to foreign colleagues, this name gives the perfect answer: 'We know God is beyond imagination, and the murti is our way of approaching the unimaginable.'
usage_context: Chant during philosophical discourse, when explaining murti puja to others, or during meditation on the formless. Also during Nirguna-Saguna contemplation.

meaning_en: She who destroys the sins and impurities of the Kali Yuga
meaning_hi: कलियुग के पापों और अशुद्धियों का नाश करने वाली

kali.en: Kali Yuga (the current age of darkness and decline)
kali.hi: कलियुग (वर्तमान अन्धकार और पतन का युग)

modern_context: कलियुग में भ्रष्टाचार, हिंसा, अधर्म बढ़ता है। लेकिन कलियुग का एक वरदान है: केवल नाम जाप से मुक्ति मिलती है। सतयुग में वर्षों का तप चाहिए था, कलियुग में बस सच्चे दिल से 'माँ' बोलना काफ़ी है। देवी कलिकल्मषनाशिनी इस युग के लिए विशेष रूप से करुणामय हैं।
modern_context_en: In Kali Yuga, corruption, violence, and adharma increase. But Kali Yuga has one boon: liberation comes through mere name-chanting. Sat Yuga required years of tapas; Kali Yuga requires just a sincere 'Maa'. Devi Kalikalmashanashini is especially compassionate for this age.
nri_context: When the moral decay you see in news from both India and abroad makes you despair about Kali Yuga, this name is the specific antidote designed for exactly this era.
usage_context: Chant in the current age as a specific remedy for Kali Yuga's ills, during Kaliyuga-related discourses, or when feeling overwhelmed by world events. Also during Naam Sankirtan.

meaning_en: She who is Katyayani, born in the hermitage of sage Katyayana
meaning_hi: कात्यायनी, ऋषि कात्यायन के आश्रम में अवतरित

kātyāyanī.en: daughter of sage Katyayana; the sixth form of Navadurga; worshipped for marriage
kātyāyanī.hi: ऋषि कात्यायन की पुत्री; नवदुर्गा का छठा रूप; विवाह के लिए पूजित

modern_context: कात्यायनी नवदुर्गा का छठा रूप हैं जिनकी पूजा नवरात्रि के छठे दिन होती है। गोपियों ने कात्यायनी व्रत किया था कृष्ण को पति रूप में पाने के लिए। आज भी अविवाहित लड़कियाँ इस व्रत को करती हैं। जब विवाह में देरी हो या सही जीवनसाथी न मिले, तो कात्यायनी व्रत करें।
modern_context_en: Katyayani is the sixth form of Navadurga, worshipped on Navratri's sixth day. The gopis performed Katyayani Vrat to obtain Krishna as their husband. Unmarried girls still observe this vrat today. When marriage is delayed or the right partner is not found, perform Katyayani Vrat.
nri_context: When finding a compatible partner abroad within the Indian community feels impossible, or when parents worry about a child's delayed marriage, Katyayani Vrat bridges the divine with the practical.
usage_context: Chant on Navratri's sixth day, during Katyayani Vrat for marriage, or when seeking a life partner. One of the most widely worshipped forms of Devi.

meaning_en: She who conquers and destroys time itself
meaning_hi: काल (समय, मृत्यु) का वध करने वाली

kāla.en: time; also death (since death is time's ultimate act)
kāla.hi: काल, समय; मृत्यु भी (क्योंकि मृत्यु काल का अन्तिम कार्य है)

modern_context: काल सबसे शक्तिशाली शक्ति है, सबको खा जाता है। लेकिन देवी कालहन्त्री काल को भी मार सकती हैं। महाकालेश्वर ज्योतिर्लिंग में शिव महाकाल हैं, और देवी महाकाली काल की भी काल हैं। जब उम्र बढ़ने का भय सताए, तो जानें कि आत्मा कालातीत है, जैसे देवी कालहन्त्री।
modern_context_en: Time is the most powerful force; it devours everything. But Devi Kalahantri can slay even time. At Mahakaleshwar Jyotirlinga, Shiva is Mahakal, and Devi Mahakali is the death of death itself. When the fear of ageing haunts, know the soul is beyond time, like Devi Kalahantri.
nri_context: When years abroad slip by and you suddenly realize a decade has passed, the fear of lost time dissolves under this name's teaching that Devi has conquered time itself.
usage_context: Chant when fearing ageing or mortality, during Mahakali puja, or on Kalaratri (Navratri's seventh night). Also during Mahashivaratri.

meaning_en: She who has beautiful lotus-shaped eyes
meaning_hi: कमल के आकार की सुन्दर आँखों वाली
modern_context: कमलाक्षी मंगलौर का प्रसिद्ध मन्दिर है जहाँ देवी की कमल-नयन मूर्ति अद्भुत है। कमल की तरह खिली आँखें करुणा और प्रेम की प्रतीक हैं। जब माँ की आँखें बच्चे को देखकर भर आएँ, या गुरु की दृष्टि शिष्य पर पड़े, वह कमलाक्षी दृष्टि है। आँखों में प्रेम का कमल खिलना ही सच्चा सौन्दर्य है।
modern_context_en: Kamalakshi temple in Mangalore is famous for its lotus-eyed murti. Lotus-like open eyes symbolize compassion and love. When a mother's eyes fill with tears seeing her child, or a guru's gaze falls upon a disciple, that is Kamalakshi's vision. A lotus blooming in the eyes through love is true beauty.
nri_context: When you video-call your mother in India and her eyes light up the moment she sees your face on screen, that across-the-ocean sparkle is Kamalākṣī's tender gaze.
usage_context: Chant when seeking Devi's compassionate gaze, during Kamalakshi temple worship, or during Netra (eye) Kriya meditation. Also during Lotus offering pujas.

meaning_en: She whose arms are as graceful and wish-fulfilling as the celestial Kalpavalli creeper
meaning_hi: कल्पवल्ली (इच्छापूर्ति की स्वर्गीय बेल) के समान सुन्दर और वरदायिनी भुजाओं वाली

kalpavallī.en: Kalpavalli (the wish-fulfilling celestial creeper, divine vine)
kalpavallī.hi: कल्पवल्ली (मनोकामना पूर्ण करने वाली स्वर्गीय बेल)

modern_context: कल्पवृक्ष (wish-fulfilling tree) और कल्पवल्ली (wish-fulfilling creeper) स्वर्ग के हैं। देवी की भुजाएँ उसी कल्पवल्ली के समान हैं। जब माँ बच्चे को गले लगाती हैं तो उनकी बाहें हर इच्छा पूरी करती हैं, सुरक्षा, प्रेम, शान्ति। गोद में बैठे बच्चे के लिए माँ की बाहें ही कल्पवल्ली हैं।
modern_context_en: Kalpavriksha (wish-fulfilling tree) and Kalpavalli (wish-fulfilling creeper) belong to heaven. Devi's arms are like that Kalpavalli. When a mother embraces her child, her arms fulfil every wish: security, love, peace. For a child in the lap, mother's arms are the Kalpavalli.
nri_context: When your child runs to hug you after a long workday abroad and whispers 'I missed you', your embrace becomes the Kalpavallī that fulfils their deepest need.
usage_context: Chant when embracing loved ones, during blessing ceremonies, or when seeking wish-fulfilment. Also during Kalpavriksha meditation and Akshaya Tritiya.

meaning_en: She who is like Kamadhenu, fulfilling all desires of her devotees
meaning_hi: कामधेनु के समान भक्तों की सभी इच्छाएँ पूर्ण करने वाली

dughā.en: milker, one who yields (like a cow yielding milk)
dughā.hi: दुहने वाली, देने वाली (जैसे गाय दूध देती है)

modern_context: कामधेनु स्वर्ग की गाय है जो हर इच्छा पूर्ण करती है। देवी कामदुघा उसी गाय के समान हैं। लेकिन गाय तभी दूध देती है जब प्रेम से सेवा करें। देवी भी तभी कामना पूर्ण करती हैं जब भक्ति सच्ची हो। गोपाष्टमी पर गाय की पूजा करते समय इस नाम का विशेष स्मरण करें।
modern_context_en: Kamadhenu is heaven's cow that fulfils every wish. Devi Kamadugha is like that very cow. But a cow yields milk only when served with love. Devi too fulfils wishes only when devotion is sincere. During Gopashtami when worshipping cows, especially remember this name.
nri_context: When you cannot find a cow to worship on Gopashtami abroad, remembering Kamadughā Devi while offering milk to her murti carries the same devotional energy.
usage_context: Chant when seeking wish-fulfilment, during Gopashtami, or during Kamadhenu puja. Also during Go-puja (cow worship) and dairy-related Ayurvedic rituals.

meaning_en: She who can assume any form according to her will
meaning_hi: अपनी इच्छानुसार कोई भी रूप धारण करने में समर्थ

kāma.en: desire, will (here: at will, as desired)

modern_context: देवी कामरूपिणी हैं, वे चाहें तो दुर्गा बनें, लक्ष्मी बनें, सरस्वती बनें, या एक साधारण माँ के रूप में आपके घर में आएँ। कामरूप (असम) का प्राचीन नाम देवी के इसी नाम से आया है। जब मन्दिर में अलग-अलग देवी दिखें, तो जानें कि सब एक ही कामरूपिणी के रूप हैं। यह 300वाँ नाम एक सुन्दर milestone है।
modern_context_en: Devi is Kamarupini; she can become Durga, Lakshmi, Saraswati, or appear as an ordinary mother in your home. The ancient name of Kamrup (Assam) comes from this very name. When you see different goddesses at temples, know they are all forms of one Kamarupini. This 300th name is a beautiful milestone.
nri_context: When Devi appears as a kind stranger, a supportive colleague, or even a pet that comforts you in your loneliest abroad moments, she is exercising her Kāmarūpiṇī power, taking whatever form serves your need.
usage_context: Chant when contemplating Devi's many forms, during Kamakhya temple worship, or when recognizing Devi in unexpected places. A milestone 300th name celebrating divine versatility.

meaning_en: She who possesses the strength of divine desire and cosmic will
meaning_hi: दिव्य इच्छाशक्ति और ब्रह्माण्डीय संकल्प का बल रखने वाली
modern_context: इच्छाशक्ति (willpower) सबसे बड़ी शक्ति है। Gym जाने की इच्छा है लेकिन बल नहीं, पढ़ने की इच्छा है लेकिन आलस्य जीतता है। कामबला वह शक्ति है जो इच्छा को कर्म में बदल दे। IAS topper जिसने 5 साल लगातार पढ़ा, उसकी willpower कामबला की कृपा है।
modern_context_en: Willpower is the greatest strength. You want to go to the gym but lack the drive, want to study but laziness wins. Kamabala is the power that transforms desire into action. The IAS topper who studied for 5 consecutive years draws willpower from Kamabala's grace.
nri_context: The sheer willpower required to learn a new language, adapt to a foreign culture, and rebuild your career from scratch abroad is Kāmabalā expressing through you.
usage_context: Chant when willpower is weak, during New Year resolutions, or when motivation is needed. Also during Sankalpa Shakti meditation.

root_word: deva + ṛṣi + gaṇa + saṃghāta + stūyamāna + ātma + vaibhava
meaning_en: She whose inherent glory is hymned by assemblies of gods and sages
meaning_hi: देवताओं और ऋषियों के समूहों द्वारा स्तुति किए जाने वाले आत्मवैभव वाली
modern_context: यह नाम इस श्रेणी में दोबारा आता है (पहले 64 पर भी) लेकिन अलग सन्दर्भ में। यहाँ 'आत्मवैभव' पर ज़ोर है, अर्थात् देवी की महिमा बाहर से नहीं आती, भीतर से है। जैसे हीरा अपनी चमक अन्दर से लाता है, वैसे ही देवी का वैभव स्वयंसिद्ध है। सच्ची प्रतिभा को विज्ञापन की ज़रूरत नहीं।
modern_context_en: This name appears again (earlier at 64) but in different context. Here the emphasis is on 'atma-vaibhava', meaning Devi's glory comes from within, not outside. Just as a diamond brings its shine from within, Devi's magnificence is self-evident. True talent needs no advertisement.
nri_context: When you achieve something significant abroad without connections or privilege, purely on your own merit, that self-evident excellence is ātma-vaibhava that even strangers cannot help but acknowledge.
usage_context: Chant when recognizing inner worth, during self-confidence building, or when inherent talent needs no external validation. Also during collective worship.

meaning_en: She who bestows boons and blessings to her devotees
meaning_hi: भक्तों को वर (आशीर्वाद) प्रदान करने वाली
modern_context: वरद मुद्रा (दान देने का हाथ नीचे की ओर) देवी की सबसे प्रसिद्ध मुद्रा है। हर मन्दिर में देवी का एक हाथ वरद मुद्रा में होता है। जब नवरात्रि पर कन्या पूजन करें और छोटी बालिकाओं को उपहार दें, तो आप स्वयं वरदा बन रहे हैं। देना ही सबसे बड़ा वरदान है।
modern_context_en: Varada Mudra (the boon-granting hand pointing downward) is Devi's most famous mudra. In every temple, one of Devi's hands is in Varada Mudra. When performing Kanya Pujan during Navratri and giving gifts to little girls, you yourself become Varada. Giving is the greatest boon.
nri_context: When you sponsor a child's education in India from abroad or fund a community project without expecting anything back, your hand becomes Devi's Varada Mudra reaching across oceans.
usage_context: Chant when seeking blessings, during Kanya Pujan, or when practising generosity. Also during Varada Mudra meditation and charitable activities.

meaning_en: She who has beautiful, bewitching eyes
meaning_hi: सुन्दर और मोहक नेत्रों वाली
modern_context: वाम का अर्थ सुन्दर भी है और बायाँ भी। शिव के बायें भाग में शक्ति विराजती हैं (वामांगी)। देवी की आँखें इतनी सुन्दर हैं कि देखने वाला मोहित हो जाता है। जब नवजात शिशु पहली बार आँखें खोले और माँ को देखे, उन आँखों में वही वामनयना मोह है।
modern_context_en: Vama means both beautiful and left. Shakti resides in Shiva's left half (Vamangi). Devi's eyes are so beautiful that the beholder is captivated. When a newborn opens eyes for the first time and looks at the mother, those eyes carry the same Vamanayana enchantment.
nri_context: When your baby born abroad opens their eyes and you see India's entire legacy reflected in those tiny irises, you witness Vāmanayanā's beauty passing through generations.
usage_context: Chant when seeking Devi's enchanting gaze, during Netra puja, or during birth celebrations. Also during Saundarya Lahari recitation.

meaning_en: She who is gently intoxicated with the divine wine of bliss
meaning_hi: दिव्य आनन्द की मदिरा (वारुणी) के मद से विह्वल

vāruṇī.en: Varuni (divine wine; nectar of bliss; emerged from the ocean-churning)
vāruṇī.hi: वारुणी (दिव्य मदिरा; आनन्द का अमृत; समुद्र मन्थन से प्रकट)

modern_context: यह नाम भक्ति के उन्माद का है। जब कीर्तन में इतना डूबें कि शरीर नाचने लगे बिना बताए, या भजन सुनते हुए आँखों से आँसू बहें और रोकने पर भी न रुकें, वह आनन्द का मद है। मीराबाई कृष्ण प्रेम में ऐसी ही विह्वल थीं। यह नशा किसी पदार्थ का नहीं, भक्ति का है।
modern_context_en: This name describes the ecstasy of devotion. When kirtan absorbs you so deeply that the body dances without instruction, or tears flow during bhajans and cannot be stopped, that is the intoxication of bliss. Meera was similarly vihvala in Krishna's love. This intoxication is not of substances but of devotion.
nri_context: When a bhajan at a small overseas gathering suddenly breaks through all your emotional defences and you find yourself weeping with an inexplicable joy, that is Vāruṇī's divine ecstasy.
usage_context: Chant during ecstatic kirtan, bhakti-rasa meditation, or when devotion reaches an overwhelming pitch. Also during Holi celebrations and Radha-Krishna worship.

meaning_en: She who transcends the entire universe
meaning_hi: सम्पूर्ण विश्व से भी परे और अधिक
modern_context: Observable universe 93 billion light-years व्यास का है। लेकिन देवी विश्वाधिका हैं, इस विश्व से भी बड़ी। जब ISRO या NASA ब्रह्माण्ड की सीमा खोजे, तो जानें कि सीमा के पार भी देवी हैं। जब Science कहे 'हमें केवल 5% universe पता है', तो समझें कि बाक़ी 95% (dark matter/energy) भी देवी का ही विस्तार है।
modern_context_en: The observable universe is 93 billion light-years in diameter. But Devi is Vishvadhika, greater even than this cosmos. When ISRO or NASA searches for the universe's boundary, know Devi exists beyond it. When science says 'we know only 5% of the universe', understand the remaining 95% (dark matter/energy) is also Devi's expansion.
nri_context: When planetarium shows abroad display the universe's vastness and your child asks 'what's beyond all this?', this name is the answer: Devi, who is Viśvādhikā, greater than everything visible.
usage_context: Chant during cosmic meditation, space-themed contemplation, or when feeling small before the universe's immensity. Also during Vishvarupa dhyana.

meaning_en: She who is the ultimate truth to be known through the Vedas
meaning_hi: वेदों द्वारा जानने योग्य परम सत्य

vedyā.en: to be known, the object of knowledge

modern_context: चारों वेद (ऋग्, यजुर्, साम, अथर्व) का अन्तिम लक्ष्य देवी को जानना है। वेद विशाल हैं, हज़ारों सूक्त और मन्त्र हैं, लेकिन सबका सार एक ही है: उस परम सत्य को जानो जो सबका आधार है। JEE syllabus में 100 chapters हैं लेकिन exam में कुछ core concepts बार-बार आते हैं, वैसे ही वेदों का core concept देवी हैं।
modern_context_en: All four Vedas (Rig, Yajur, Sama, Atharva) ultimately aim to know Devi. The Vedas are vast, containing thousands of suktas and mantras, but their essence is one: know that supreme truth which is the foundation of all. The JEE syllabus has 100 chapters but a few core concepts repeat in every exam; similarly, Devi is the Vedas' core concept.
nri_context: When you enrol your child in a Veda Pathshala online from abroad, know that the entire journey of those sacred sounds leads to knowing the one this name points to.
usage_context: Chant during Veda Parayana, Vedantic study, or when seeking the ultimate purpose behind scriptural knowledge. Also during Guru Purnima.

meaning_en: She who makes her home upon the Vindhya mountain range
meaning_hi: विन्ध्याचल पर्वत पर निवास करने वाली
modern_context: विन्ध्याचल (उत्तर प्रदेश/मध्य प्रदेश) में विन्ध्यवासिनी देवी का प्रसिद्ध मन्दिर है जो शक्तिपीठ है। नवरात्रि में लाखों श्रद्धालु यहाँ आते हैं। माँ विन्ध्यवासिनी बुन्देलखण्ड और पूर्वांचल की कुलदेवी हैं। जब UP या MP का कोई परिवार कहे 'हमारी कुलदेवी विन्ध्यवासिनी हैं', तो यही नाम है।
modern_context_en: Vindhyachal (Uttar Pradesh/Madhya Pradesh) houses the famous Vindhyavasini Devi temple, a Shakti Peeth. Lakhs of devotees visit during Navratri. Maa Vindhyavasini is the Kula Devi of Bundelkhand and Purvanchal regions. When a UP or MP family says 'our Kula Devi is Vindhyavasini', this is the name.
nri_context: When families from UP and MP abroad organize a Vindhyavasini puja in their community hall, they are bringing a piece of central India's sacred geography to foreign soil.
usage_context: Chant during Vindhyavasini temple worship, when visiting Vindhyachal, or as a Kula Devi invocation for families from central India. Also during Shakti Peeth pilgrimage.

meaning_en: She who is the cosmic architect, ordainer of all destinies
meaning_hi: ब्रह्माण्ड की विधाता, सबके भाग्य की नियन्ता

vidhātrī.en: the ordainer, cosmic architect, she who arranges and apportions destiny

modern_context: विधाता वह शक्ति है जो भाग्य लिखती है। 'विधि का विधान' कहावत यहीं से आती है। जब बोर्ड एग्ज़ाम में 1-2 marks से pass या fail हों, जब train 2 मिनट लेट होने से ज़िन्दगी बच जाए, वह विधात्री का लेखा है। लेकिन भाग्यवाद में न फँसें, कर्म करें और फल विधात्री पर छोड़ दें।
modern_context_en: Vidhatri is the power that writes destiny. The saying 'Vidhi ka Vidhaan' comes from here. When board exam results are decided by 1-2 marks, when a 2-minute train delay saves a life, that is Vidhatri's account. But do not fall into fatalism; do your karma and leave the fruit to Vidhatri.
nri_context: When a seemingly random event abroad, a missed flight, a chance meeting, a delayed email, turns out to be life-changing in hindsight, that is Vidhātrī's invisible hand at work.
usage_context: Chant when surrendering outcomes, during Karma Yoga practice, or when destiny takes an unexpected turn. Also during Brahma puja and fate-related contemplation.

meaning_en: She who is the mother of the Vedas themselves
meaning_hi: स्वयं वेदों की जननी (माता)
modern_context: वेद अपौरुषेय (मनुष्य द्वारा नहीं रचित) माने जाते हैं, लेकिन देवी उनकी जननी हैं। जैसे माँ बच्चे को जन्म देती है, वैसे ही देवी ने वेदों को प्रकट किया। जब कोई पूछे 'वेद किसने लिखे?', तो उत्तर है कि वे लिखे नहीं गए, देवी से प्रकट हुए। यह भारतीय ज्ञान परम्परा की मौलिकता है।
modern_context_en: The Vedas are considered Apaurusheya (not composed by humans), yet Devi is their mother. Just as a mother gives birth to a child, Devi manifested the Vedas. When someone asks 'who wrote the Vedas?', the answer is that they were not written but revealed through Devi. This is the originality of Indian knowledge tradition.
nri_context: When your child's world religion class abroad asks 'who authored the Hindu scriptures?', this name provides the answer: they were born from the divine Mother, not authored by any human.
usage_context: Chant during Veda recitation, on Veda Vyasa Purnima (Guru Purnima), or when defending the divine origin of the Vedas. Also during Vedaparayana.

meaning_en: She who is the Maya (creative power) of Vishnu himself
meaning_hi: स्वयं विष्णु की माया (सृजनात्मक शक्ति)
modern_context: विष्णु को जगत् का पालक कहते हैं, लेकिन उनकी पालन-शक्ति स्वयं देवी (विष्णुमाया) हैं। जब सरकार नागरिकों का पालन करे, जब कम्पनी कर्मचारियों का ख़्याल रखे, वह विष्णुमाया का कार्य है। यह नाम वैष्णव और शाक्त दोनों परम्पराओं को जोड़ता है।
modern_context_en: Vishnu is called the world's sustainer, but his sustaining power itself is Devi (Vishnumaya). When a government takes care of citizens, when a company looks after employees, that is Vishnumaya's work. This name bridges both Vaishnava and Shakta traditions.
nri_context: When the social safety net of a foreign country, its healthcare, unemployment insurance, public services, protects you during hardship, recognize Viṣṇumāyā operating through those systems.
usage_context: Chant during Vishnu puja, when seeking sustenance and protection, or when bridging Vaishnava and Shakta traditions. Also during Ekadashi vrat.

meaning_en: She who is playful and graceful in all her cosmic activities
meaning_hi: सभी ब्रह्माण्डीय क्रियाओं में लीलामय और सुन्दर

vilāsinī.en: the playful one, she who engages in divine sport (leela), graceful

modern_context: विलास का अर्थ है लीला, खेल, क्रीड़ा। सृष्टि देवी का खेल है, गम्भीर कार्य नहीं। जब बच्चा खेलते हुए रेत का महल बनाए और फिर हँसते हुए तोड़ दे, वह विलासिनी भाव है। जब जीवन बहुत गम्भीर लगे, तो याद करें कि देवी के लिए यह सब लीला है, और हँसना सीखें।
modern_context_en: Vilasa means leela, play, sport. Creation is Devi's play, not serious work. When a child builds a sand castle while playing and then laughingly demolishes it, that is the Vilasini spirit. When life feels too serious, remember that for Devi, all this is leela, and learn to laugh.
nri_context: When immigrant life feels like an endless grind and you have forgotten how to play, this name gives divine permission to lighten up, because even the cosmos is Devi's playful sport.
usage_context: Chant when life becomes too heavy, during Leela meditation, or when rediscovering playfulness. Also during Krishna Janmashtami (celebrating divine play).

meaning_en: She who is the embodiment of the field (body) in which all experiences occur
meaning_hi: क्षेत्र (शरीर, अनुभव का स्थान) का स्वरूप

kṣetra.en: field (the body as the field of experience; Gita 13.1-2)

modern_context: गीता के 13वें अध्याय में कृष्ण कहते हैं: 'इदं शरीरं कौन्तेय क्षेत्रमित्यभिधीयते', यह शरीर क्षेत्र कहलाता है। देवी स्वयं वह क्षेत्र हैं जिसमें सारे अनुभव होते हैं। आपका शरीर मन्दिर है, इसकी देखभाल करना देवी की सेवा है। Yoga, पौष्टिक भोजन, पर्याप्त नींद, सब क्षेत्र की सेवा है।
modern_context_en: In Gita Chapter 13, Krishna says: 'Idam Shariram Kaunteya Kshetram iti Abhidhiyate', this body is called the field. Devi herself is that field in which all experiences occur. Your body is a temple; caring for it is service to Devi. Yoga, nutritious food, adequate sleep are all service to the kshetra.
nri_context: When the neglect of health abroad, skipped meals, irregular sleep, no exercise, takes its toll, this name is the wake-up call: your body is Devi's kṣetra and deserves reverent care.
usage_context: Chant during Gita Chapter 13 study, body-awareness meditation, or when recommitting to health. Also during Kshetra-Kshetrajna Viveka practice.

meaning_en: She who is the sovereign of all fields and sacred places
meaning_hi: सभी क्षेत्रों (तीर्थों और शरीरों) की ईश्वरी

kṣetra.en: field, sacred place, body, pilgrimage site

modern_context: क्षेत्र का दूसरा अर्थ तीर्थस्थान भी है। काशी, प्रयाग, कांची, सब क्षेत्र हैं और देवी उन सबकी ईश्वरी हैं। जब चार धाम यात्रा करें या 51 शक्तिपीठ के दर्शन करें, तो जानें कि हर क्षेत्र में देवी क्षेत्रेशी के रूप में विराजमान हैं। हर तीर्थ में एक ही देवी अलग-अलग रूप में हैं।
modern_context_en: Kshetra also means pilgrimage site. Kashi, Prayag, Kanchi, all are kshetras and Devi is sovereign of all. During Char Dham yatra or 51 Shakti Peeth darshan, know that Devi resides in every kshetra as Kshetreshi. In every pilgrimage site, one Devi appears in different forms.
nri_context: When you visit a Hindu temple abroad that combines deities from different Indian regions, know that Kshetreshī governs all sacred spaces equally, whether in Varanasi or Virginia.
usage_context: Chant during pilgrimage, temple visits, or when contemplating the sanctity of place. Also during Shakti Peeth yatra and Tirtha Vandana.

meaning_en: She who protects both the field (body) and the knower of the field (soul)
meaning_hi: क्षेत्र (शरीर) और क्षेत्रज्ञ (आत्मा) दोनों की रक्षा करने वाली

kṣetrajña.en: knower of the field (the soul, atman)

modern_context: देवी शरीर और आत्मा दोनों की रक्षा करती हैं। शरीर को doctor बचाता है और आत्मा को गुरु। लेकिन दोनों के पीछे देवी की शक्ति है। जब ICU में डॉक्टर कहे 'हमने सब किया, अब ऊपर वाले के हाथ में है', तो जानें कि वह 'ऊपर वाली' देवी क्षेत्रक्षेत्रज्ञपालिनी हैं।
modern_context_en: Devi protects both body and soul. The doctor saves the body, the guru saves the soul. But behind both is Devi's power. When a doctor in the ICU says 'we have done everything, now it is in God's hands', know that 'God' is Devi Kshetrakshetrajnapaalinee.
nri_context: When healthcare abroad treats your body but nobody addresses the soul-sickness of loneliness and disconnection, this name reminds you that Devi protects both, and spiritual care is as essential as medical care.
usage_context: Chant for holistic protection of body and soul, during Gita Chapter 13 contemplation, or when seeking both physical and spiritual healing. Completes the Kshetra trilogy (313-315).

meaning_en: She who is free from both decrease and increase
meaning_hi: क्षय (घटने) और वृद्धि (बढ़ने) दोनों से मुक्त
modern_context: Stock market बढ़ता है और गिरता है, शरीर का वज़न बढ़ता है और घटता है, popularity बढ़ती है और कम होती है। लेकिन देवी न बढ़ती हैं न घटती हैं, वे सदा समान हैं। जब Sensex crash हो और portfolio गिरे, या वज़न बढ़ जाए और निराशा हो, तो जानें कि जो बढ़ता-घटता है वह असली 'आप' नहीं।
modern_context_en: The stock market rises and falls, body weight increases and decreases, popularity waxes and wanes. But Devi neither increases nor decreases; she is always the same. When Sensex crashes and the portfolio drops, or weight gain brings despair, know that what rises and falls is not the real 'you.'
nri_context: When the roller coaster of immigrant life, sudden windfalls followed by sudden losses, career peaks followed by valleys, exhausts you, this name anchors you to the unchanging self beyond all fluctuation.
usage_context: Chant during financial volatility, when dealing with weight/health fluctuations, or during meditation on the changeless self. Also during equanimity practice.

meaning_en: She who is worshipped by the Kshetrapalas (guardians of sacred fields)
meaning_hi: क्षेत्रपालों (पवित्र स्थानों के रक्षकों) द्वारा पूजित

kṣetrapāla.en: Kshetrapala (guardian deity of a place, field protector)

modern_context: हर गाँव का एक क्षेत्रपाल (ग्राम देवता) होता है। भैरव, हनुमान, या स्थानीय लोकदेवता, ये सब क्षेत्रपाल हैं। वे भी देवी की पूजा करते हैं। जब गाँव में ग्राम देवता की पूजा हो, या शहर में स्थानीय मन्दिर का उत्सव, तो जानें कि वह क्षेत्रपाल स्वयं देवी का सेवक है।
modern_context_en: Every village has a Kshetrapala (village deity). Bhairava, Hanuman, or local folk deities are all Kshetrapalas. They too worship Devi. When the village celebrates the local deity, or the neighbourhood temple holds a festival, know that the Kshetrapala is himself Devi's servant.
nri_context: When you adopt a local guardian saint or protective figure of your overseas neighbourhood while maintaining your Hindu devotion, you are honouring the local kṣetrapāla while remaining devoted to Devi.
usage_context: Chant during local guardian deity worship, Bhairav Ashtami, or when honouring village and neighbourhood protector deities.

meaning_en: She who is victory personified, ever triumphant
meaning_hi: विजय का साक्षात् स्वरूप, सदा विजयी
modern_context: विजयादशमी (दशहरा) का नाम इसी विजया से आता है। यह नाम सिखाता है कि अन्ततः धर्म की विजय होती है। जब परीक्षा का result आए, जब court का फ़ैसला हो, जब election result आए, तो जानें कि सच्ची विजय देवी की कृपा से ही होती है। Virat Kohli जब match-winning century मारे, वह भी विजया की कृपा है।
modern_context_en: Vijayadashami (Dussehra) gets its name from this Vijaya. This name teaches that dharma ultimately triumphs. When exam results come, court verdicts are delivered, or election results are declared, know that true victory comes through Devi's grace. When Virat Kohli hits a match-winning century, that too is Vijaya's grace.
nri_context: Every small victory abroad, getting your licence, passing an interview, your child's graduation, is Vijayā celebrating through you.
usage_context: Chant on Vijayadashami, before competitions, or when seeking victory in any endeavour. One of the most popular and auspicious names.

meaning_en: She who is absolutely pure and spotless
meaning_hi: पूर्णतः निर्मल और निष्कलंक
modern_context: विमला पुरी जगन्नाथ मन्दिर की शक्तिपीठ देवी हैं। विमला मन्दिर के बिना जगन्नाथ का प्रसाद 'महाप्रसाद' नहीं बनता। विमल का अर्थ है बिना किसी मल (गन्दगी) के। जब मन प्रदूषित हो बुरे विचारों से, तो गंगा स्नान की तरह इस नाम का जाप मन को विमल कर देता है।
modern_context_en: Vimala is the Shakti Peeth deity of Puri Jagannath temple. Without Vimala temple, Jagannath's prasad does not become 'Mahaprasad'. Vimala means without any mala (dirt). When the mind is polluted by negative thoughts, chanting this name cleanses the mind like a Ganga snan.
nri_context: When the mental clutter of information overload abroad, news, social media, advertisements, leaves your mind feeling dirty, this name is the purifying rinse that restores clarity.
usage_context: Chant during mental purification, when visiting Puri Jagannath, or during morning meditation for a clean start. Also during Vimala Ekadashi.

meaning_en: She who is worthy of reverence from all beings
meaning_hi: सभी प्राणियों द्वारा वन्दना (प्रणाम) के योग्य

vandyā.en: worthy of reverence, deserving of salutation, venerable

modern_context: वन्दना करना भारतीय संस्कृति की नींव है। नमस्कार, प्रणाम, चरण स्पर्श, सब वन्दना के रूप हैं। जब सुबह माता-पिता के पैर छुएँ, गुरु को प्रणाम करें, या मन्दिर में माथा टेकें, आप वन्द्या देवी की वन्दना कर रहे हैं। विनम्रता सबसे बड़ा गुण है और वन्दना उसकी अभिव्यक्ति।
modern_context_en: Vandana is the foundation of Indian culture. Namaskar, pranam, charan sparsh, all are forms of vandana. When you touch parents' feet in the morning, bow to the guru, or bow at the temple, you are performing vandana of Vandya Devi. Humility is the greatest virtue and vandana is its expression.
nri_context: Teaching your children abroad to do Namaskar with folded hands instead of just waving 'hi' preserves the vandana tradition that this name sanctifies.
usage_context: Chant during morning vandana, before prostrating, or when cultivating humility. Also during Prarthana Shloka recitation.

meaning_en: She who is affectionately devoted to those who worship her
meaning_hi: अपने उपासकों (वन्दना करने वालों) के प्रति स्नेहपूर्ण

vatsalā.en: affectionate, maternal love, tenderly devoted to

modern_context: वात्सल्य माँ का सबसे प्राकृतिक भाव है। गाय बछड़े को चाटती है, बिल्ली बच्चों को मुँह में उठाती है, वही वात्सल्य है। देवी अपने भक्तों के प्रति ऐसी ही वत्सल हैं। जब बच्चा ग़लती करे और माँ डाँटने की बजाय गले लगा ले, वह वन्दारुजनवत्सला भाव है।
modern_context_en: Vatsalya is a mother's most natural emotion. A cow licks her calf, a cat carries kittens in her mouth, that is vatsalya. Devi is equally tender towards her devotees. When a child makes a mistake and the mother hugs instead of scolding, that is the Vandarujanavatsala spirit.
nri_context: When you call home after a failure abroad and your mother says 'bus ghar aa ja' (just come home) instead of lecturing, that unconditional vātsalya is Devi speaking through her.
usage_context: Chant when seeking Devi's maternal tenderness, during moments of feeling unloved, or when cultivating unconditional acceptance. Also during Vatsalya Bhava meditation.

meaning_en: She who is the eloquent speaker, the voice of all sacred speech
meaning_hi: वाक् (वाणी) की वक्ता, सभी पवित्र भाषण का स्वर
modern_context: सरस्वती वीणावादिनी हैं और देवी वाग्वादिनी। वाक् शक्ति सबसे शक्तिशाली शक्तियों में से एक है। एक अच्छा भाषण दुनिया बदल सकता है (Swami Vivekananda, Chicago 1893)। एक बुरा शब्द रिश्ता तोड़ सकता है। वाग्वादिनी से सीखें कि शब्द सोच-समझकर बोलें, क्योंकि हर शब्द में शक्ति है।
modern_context_en: Saraswati is Vinavadini and Devi is Vagvadini. Vak Shakti is among the most powerful forces. One good speech can change the world (Swami Vivekananda, Chicago 1893). One bad word can destroy a relationship. Learn from Vagvadini to speak thoughtfully, because every word carries power.
nri_context: When you must speak up in a foreign language at a crucial meeting abroad, or defend your cultural values in a debate, invoking Vāgvādinī sharpens both your words and your courage to use them.
usage_context: Chant before public speaking, debates, or important conversations. Also during Saraswati puja and before writing. A name for communicators.

meaning_en: She who has beautiful flowing hair, the deity of the Vamakeshvara Tantra
meaning_hi: सुन्दर बहते केशों वाली, वामकेश्वर तन्त्र की अधिष्ठात्री देवी

vāma.en: beautiful, lovely (also: the left path in Tantra)

keśī.en: having beautiful hair; also: the deity of Vamakeshvara Tantra
keśī.hi: सुन्दर केशों वाली; वामकेश्वर तन्त्र की देवी

modern_context: वामकेश्वर तन्त्र श्रीविद्या का महत्त्वपूर्ण ग्रन्थ है। वामकेशी देवी उस तान्त्रिक परम्परा की अधिष्ठात्री हैं। तन्त्र में 'वाम' मार्ग का अर्थ है बायाँ (unconventional) मार्ग। जब पारम्परिक तरीके काम न करें और नया रास्ता खोजना पड़े, तो वामकेशी का मार्गदर्शन लें। Innovation भी एक प्रकार का वाम मार्ग है।
modern_context_en: Vamakeshvara Tantra is an important Sri Vidya scripture. Vamakeshi Devi is the presiding deity of that Tantric tradition. In Tantra, 'Vama' path means the left (unconventional) path. When traditional approaches do not work and a new path must be found, seek Vamakeshi's guidance. Innovation is also a kind of Vama path.
nri_context: When conventional career paths abroad dead-end and you must forge an unconventional route, whether freelancing, switching fields, or starting fresh, Vāmakeśī blesses the alternative path.
usage_context: Chant during Sri Vidya sadhana, when seeking unconventional solutions, or during Vamakeshvara Tantra study. Also during creative problem-solving.

meaning_en: She who dwells within the circle of fire (Muladhara's fire triangle)
meaning_hi: अग्निमण्डल (मूलाधार के अग्नित्रिकोण) में निवास करने वाली
modern_context: श्री चक्र में सबसे भीतरी त्रिकोण अग्निमण्डल है जहाँ कुण्डलिनी शक्ति निवास करती है। हवन कुण्ड की अग्नि इसी का बाहरी प्रतीक है। जब सुबह रसोई में gas जलाकर चाय बनाएँ, तो जानें कि वह अग्नि भी वह्निमण्डलवासिनी देवी का ही एक रूप है। अग्नि पवित्र है, इसीलिए हिन्दू विवाह अग्नि के सामने होता है।
modern_context_en: In the Sri Chakra, the innermost triangle is the Agni Mandala where Kundalini Shakti resides. The havan kund fire is its external symbol. When you light the gas stove to make morning chai, know that fire too is a form of Vahnimandalavāsinī Devi. Fire is sacred; that is why Hindu marriages take place before Agni.
nri_context: When you light the stove in your overseas kitchen each morning, that simple domestic flame connects you to the same sacred agni before which your ancestors married.
usage_context: Chant during havan, Agni puja, or when contemplating fire's sacredness. Also during Kundalini Muladhara meditation and cooking as spiritual practice.

meaning_en: She who is the wish-fulfilling creeper for those who possess devotion
meaning_hi: भक्तिमान (भक्ति रखने वालों) के लिए कल्पलता (मनोकामना पूर्ण करने वाली बेल)

bhaktimat.en: one who possesses devotion, a true devotee

modern_context: कल्पलता स्वर्ग की वह बेल है जो हर इच्छा पूरी करती है। लेकिन शर्त है 'भक्तिमत्', अर्थात् केवल भक्ति रखने वालों के लिए। बिना भक्ति के माँगोगे तो नहीं मिलेगा। सच्चे भक्त को पूछना भी नहीं पड़ता, देवी स्वयं जान जाती हैं। जैसे अच्छी माँ बिना बताए बच्चे की ज़रूरत पूरी करती है।
modern_context_en: Kalpalata is heaven's creeper that fulfils every wish. But the condition is 'bhaktimat', meaning only for those with devotion. Without devotion, asking gets nothing. A true devotee does not even need to ask; Devi knows on her own. Just as a good mother fulfils her child's need without being told.
nri_context: When sincere prayer at your small home altar abroad is followed by an unexpected resolution to exactly the problem you were worried about, that is the Kalpala tikā bearing fruit for your bhakti.
usage_context: Chant when devotion is sincere but wishes remain unfulfilled, during Kalpavriksha meditation, or when strengthening bhakti. The ultimate reassurance for devoted hearts.

meaning_en: She who liberates bound souls from the noose of worldly bondage
meaning_hi: पशु (बद्ध जीवात्मा) को पाश (सांसारिक बन्धन) से मुक्त करने वाली

paśu.en: bound soul (literally: animal; in Shaiva philosophy: the individual soul bound by ignorance)
paśu.hi: पशु (बद्ध जीव; शैव दर्शन में: अज्ञान से बँधी आत्मा)

modern_context: शैव दर्शन में तीन तत्त्व हैं: पति (शिव), पशु (बद्ध जीव), पाश (बन्धन)। हम सब पशु हैं जो माया, कर्म, और अज्ञान के पाश में बँधे हैं। देवी पशुपाशविमोचिनी उन रस्सियों को काटती हैं। जब addiction, debt, या toxic relationship की रस्सी गले में कसे, तो यह नाम उस रस्सी को काटता है।
modern_context_en: In Shaiva philosophy there are three principles: Pati (Shiva/Lord), Pashu (bound soul), Pasha (bondage). We are all pashus bound by Maya, Karma, and ignorance. Devi Pashupashavimochini cuts those ropes. When addiction, debt, or a toxic relationship tightens around your neck, this name cuts that rope.
nri_context: When the invisible chains of immigrant life, financial obligations, sponsorship dependency, cultural expectations, feel like a noose, this name is the divine liberator who severs those bonds.
usage_context: Chant during liberation-focused sadhana, when feeling trapped in any bondage, or during Pashupatinath worship. Also during Shaiva philosophical study.

meaning_en: She who destroys all forms of heresy and false doctrines
meaning_hi: सभी पाखण्ड (झूठे सिद्धान्तों और मत-मतान्तरों) का सम्पूर्ण संहार करने वाली

saṃhṛta.hi: संहार किया हुआ, नष्ट किया हुआ

pāṣaṇḍā.en: heresy, false doctrines, hypocrisy in religion

modern_context: पाखण्ड आज भी व्याप्त है: बाबा जो चमत्कार दिखाकर ठगते हैं, WhatsApp पर फैलने वाले अन्धविश्वास, ज्योतिषी जो डराकर पैसे लूटते हैं। देवी संहृताशेषपाषण्डा इन सबका नाश करती हैं। सत्य और असत्य में भेद करना ही पाखण्डनाश है। विवेक रखें, अन्धविश्वास में न फँसें।
modern_context_en: Heresy is still widespread: babas who cheat by showing miracles, superstitions spreading on WhatsApp, astrologers who loot by creating fear. Devi Samhritasheshapashanda destroys all of them. Distinguishing truth from falsehood is itself the destruction of heresy. Keep viveka; do not fall into superstition.
nri_context: When fraudulent spiritual teachers target vulnerable diaspora communities abroad with fake miracles and expensive retreats, this name arms you with the discernment to see through the pāṣaṇḍa.
usage_context: Chant when encountering religious fraud, during Viveka practice, or when protecting yourself and others from spiritual charlatans. Also during Satya-Asatya Viveka meditation.

meaning_en: She who inspires and establishes righteous conduct in the world
meaning_hi: सदाचार (सही आचरण) को स्थापित और प्रेरित करने वाली

sadācāra.en: righteous conduct, good behaviour, ethical living

pravartikā.en: establisher, inspirer, one who sets in motion
pravartikā.hi: प्रवर्तन करने वाली, स्थापित करने वाली

modern_context: सदाचार के नियम सरल हैं: सत्य बोलो, चोरी मत करो, दूसरों की मदद करो, बड़ों का सम्मान करो। लेकिन पालन कठिन है। जब tax भरने में चोरी का मन करे, या interview में झूठ बोलने का लोभ हो, तो सदाचारप्रवर्तिका देवी को याद करें। शॉर्टकट से पहुँचना सदाचार नहीं।
modern_context_en: The rules of sadachara are simple: speak truth, do not steal, help others, respect elders. But following them is hard. When tempted to cheat on taxes, or lie in an interview, remember Sadacharapravartika Devi. Reaching somewhere through shortcuts is not sadachara.
nri_context: When the temptation to bend rules abroad, underreporting income, working on a tourist visa, inflating credentials, arises, this name is the inner compass pointing back to sadācāra.
usage_context: Chant when facing ethical dilemmas, during moral education, or when recommitting to honest living. Also during Dharma-related study and Yama-Niyama practice.

root_word: tāpa + traya + agni + santapta + samāhlādana + candrikā
meaning_en: She who is the cooling moonlight that soothes those scorched by the three fires of suffering
meaning_hi: तीन तापों (आधिदैविक, आधिभौतिक, आध्यात्मिक) की अग्नि से जलते हुओं को शीतल करने वाली चाँदनी

samāhlādana.hi: शीतल करने वाली, आह्लाद देने वाली

modern_context: तीन ताप हैं: आधिदैविक (प्राकृतिक आपदा), आधिभौतिक (दूसरों से कष्ट), आध्यात्मिक (शारीरिक/मानसिक रोग)। जब तीनों एक साथ आएँ, बाढ़ में घर डूबे, पड़ोसी मदद न करे, और बुखार भी आ जाए, तब तापत्रयाग्नि है। ऐसे समय देवी शीतल चाँदनी की तरह शान्ति देती हैं।
modern_context_en: The three sufferings are: Adhidaivika (natural calamity), Adhibhautika (harm from others), Adhyatmika (physical/mental illness). When all three strike simultaneously, home floods, neighbours refuse help, and fever comes too, that is tapatraya-agni. At such times, Devi soothes like cool moonlight.
nri_context: When a pandemic abroad brings illness (adhyatmika), racist hostility (adhibhautika), and natural disaster (adhidaivika) all at once, this name is the moonlight that cools all three fires simultaneously.
usage_context: Chant during overwhelming suffering, when multiple crises converge, or during Chandra (moon) meditation for cooling. One of the most poetically beautiful names in the entire Sahasranama.

meaning_en: She who is eternally youthful and fresh
meaning_hi: शाश्वत रूप से तरुण (युवा) और ताज़ा

taruṇī.hi: तरुणी, सदा युवा, शाश्वत ताज़गी वाली

modern_context: देवी सदा तरुणी हैं, उम्र उन्हें छूती नहीं। यह anti-ageing cream का विज्ञापन नहीं, बल्कि यह सन्देश है कि सच्ची युवावस्था मन की होती है। 80 साल के बुज़ुर्ग जो रोज़ पार्क में हँसते हैं, वे तरुणी भाव में हैं। जबकि 25 साल का युवक जो थका-हारा बैठा है, वह वृद्ध है। उम्र मन से तय होती है, शरीर से नहीं।
modern_context_en: Devi is eternally Taruni; age does not touch her. This is not an anti-ageing cream advertisement but the message that true youth is of the mind. An 80-year-old who laughs in the park every day is in Taruni spirit. A 25-year-old sitting exhausted and defeated is old. Age is determined by the mind, not the body.
nri_context: When years abroad add grey hair and wrinkles but your spirit still burns with the same dreams you had when you first arrived, that ageless inner fire is Taruṇī's eternal youth living through you.
usage_context: Chant when combating ageing anxiety, during rejuvenation practices, or when seeking to maintain mental freshness. Also during Shodashi (the sixteen-year-old goddess) puja.

meaning_en: She who is the supreme ascetic, embodiment of tapas
meaning_hi: परम तपस्विनी, तपस्या का साक्षात् स्वरूप

tāpasī.en: female ascetic, one who practises tapas (austerity, discipline, focused effort)

modern_context: तपस्या का अर्थ केवल जंगल में बैठना नहीं, बल्कि किसी लक्ष्य के लिए कठोर अनुशासन पालना है। IAS की तैयारी में 14-16 घण्टे पढ़ना तपस्या है। Olympic athlete का रोज़ सुबह 4 बजे उठकर training करना तपस्या है। माँ जो रात-रात जागकर बीमार बच्चे की सेवा करे, वह भी तापसी है।
modern_context_en: Tapasya does not just mean sitting in the forest but practising rigorous discipline for a goal. Studying 14-16 hours for IAS is tapasya. An Olympic athlete training at 4 AM daily is tapasya. A mother staying up night after night nursing a sick child is also a Tapasi.
nri_context: The sustained discipline of maintaining two identities, Indian at home, professional abroad, day after day for years without breaking, is its own form of tāpas.
usage_context: Chant when beginning intense disciplines, during exam preparation seasons, or when seeking stamina for long-term commitments. Also during Tapasya-themed meditation.

meaning_en: She who removes tamas (darkness, inertia, ignorance)
meaning_hi: तमोगुण (अन्धकार, जड़ता, अज्ञान) को दूर करने वाली
modern_context: तमोगुण वह अवस्था है जब न पढ़ने का मन करे, न काम करने का, बस सोते रहें और mobile scroll करते रहें। Depression भी तमोगुण का एक रूप है। जब सुबह बिस्तर से उठने का मन न हो और हर काम बोझ लगे, तो तमोपहा देवी का जाप करें। एक दीया जलाएँ, अँधेरा स्वयं भागेगा।
modern_context_en: Tamas is the state when you feel like neither studying nor working, just sleeping and scrolling the phone. Depression is also a form of tamas. When getting out of bed feels impossible and every task is a burden, chant Tamopaha Devi's name. Light one diya; darkness will flee on its own.
nri_context: When the dark winter months abroad bring seasonal depression and the tamasic pull of staying under blankets all day, this name is the inner light that dispels that grey heaviness.
usage_context: Chant during depressive episodes, when lethargy dominates, or when lighting the morning diya. Also during Deepavali (the festival of conquering darkness).

meaning_en: She who is pure universal consciousness itself
meaning_hi: शुद्ध सार्वभौमिक चेतना स्वरूपा
modern_context: चिति प्रत्यभिज्ञा दर्शन (कश्मीर शैवदर्शन) का मूल शब्द है। 'चिति स्वतन्त्रा विश्वसिद्धिहेतुः' अर्थात् स्वतन्त्र चिति ही विश्व की सिद्धि का कारण है। जब ध्यान में 'मैं सोच रहा हूँ' से पहले जो शुद्ध जानना है, वही चिति है। AI चाहे कितनी भी intelligence simulate करे, चिति (consciousness) केवल जीवात्मा में है।
modern_context_en: Citi is the foundational term in Pratyabhijna philosophy (Kashmir Shaivism). 'Citi Svatantra Vishvasiddhihetuh' means free consciousness alone is the cause of the universe's manifestation. In meditation, the pure knowing that exists before 'I am thinking' is Citi. No matter how much AI simulates intelligence, Citi (consciousness) exists only in living beings.
nri_context: When working alongside AI tools abroad and wondering what makes you different from a machine, this name answers: you possess Citi, the living consciousness no algorithm can replicate.
usage_context: Chant during consciousness meditation, Pratyabhijna study, or when contemplating the nature of awareness. Also during AI-era philosophical discussions.

meaning_en: She who is the ultimate meaning indicated by the word 'Tat' (That) in the Mahavakya
meaning_hi: महावाक्य 'तत्त्वमसि' में 'तत्' (वह) शब्द का लक्ष्यार्थ (परम अर्थ)

tat.en: That (referring to Brahman in the Mahavakya 'Tat Tvam Asi')
tat.hi: 'वह' (महावाक्य 'तत्त्वमसि' में ब्रह्म को सूचित करने वाला)

modern_context: 'तत्त्वमसि' (तू वही है) उपनिषद का सबसे प्रसिद्ध महावाक्य है। 'तत्' का अर्थ ब्रह्म है और देवी उस 'तत्' का लक्ष्यार्थ हैं। जब वेदान्त के गुरु शिष्य से कहें 'तू वही है', तो 'वही' देवी हैं। यह भारतीय दर्शन का सबसे गहन सत्य है: आत्मा और ब्रह्म (देवी) एक ही हैं।
modern_context_en: 'Tat Tvam Asi' (You are That) is the Upanishad's most famous Mahavakya. 'Tat' means Brahman and Devi is the implied meaning of that 'Tat'. When a Vedanta guru tells the disciple 'You are That', the 'That' is Devi. This is Indian philosophy's deepest truth: Atman and Brahman (Devi) are one.
nri_context: When the identity question of 'who am I really?' haunts you between two cultures abroad, this name answers at the deepest possible level: you are 'Tat', you are Devi herself.
usage_context: Chant during Mahavakya meditation, Vedanta study, or when contemplating 'Tat Tvam Asi'. One of the most philosophically significant names in the entire Sahasranama.

meaning_en: She whose nature is the single undifferentiated flavour of pure consciousness
meaning_hi: शुद्ध चेतना के एकमात्र अविभाज्य रस का स्वरूप
modern_context: जैसे समुद्र का हर बूँद खारा है, वैसे ही देवी का हर अंश चैतन्य है। चाहे आप ध्यान में हों या बाज़ार में, चेतना वही एक रस है। जैसे गन्ने का हर टुकड़ा मीठा होता है, वैसे ही अस्तित्व का हर कण चेतना से भरा है। यह नाम सिखाता है कि विविधता के भीतर एकता है।
modern_context_en: Just as every drop of the ocean is salty, every part of Devi is consciousness. Whether in meditation or in the marketplace, consciousness is the same single rasa. Just as every piece of sugarcane is sweet, every particle of existence is filled with consciousness. This name teaches that within diversity lies unity.
nri_context: When life abroad feels fragmented between office, home, community, and identity, this name dissolves all division: there is only one rasa, one consciousness, flowing through every experience.
usage_context: Chant during non-dual meditation, when seeking unity in diversity, or during Rasa meditation. Also during Advaita Vedanta contemplation.

root_word: sva + ātma + ānanda + lavī + bhūta + brahmā + ādi + ānanda + santatiḥ
meaning_en: She whose own bliss is so vast that Brahma's bliss is merely a fraction of it
meaning_hi: जिनके स्वयं के आनन्द का एक अंशमात्र ब्रह्मा आदि देवताओं का सम्पूर्ण आनन्द है
modern_context: तैत्तिरीय उपनिषद में आनन्द की सीढ़ी बताई गई है: मनुष्य का आनन्द, गन्धर्व का आनन्द, देव का आनन्द, इन्द्र का आनन्द, ब्रह्मा का आनन्द। लेकिन ब्रह्मा का आनन्द भी देवी के आनन्द का एक कण है। जब Diwali bonus मिले तो ख़ुशी होती है, लेकिन ध्यान में मिलने वाला आनन्द उससे अतुलनीय है।
modern_context_en: Taittiriya Upanishad describes the ladder of bliss: human bliss, gandharva bliss, deva bliss, Indra's bliss, Brahma's bliss. Yet even Brahma's bliss is a fraction of Devi's bliss. When a Diwali bonus brings happiness, that is real but the bliss found in meditation is incomparably greater.
nri_context: When the highest salary, biggest house, and best school district abroad still leave an inexplicable yearning, this name explains why: you are tasting fractions when the full ocean of ānanda awaits within.
usage_context: Chant during Taittiriya Upanishad study, Ananda meditation, or when worldly pleasures feel insufficient. A name that redefines the scale of joy.

meaning_en: She who is the supreme, the ultimate, beyond everything
meaning_hi: परम, सर्वोच्च, सब से परे

parā.en: the supreme, the ultimate, the transcendent; also: Para Vak (the highest level of speech, undifferentiated sound)
parā.hi: परम, सर्वोच्च, अतिक्रमणशील; परा वाक् (वाणी का सर्वोच्च स्तर, अविभेदित ध्वनि)

modern_context: परा वाक् वाणी की चार अवस्थाओं (परा, पश्यन्ती, मध्यमा, वैखरी) में सबसे ऊँची है जहाँ शब्द अभी बना भी नहीं, केवल स्पन्दन है। जब कोई विचार मन में उठने से पहले ही पकड़ लें, वह परा का अनुभव है। Mindfulness meditation में 'thought before the thought' को पकड़ना यही है।
modern_context_en: Para Vak is the highest of four speech levels (Para, Pashyanti, Madhyama, Vaikhari) where the word has not yet formed, only vibration exists. When you catch a thought before it even arises in the mind, that is the experience of Para. In mindfulness meditation, catching the 'thought before the thought' is exactly this.
nri_context: When you intuitively sense something is wrong before any evidence appears, or know exactly what to say before words form, that pre-verbal knowing is Parā operating through your awareness.
usage_context: Chant during Para Vak meditation, advanced mindfulness, or when contemplating the subtlest level of consciousness. Also during Nada Yoga and sound meditation.

meaning_en: She who is the inner-facing consciousness, the awareness turned inward
meaning_hi: अन्तर्मुखी चेतना (भीतर की ओर मुड़ी हुई चैतन्य) का स्वरूप
modern_context: बाहर देखना आसान है, भीतर देखना कठिन। आँखें बाहर देखती हैं लेकिन अपनी पलकें नहीं देख सकतीं। प्रत्यक् चिति वह चेतना है जो स्वयं को देखती है। Therapy में जब counsellor कहे 'अपने भीतर देखो, क्या feel हो रहा है?', वह प्रत्यक् दृष्टि का अभ्यास है। Self-awareness सबसे बड़ी विद्या है।
modern_context_en: Looking outward is easy; looking inward is hard. Eyes see outside but cannot see their own eyelids. Pratyak Citi is the consciousness that sees itself. In therapy when the counsellor says 'look within, what are you feeling?', that is practising Pratyak vision. Self-awareness is the greatest knowledge.
nri_context: When the outward-focused immigrant hustle leaves no space for self-reflection, this name is the compass that turns attention back inward where the real answers live.
usage_context: Chant during self-inquiry (Atma Vichara), therapy, or introspective journaling. Also during Pratyahara (sense-withdrawal) in yoga.

meaning_en: She who is the visionary level of speech where ideas first take form
meaning_hi: पश्यन्ती वाक् (वाणी का वह स्तर जहाँ विचार पहली बार रूप लेता है)

paśyantī.en: the seeing one; the second level of speech where thought first becomes visible as a mental image
paśyantī.hi: देखने वाली; वाणी का दूसरा स्तर जहाँ विचार पहली बार मानसिक छवि के रूप में दिखता है

modern_context: पश्यन्ती वह अवस्था है जब विचार 'दिखने' लगता है लेकिन शब्द अभी नहीं बना। जैसे artist के मन में चित्र पहले दिखता है, फिर वह canvas पर उतारता है। Architect जब भवन design करे, पहले मन में 'देखे', वह पश्यन्ती है। Visualization technique जो sports psychology में सिखाई जाती है, वही पश्यन्ती का आधुनिक रूप है।
modern_context_en: Pashyanti is the state where thought begins to 'appear' but words have not yet formed. Like an artist who first sees the picture in the mind, then paints it on canvas. When an architect 'sees' a building design in the mind first, that is Pashyanti. The visualization technique taught in sports psychology is a modern form of Pashyanti.
nri_context: When you clearly visualize the life you want to build abroad, seeing it in your mind's eye before any step is taken, you are working at the Paśyantī level of creative manifestation.
usage_context: Chant during creative visualization, before artistic work, or during Pashyanti Vak meditation. Also during manifestation practices and vision-boarding.

meaning_en: She who is the supreme deity, the highest object of worship
meaning_hi: परम देवता, उपासना की सर्वोच्च विषय
modern_context: 33 करोड़ देवी-देवता हैं लेकिन परदेवता एक ही हैं: ललिता देवी। जैसे company में हज़ारों कर्मचारी हों लेकिन CEO एक, वैसे ही देवलोक में अनेक देवता हैं लेकिन परदेवता एक। जब confusion हो कि किसकी पूजा करें, तो जानें कि किसी भी देवता की पूजा अन्ततः परदेवता तक पहुँचती है।
modern_context_en: There are 33 crore deities but the Paradevata is one: Lalita Devi. Just as a company has thousands of employees but one CEO, the divine realm has many deities but one Paradevata. When confused about whom to worship, know that worship of any deity ultimately reaches the Paradevata.
nri_context: When your child abroad asks 'why do we have so many gods?', this name simplifies the answer: all those forms point to one Paradevatā, like many rivers flowing to one ocean.
usage_context: Chant as the supreme invocation, during theological discussions, or when seeking clarity about the unity behind Hindu polytheism. A foundational name.

meaning_en: She who is the middle level of speech where thought becomes inner dialogue
meaning_hi: मध्यमा वाक् (वाणी का मध्य स्तर जहाँ विचार आन्तरिक संवाद बनता है)

madhyamā.en: the middle one; the third level of speech where thought crystallizes into inner words before being spoken
madhyamā.hi: मध्यम; वाणी का तीसरा स्तर जहाँ विचार बोलने से पहले भीतरी शब्दों में जमता है

modern_context: मध्यमा वह अवस्था है जब मन में शब्द बनते हैं लेकिन मुँह से निकलते नहीं। 'Inner voice' या 'self-talk' मध्यमा है। जब exam hall में बैठकर मन में पढ़ा हुआ दोहराएँ, वह मध्यमा है। Positive self-talk ('मैं कर सकता हूँ') भी मध्यमा का उपयोग है। अपनी inner voice को सकारात्मक रखना सबसे बड़ी साधना है।
modern_context_en: Madhyama is the state where words form in the mind but do not leave the mouth. 'Inner voice' or 'self-talk' is Madhyama. When sitting in the exam hall and mentally revising, that is Madhyama. Positive self-talk ('I can do this') is also using Madhyama. Keeping your inner voice positive is the greatest sadhana.
nri_context: When your inner voice abroad constantly whispers 'you do not belong here' or 'you are not good enough', consciously changing that madhyamā to 'I am Devi's child' is transformative.
usage_context: Chant during inner voice work, positive affirmation practice, or Madhyama Vak meditation. Also during CBT-style thought reframing. Continues the Vak series (337, 339, 341).

meaning_en: She who manifests as Vaikhari, the audible spoken word
meaning_hi: वैखरी वाक् (बोले गए शब्द, श्रव्य वाणी) का स्वरूप

vaikharī.en: Vaikhari (the fourth and grossest level of speech: audible, spoken words)
vaikharī.hi: वैखरी (वाणी का चौथा और स्थूलतम स्तर: सुनाई देने वाले बोले गए शब्द)

modern_context: वैखरी वह वाणी है जो कान से सुनाई दे। मन्त्र जब ज़ोर से बोला जाए वह वैखरी है, मन में बोला जाए वह मध्यमा। Podcast सुनना वैखरी सुनना है, audiobook भी। जब भजन गाएँ, कथा सुनाएँ, या बच्चों को कहानी पढ़कर सुनाएँ, सब वैखरी के माध्यम से देवी प्रकट हो रही हैं।
modern_context_en: Vaikhari is the speech heard by ears. A mantra chanted aloud is Vaikhari; chanted in the mind is Madhyama. Listening to a podcast is hearing Vaikhari; audiobooks too. When singing bhajans, narrating kathas, or reading bedtime stories to children, Devi manifests through Vaikhari.
nri_context: When you read Ramayana aloud to your child in Hindi each night abroad, your voice becomes Vaikharī Devi herself, carrying the sacred tradition through spoken sound to the next generation.
usage_context: Chant during vocal mantra japa, public recitation, or when speaking sacred words aloud. Completes the four-level Vak series (Para 337, Pashyanti 339, Madhyama 341, Vaikhari 342).

meaning_en: She who is the swan that swims in the Manasa lake of her devotee's mind
meaning_hi: भक्त के मन रूपी मानसरोवर में तैरने वाली हंसिनी
modern_context: हंस दूध और पानी अलग कर सकता है, यही विवेक का प्रतीक है। देवी भक्त के मन में हंसिनी की तरह तैरती हैं और सार (दूध) को असार (पानी) से अलग करती हैं। जब मन में अच्छे-बुरे विचार एक साथ आएँ और confusion हो, तो देवी की हंसिनी शक्ति सही को अलग कर देती है।
modern_context_en: The swan can separate milk from water, symbolizing discernment. Devi swims like a swan in the devotee's mind, separating the essential (milk) from the non-essential (water). When good and bad thoughts arrive together causing confusion, Devi's swan-power separates the right from the wrong.
nri_context: When information overload abroad mixes truth with propaganda, facts with opinions, this inner haṃsikā helps you discern what is truly nourishing from what is noise.
usage_context: Chant during Viveka (discernment) meditation, when confused between choices, or during Hamsa meditation. A beautiful devotional-philosophical name.

meaning_en: She who is the very life-breath channel of Kameshvara (Shiva)
meaning_hi: कामेश्वर (शिव) की प्राणनाडी (जीवन-श्वास की नलिका) स्वरूपा
modern_context: जैसे शरीर में नाड़ियाँ प्राण ले जाती हैं, वैसे ही देवी शिव की प्राणनाड़ी हैं। बिना नाड़ी के प्राण नहीं बह सकता, बिना शक्ति के शिव सक्रिय नहीं हो सकते। जब प्राणायाम में साँस लें, तो जानें कि हर श्वास में शिव-शक्ति का मिलन हो रहा है। पूरक शक्ति है, रेचक शिव।
modern_context_en: Just as nadis carry prana through the body, Devi is Shiva's prana nadi. Without the nadi, prana cannot flow; without Shakti, Shiva cannot be active. During pranayama when breathing, know that every breath is a union of Shiva-Shakti. Inhalation is Shakti, exhalation is Shiva.
nri_context: Every breath you take abroad, through harsh winters, in stressful meetings, during lonely evenings, is Shiva-Shakti uniting through your prāṇanāḍī, making life itself an act of worship.
usage_context: Chant during pranayama, Nadi Shodhana (alternate nostril breathing), or when contemplating the Shiva-Shakti union within breath. Also during Kundalini Nadi meditation.

meaning_en: She who appreciates and remembers even the smallest act of devotion
meaning_hi: भक्ति के छोटे से छोटे कर्म को भी जानने और स्मरण रखने वाली, कृतज्ञ
modern_context: कृतज्ञता (gratitude) सबसे बड़ा गुण है। देवी कृतज्ञा हैं, अर्थात् भक्त का छोटे से छोटा कर्म भी याद रखती हैं। जब आपने कभी एक फूल भी चढ़ाया था तो देवी को याद है। जब किसी ने आपकी मदद की हो, तो कृतज्ञ रहें, क्योंकि कृतघ्नता (अहसानफ़रामोशी) सबसे बड़ा पाप है।
modern_context_en: Gratitude is the greatest virtue. Devi is Kritajna; she remembers even the smallest act of devotion. When you once offered even a single flower, Devi remembers. When someone has helped you, be grateful, because ingratitude is the greatest sin.
nri_context: Remembering and honouring every person who helped you settle abroad, from the first friend to the immigration lawyer, is practising the kṛtajñatā that Devi herself embodies.
usage_context: Chant during gratitude practice, Thanksgiving-like celebrations, or when acknowledging help received. Also during Guru Vandana and elder appreciation.

meaning_en: She who is worshipped by Kamadeva (the god of love)
meaning_hi: कामदेव (प्रेम के देवता) द्वारा पूजित
modern_context: कामदेव प्रेम के देवता हैं और वे भी ललिता की पूजा करते हैं। प्रेम सबसे शक्तिशाली भावना है, लेकिन वह भी देवी के अधीन है। Valentine's Day पर जब प्रेम celebrate करें, तो जानें कि प्रेम की शक्ति देवी से आती है। कामदेव बाण चलाता है लेकिन बाण की शक्ति देवी की है।
modern_context_en: Kamadeva is the god of love and even he worships Lalita. Love is the most powerful emotion, yet it too is under Devi's control. On Valentine's Day when celebrating love, know that the power of love comes from Devi. Kamadeva shoots arrows but the arrows' power belongs to Devi.
nri_context: When love blossoms in unexpected places abroad, across cultures, languages, and continents, recognize that Kāmadeva's arrow, guided by Devi's hand, knows no passport restrictions.
usage_context: Chant during love-related prayers, Vasant Panchami (Kamadeva's festival), or when seeking divine blessing for romantic relationships.

meaning_en: She who is the complete embodiment of Shringara Rasa (the aesthetic sentiment of love)
meaning_hi: शृंगार रस (प्रेम का सौन्दर्यपूर्ण भाव) से परिपूर्ण

śṛṅgāra.en: Shringara (the erotic/romantic sentiment, the king of rasas)

modern_context: नवरस में शृंगार को रसराज (रसों का राजा) कहते हैं। भरतनाट्यम और कथक में शृंगार अभिनय सबसे कठिन और सबसे सुन्दर होता है। राधा-कृष्ण का प्रेम शृंगार रस का सर्वोच्च उदाहरण है। देवी स्वयं शृंगार रस से परिपूर्ण हैं, इसीलिए उनका सोलह शृंगार किया जाता है।
modern_context_en: Among the nine rasas, Shringara is called Rasaraja (king of rasas). In Bharatanatyam and Kathak, Shringara abhinaya is the most difficult and most beautiful. Radha-Krishna's love is the supreme example of Shringara Rasa. Devi herself is complete in Shringara Rasa; that is why her Solah Shringar is performed.
nri_context: When attending a classical dance performance abroad where the dancer portrays Radha's longing, and tears come to your eyes from sheer beauty, that is Śṛṅgāra Rasa touching your soul across continents.
usage_context: Chant during Devi Shringar puja, classical dance performances, or when celebrating romantic love. Also during Navarasa meditation and Saundarya Lahari study.

meaning_en: She who is victory itself, ever triumphant in all realms
meaning_hi: जय स्वरूपा, सभी लोकों में सदा विजयी
modern_context: 'जय माता दी' भारत का सबसे प्रसिद्ध उद्घोष है। ट्रक पर, auto पर, दुकान पर, हर जगह लिखा दिखता है। जब भी कुछ अच्छा हो, 'जय माता दी' बोलें। Cricket match जीतें, exam pass करें, नौकरी मिले, हर विजय में 'जय माता दी' बोलना देवी का शुक्रिया अदा करना है।
modern_context_en: 'Jai Mata Di' is India's most famous exclamation. Written on trucks, autos, shops, everywhere. Whenever something good happens, say 'Jai Mata Di'. Win a cricket match, pass an exam, get a job, saying 'Jai Mata Di' with every victory is thanking Devi.
nri_context: When you say 'Jai Mata Di' after getting your citizenship ceremony abroad or your child's college acceptance letter, that two-word prayer carries the weight of this eternal name.
usage_context: Chant as a victory cry, daily exclamation, or universal greeting among Devi devotees. The simplest and most recognizable invocation in Hinduism.

meaning_en: She who resides in the Jalandhara Peeth (throat chakra region)
meaning_hi: जालन्धर पीठ (विशुद्धि चक्र क्षेत्र) में विराजमान

jālandhara.en: Jalandhara (a Shakti Peeth in Punjab; also: Jalandhara Bandha at the throat)
jālandhara.hi: जालन्धर (पंजाब का एक शक्तिपीठ; जालन्धर बन्ध/कण्ठ बन्ध भी)

modern_context: जालन्धर बन्ध योग में कण्ठ को बन्द करने की क्रिया है जो प्राणायाम में बहुत महत्त्वपूर्ण है। यह विशुद्धि (throat) चक्र को सक्रिय करता है। जालन्धर शक्तिपीठ पंजाब में है। जब गला ख़राब हो, आवाज़ न निकले, या thyroid की समस्या हो, तो इस नाम का जाप कण्ठ पर ध्यान लगाकर करें।
modern_context_en: Jalandhara Bandha in yoga is the chin-lock technique crucial during pranayama. It activates the Vishuddhi (throat) chakra. Jalandhara Shakti Peeth is in Punjab. When the throat is sore, voice is lost, or thyroid problems arise, chant this name while focusing on the throat.
nri_context: When the effort of constantly speaking a foreign language abroad strains your throat and you lose your natural voice, this name heals and protects the Jalandhara centre where your authentic voice resides.
usage_context: Chant during Jalandhara Bandha practice, throat chakra healing, or when visiting Jalandhara Shakti Peeth. Also during voice-related issues and Vishuddhi meditation.

meaning_en: She who resides in the Oddiyana Peeth (the sacred seat in the navel region)
meaning_hi: ओड्याण पीठ (नाभि क्षेत्र का पवित्र स्थान) में निवास करने वाली

oḍyāṇa.en: Oddiyana (a Shakti Peeth; also: Uddiyana Bandha at the navel/abdomen region)
oḍyāṇa.hi: ओड्याण (एक शक्तिपीठ; उड्डियान बन्ध/उदर बन्ध भी)

modern_context: उड्डियान बन्ध योग में उदर (पेट) को भीतर की ओर खींचने की क्रिया है जो मणिपूर चक्र को सक्रिय करती है। कपालभाति और अग्निसार क्रिया में उड्डियान बन्ध अनिवार्य है। जब पाचन कमज़ोर हो, पेट फूले, या ऊर्जा कम लगे, तो इस नाम का जाप उड्डियान बन्ध के साथ करें।
modern_context_en: Uddiyana Bandha in yoga is the technique of drawing the abdomen inward, activating the Manipura chakra. It is essential in Kapalbhati and Agnisara Kriya. When digestion is weak, bloating occurs, or energy feels low, chant this name while practising Uddiyana Bandha.
nri_context: When a sedentary desk job abroad weakens your core and digestion, combining this name with Uddiyana Bandha practice revitalizes the oḍyāṇa centre that powers your physical vitality.
usage_context: Chant during Uddiyana Bandha practice, Manipura chakra activation, or when seeking abdominal strength. Also during Agni-related sadhana.

meaning_en: She who dwells at the Bindu, the sacred centre-point of the Sri Chakra
meaning_hi: बिन्दु (श्री चक्र के पवित्र केन्द्र बिन्दु) में निवास करने वाली

bindu.en: point, dot, the sacred centre-point of Sri Chakra; also: the point between eyebrows
bindu.hi: बिन्दु, श्री चक्र का केन्द्र बिन्दु; भ्रूमध्य बिन्दु भी

modern_context: श्री चक्र के बिल्कुल बीच में एक बिन्दु है जो देवी का परम निवास है। यह बिन्दु इतना सूक्ष्म है कि दिखता नहीं, केवल अनुभव होता है। जब बिन्दी लगाएँ तो जानें कि वह केवल सजावट नहीं, बिन्दुमण्डल का बाहरी प्रतीक है। Sri Yantra में ध्यान लगाते समय दृष्टि अन्ततः केन्द्र बिन्दु पर स्थिर होनी चाहिए।
modern_context_en: At the very centre of the Sri Chakra lies a Bindu that is Devi's supreme dwelling. This Bindu is so subtle it cannot be seen, only experienced. When you apply a bindi, know it is not mere decoration but the external symbol of the Bindu Mandala. During Sri Yantra meditation, the gaze should ultimately rest at the centre point.
nri_context: When wearing a bindi at work abroad feels like a cultural statement, this name elevates it from accessory to spiritual practice: you carry Devi's bindu-maṇḍala on your forehead.
usage_context: Chant during Sri Yantra meditation focusing on the Bindu, when applying bindi, or during Bindu Dhyana. Also during advanced Sri Vidya practice.

meaning_en: She who is worshipped through the secret sequential ritual of inner yajna
meaning_hi: रहस्य (गुप्त) यज्ञ के विधिवत् क्रम से आराधित
modern_context: कुछ पूजाएँ गुप्त रखी जाती हैं क्योंकि उनकी शक्ति प्रचार से कम होती है। श्रीविद्या की अन्तर्पूजा (मानसिक पूजा) ऐसी ही है। जब आप मन ही मन देवी की पूजा करें, बस में बैठे-बैठे या office में, कोई न जाने, वह रहोयाग है। सबसे शक्तिशाली साधना वह है जो कोई न देखे।
modern_context_en: Some pujas are kept secret because their power diminishes with publicity. Sri Vidya's inner worship (mental puja) is one such practice. When you mentally worship Devi, sitting on a bus or at the office, unknown to anyone, that is Rahoyaga. The most powerful sadhana is the one nobody sees.
nri_context: When elaborate external worship is impossible in your overseas office or public space, the raho-yāga of silent internal worship is not a compromise but actually the highest form of practice.
usage_context: Chant during internal (manasik) puja, secret sadhana, or when external worship is not possible. Also during Sri Vidya's Antaryaga practice.

meaning_en: She who is pleased by the secret inner offering of satisfaction
meaning_hi: गुप्त तर्पण (आन्तरिक सन्तुष्टि का अर्पण) से तृप्त होने वाली

tarpaṇa.en: offering that satisfies, libation, act of pleasing

modern_context: तर्पण का अर्थ है सन्तुष्ट करना। पितृतर्पण में पूर्वजों को जल अर्पित करते हैं। लेकिन रहस्तर्पण आन्तरिक है। जब मन ही मन देवी को कृतज्ञता अर्पित करें, बिना किसी बाहरी सामग्री के, बस हृदय से 'धन्यवाद माँ', वह रहस्तर्पण है और देवी उससे तृप्त होती हैं।
modern_context_en: Tarpana means to satisfy. In Pitru Tarpana, water is offered to ancestors. But Rahas Tarpana is internal. When you mentally offer gratitude to Devi, without any external materials, just a heartfelt 'thank you Ma', that is Rahas Tarpana and Devi is satisfied by it.
nri_context: When a silent 'thank you, Ma' rises from your heart after a safe landing, a successful interview, or a child's recovery abroad, that secret inner offering is the purest tarpana.
usage_context: Chant during internal gratitude offering, when external puja materials are unavailable, or during silent thanksgiving. Pairs with name 352 as a secret-worship duo.

meaning_en: She who bestows her grace immediately, without delay
meaning_hi: तत्काल (बिना देरी के) प्रसाद (कृपा) देने वाली

prasādinī.en: bestower of grace, one who grants favour

modern_context: देवी तत्काल प्रसन्न होती हैं, लम्बी waiting list नहीं। जब सच्चे दिल से पुकारें तो response तुरन्त मिलता है। जैसे माँ बच्चे के रोने पर तुरन्त दौड़ती है, बैठकर application process नहीं करती, वैसे ही देवी सद्यःप्रसादिनी हैं। Emergency में 'माँ' बोलें, response instant है।
modern_context_en: Devi is pleased instantly; there is no long waiting list. When called with a sincere heart, the response is immediate. Just as a mother runs to her crying child instantly without processing an application, Devi is Sadyahprasadini. In an emergency, say 'Ma'; the response is instant.
nri_context: When a crisis abroad demands immediate divine help and you cannot wait for elaborate puja, this name is the assurance that a single sincere cry reaches Devi instantly, no rituals required.
usage_context: Chant in emergencies, during urgent prayer, or when immediate grace is needed. Also when faith in divine responsiveness needs strengthening.

meaning_en: She who is the witness of the entire universe
meaning_hi: सम्पूर्ण विश्व की साक्षिणी (देखने वाली)
modern_context: CCTV camera हर जगह है, लेकिन देवी का CCTV ब्रह्माण्ड भर में है। हर कर्म, हर विचार, हर इरादा देवी देख रही हैं। यह डराने के लिए नहीं, बल्कि यह जानने के लिए कि आप कभी अकेले नहीं हैं। अंधेरे कमरे में भी, विदेश में अकेले रहते हुए भी, कोई देख रहा है, कोई ध्यान रख रहा है।
modern_context_en: CCTV cameras are everywhere, but Devi's CCTV covers the entire cosmos. Every action, every thought, every intention, Devi is watching. This is not to frighten but to know that you are never alone. Even in a dark room, even living alone abroad, someone is watching, someone is caring.
nri_context: When loneliness abroad makes you feel invisible and insignificant, this name is the profound comfort that an all-seeing divine witness is always watching over you with love.
usage_context: Chant when feeling alone, during Sakshi Bhava meditation, or when ethical accountability is needed. Also during Witness Consciousness practice.

meaning_en: She who is the soul of every being in existence
meaning_hi: सम्पूर्ण अस्तित्व के प्रत्येक प्राणी की आत्मा
modern_context: जब किसी की आँखों में देखें तो वहाँ देवी दिखें, यही सर्वात्मिका का अनुभव है। गाय में, कुत्ते में, चिड़िया में, यहाँ तक कि कीड़े में भी वही आत्मा है जो आप में है। यही कारण है कि अहिंसा हिन्दू धर्म का मूल सिद्धान्त है। जब हर प्राणी में देवी को देखें, तो किसी को कैसे दुख दें?
modern_context_en: When you look into someone's eyes and see Devi, that is the experience of Sarvatmika. In the cow, the dog, the bird, even the insect, the same soul exists that is in you. This is why Ahimsa is Hinduism's foundational principle. When you see Devi in every being, how can you cause anyone pain?
nri_context: When you look at a homeless person, a refugee, or an immigrant from a different country with the same compassion you want for yourself, you are practising Sarvātmikā vision.
usage_context: Chant during compassion meditation, Ahimsa practice, or when cultivating the vision of seeing divinity in all beings. Also during Seva and animal welfare activities.

meaning_en: She who is the embodiment of Existence-Consciousness-Bliss
meaning_hi: सत् (अस्तित्व), चित् (चेतना), आनन्द (परम सुख) का साक्षात् स्वरूप
modern_context: सच्चिदानन्द वेदान्त का सबसे प्रसिद्ध शब्द है जो ब्रह्म का वर्णन करता है: सत् (है), चित् (जानता है), आनन्द (सुखी है)। देवी इन तीनों का स्वरूप हैं। जब कोई पूछे 'ईश्वर क्या है?', तो सरलतम उत्तर है: अस्तित्व, चेतना और आनन्द। आप भी सच्चिदानन्द हैं, बस भूल गए हैं।
modern_context_en: Satchidananda is Vedanta's most famous term describing Brahman: Sat (existence), Chit (consciousness), Ananda (bliss). Devi is the embodiment of all three. When someone asks 'what is God?', the simplest answer is: Existence, Consciousness, and Bliss. You too are Satchidananda; you have merely forgotten.
nri_context: When existential questions arise abroad, 'why am I here? what is the point?', this name answers with three words that contain all of philosophy: you exist (Sat), you are aware (Chit), your nature is joy (Ananda).
usage_context: Chant during Vedanta study, existential contemplation, or as a daily reminder of your true nature. The single most important philosophical name in the entire Sahasranama.

meaning_en: She who is the playful, graceful Mother, Lalita Ambika herself
meaning_hi: ललिता अम्बिका, लीलामयी और करुणामयी माँ स्वयं

lalitā.en: the playful one, the graceful one, the charming one

ambikā.en: Mother (a sacred name for the divine mother)
ambikā.hi: अम्बिका, माँ (दिव्य माता का पवित्र नाम)

modern_context: ललिताम्बिका सम्पूर्ण सहस्रनाम का सार है। 'ललिता' का अर्थ है लीलामयी, सुन्दर, कोमल, और 'अम्बिका' का अर्थ है माँ। वह माँ जो लीला करती है, जो सुन्दर है, जो कोमल है, वही ललिताम्बिका। हर माँ अपने बच्चे के लिए ललिताम्बिका है। यह नाम पूरे सहस्रनाम की अन्तिम पहचान है।
modern_context_en: Lalitambika is the essence of the entire Sahasranama. 'Lalita' means playful, beautiful, tender, and 'Ambika' means Mother. The Mother who plays, who is beautiful, who is tender, that is Lalitambika. Every mother is Lalitambika for her child. This name is the ultimate identity of the entire Sahasranama.
nri_context: When you call your mother in India and her voice alone dissolves every stress of immigrant life, you are hearing Lalitāmbikā speak through the phone across oceans and time zones.
usage_context: Chant as the signature name of the entire Lalita Sahasranama tradition, during concluding prayers, or whenever invoking the Goddess by her most personal name.

meaning_en: She who is golden-hued, radiant like pure gold
meaning_hi: सुवर्ण (सोने) के समान वर्ण (रंग) वाली
modern_context: सोने का रंग भारतीय संस्कृति में सबसे शुभ है। देवी की मूर्तियाँ अक्सर स्वर्ण वर्ण की होती हैं। दीपावली पर जब सोने के आभूषण पहनें और दीयों की सुनहरी रोशनी घर भरे, वह हिरण्यवर्णा का दर्शन है। सूर्योदय और सूर्यास्त की सुनहरी आभा भी देवी का ही वर्ण है।
modern_context_en: Gold colour is the most auspicious in Indian culture. Devi's murtis are often golden-hued. On Diwali when wearing gold ornaments and golden diya-light fills the home, that is Hiranyavarna's darshan. The golden glow of sunrise and sunset is also Devi's own hue.
nri_context: When the golden hour of sunset paints a foreign sky in exactly the same hue as the brass diyas back home, geography dissolves: Hiraṇyavarṇā's gold is universal.
usage_context: Chant during golden-hour meditation, Diwali lighting, or when seeking Devi's golden radiance. Also during Suvarnamala (golden garland) puja.

meaning_en: She who is gold itself, the essence of all that is precious
meaning_hi: स्वयं स्वर्ण (सोना), सब बहुमूल्य वस्तुओं का सार

hiraṇyā.en: gold itself, the golden one, the essence of all precious things
hiraṇyā.hi: स्वर्ण स्वरूपा, सोने का सार, सब बहुमूल्य का तत्त्व

modern_context: सोना भारत में केवल धातु नहीं, भावना है। शादी में सोना, दीवाली पर सोना, अक्षय तृतीया पर सोना। लेकिन देवी स्वयं हिरण्या हैं, अर्थात् सोने का भी सार वे हैं। जब RBI gold reserve रखता है, वह भी देवी की सम्पत्ति है। सोने से बढ़कर सम्पत्ति देवी की कृपा है जो सोने से नहीं ख़रीदी जा सकती।
modern_context_en: Gold in India is not just a metal but a sentiment. Gold at weddings, gold on Diwali, gold on Akshaya Tritiya. But Devi herself is Hiranya, the essence of gold. When the RBI holds gold reserves, that too is Devi's wealth. Greater than gold is Devi's grace, which gold cannot buy.
nri_context: When you lock away gold jewellery in a foreign bank vault for safekeeping, remember that the real Hiraṇyā, the golden essence of prosperity, is the Devi you carry in your heart, not in any vault.
usage_context: Chant on Akshaya Tritiya, Dhanteras, or when dealing with gold and precious metals. Also during Hiranyagarbha meditation and wealth-related pujas. A fitting 360th name marking one full circle.

meaning_en: She who has golden eyes that see all with equal radiance
meaning_hi: सुवर्ण (सोने) जैसी दीप्तिमान आँखों वाली
modern_context: सोने की आँखें अर्थात् वह दृष्टि जो सब पर समान रूप से चमकती है, न किसी को कम, न ज़्यादा। जब शिक्षक कक्षा में हर बच्चे को बराबर ध्यान दे, rank 1 वाले को भी और last bench वाले को भी, वह हिरण्याक्षी दृष्टि है। जब माँ अपने सब बच्चों को एक सा प्यार करे, वह भी यही है।
modern_context_en: Golden eyes mean a gaze that shines equally on all, not more on one, not less on another. When a teacher gives equal attention to every student, rank 1 and the last bench alike, that is Hiranyakshi vision. When a mother loves all her children equally, that too is this quality.
nri_context: When you look at people from every background abroad with the same warmth you would show to someone from your own community, your eyes carry the golden equality of Hiraṇyākṣī.
