usage_context: Chant when cultivating equal vision, during Samadarshana meditation, or when teaching children fairness. Also during Netra Puja.

meaning_en: She who wears a garland of gold
meaning_hi: सोने की माला पहनने वाली
modern_context: भारतीय विवाह में वरमाला स्वर्ण पुष्पों से भी बनती है। जब दूल्हे-दुल्हन एक-दूसरे को माला पहनाएँ, वह क्षण हेममालिनी का प्रतीक है। दक्षिण भारत में मन्दिरों में देवी को भारी सोने की माला चढ़ाई जाती है। तिरुपति और पद्मनाभस्वामी मन्दिर के स्वर्ण भण्डार देवी की सम्पत्ति के बाहरी प्रतीक हैं।
modern_context_en: In Indian weddings the varmala can be made of golden flowers. When bride and groom exchange garlands, that moment symbolizes Hemamalini. In South Indian temples, heavy gold garlands are offered to Devi. The gold treasures of Tirupati and Padmanabhaswamy temples are external symbols of Devi's wealth.
nri_context: When you drape a simple gold chain on Devi's photo at your overseas altar because you cannot afford the heavy temple garlands, that humble hema-mālā carries equal devotion.
usage_context: Chant during gold garland offerings, wedding varmala ceremonies, or when visiting wealthy temple treasuries. Also during Dhanteras shopping.

meaning_en: She who increases wealth and grain (material prosperity)
meaning_hi: धन और धान्य (अन्न-सम्पदा) की वृद्धि करने वाली
modern_context: धन-धान्य भारतीय परिवार की सबसे बड़ी प्रार्थना है। 'धन-धान्य से भरा रहे, इस घर में सदा उजाला रहे', यह गृह प्रवेश की कामना है। किसान जब खेत में बीज बोए, दुकानदार जब नई दुकान खोले, startup founder जब funding raise करे, सबको धनधान्यविवर्धिनी का आशीर्वाद चाहिए।
modern_context_en: Dhana-Dhanya is every Indian family's foremost prayer. 'May this home always be full of wealth and grain, may light always prevail here' is the Griha Pravesh wish. When a farmer sows seeds, a shopkeeper opens a new store, or a startup founder raises funding, all need Dhanadhanyavivardhini's blessing.
nri_context: When your first overseas paycheck feels both enormous and insufficient, and you wonder how to grow it while sending money home, this name is the prayer for financial multiplication in both directions.
usage_context: Chant during business inaugurations, Griha Pravesh, harvest festivals like Pongal and Baisakhi, or when seeking financial growth. Also during Lakshmi puja.

meaning_en: She who is fond of the learned and the wise
meaning_hi: विप्रों (विद्वानों, ज्ञानियों) से प्रेम करने वाली

vipra.en: the learned, the wise, scholars (also: Brahmins in the original sense of 'knowers of Brahman')

modern_context: विप्र का मूल अर्थ ज्ञानी है, जाति नहीं। जो कोई भी विद्या का साधक है, चाहे किसी भी पृष्ठभूमि का हो, वह विप्र है। IIT का professor, गाँव का सम्मानित वैद्य, या किसी भी विषय का विशेषज्ञ, सब विप्र हैं। देवी विप्रप्रिया हैं, अर्थात् ज्ञान को सम्मान देने वालों से उन्हें प्रेम है।
modern_context_en: Vipra originally means 'the learned', not a caste. Anyone who is a seeker of knowledge, regardless of background, is a Vipra. An IIT professor, a respected village Vaidya, or an expert in any field, all are Vipra. Devi is Viprapriya, meaning she loves those who honour knowledge.
nri_context: When you invest in your child's education abroad, attend lectures, read voraciously, or mentor others in your expertise, you become the vipra that Devi loves.
usage_context: Chant on Teacher's Day, during Guru Purnima, or when honouring scholars and educators. Also during Saraswati puja and academic ceremonies.

meaning_en: She who manifests in the form of the wise and the learned
meaning_hi: विद्वानों और ज्ञानियों के रूप में प्रकट होने वाली
modern_context: देवी स्वयं विद्वानों के रूप में प्रकट होती हैं। APJ Abdul Kalam जो गाँव के ग़रीब बच्चे से राष्ट्रपति बने, उनमें विप्ररूपा दिखती हैं। हर गुरु जो निस्वार्थ भाव से ज्ञान बाँटे, उसमें देवी का विप्ररूप है। जब कोई बुज़ुर्ग पार्क में बच्चों को कहानी सुनाए, वह भी विप्ररूपा हैं।
modern_context_en: Devi herself manifests as the learned. APJ Abdul Kalam, who rose from a poor village boy to the President, reflects Viprarupa. Every guru who selflessly shares knowledge embodies Devi's Vipra form. When an elder tells stories to children in a park, that elder is Viprarupa too.
nri_context: The volunteer who teaches weekend Hindi classes to diaspora children, or the retired engineer who mentors young immigrants, is Devi appearing in Viprarūpā to serve the community.
usage_context: Chant when recognizing Devi in teachers, during knowledge-sharing activities, or when honouring mentors. Also during Vyasa Puja.

meaning_en: She who causes the entire universe to spin and revolve
meaning_hi: सम्पूर्ण विश्व को घुमाने (भ्रमण कराने) वाली

kāriṇī.en: causer, doer, one who makes happen

modern_context: पृथ्वी अपनी धुरी पर घूमती है (दिन-रात), सूर्य के चारों ओर घूमती है (ऋतुएँ), आकाशगंगा भी घूमती है। यह सब भ्रमण देवी की शक्ति से है। Physics में angular momentum और gravity ये सब explain करती है, लेकिन 'किसने शुरू किया?' का उत्तर science के पास नहीं। देवी ने।
modern_context_en: Earth spins on its axis (day-night), revolves around the sun (seasons), the Milky Way also rotates. All this spinning is Devi's power. Physics explains angular momentum and gravity, but 'who started it?' is a question science cannot answer. Devi did.
nri_context: When jet lag from crossing time zones reminds you that the Earth is actually spinning, that visceral experience of the planet's rotation connects you to Viśvabhramaṇakāriṇī's cosmic choreography.
usage_context: Chant during astronomical contemplation, when studying planetary motion, or during parikrama (circumambulation) of temples. Also during Pradakshina.

meaning_en: She who swallows the entire universe at the time of dissolution
meaning_hi: प्रलय काल में सम्पूर्ण विश्व को निगल लेने वाली
modern_context: प्रलय में देवी सम्पूर्ण सृष्टि को अपने भीतर समेट लेती हैं जैसे माँ बच्चे को गोद में समेट ले। यह विनाश नहीं, विश्राम है। Black hole जो तारों को निगलता है, वह भी विश्वग्रासा का एक scientific प्रतीक है। हर रात की नींद भी एक छोटा प्रलय है जहाँ जाग्रत संसार विलीन हो जाता है।
modern_context_en: During dissolution Devi absorbs the entire creation within herself, like a mother gathering her child into her lap. This is not destruction but rest. A black hole swallowing stars is also a scientific symbol of Vishvagrasa. Every night's sleep is a mini-dissolution where the waking world dissolves.
nri_context: When an entire chapter of your life abroad closes, a city you loved, a job you cherished, a community you built, it is Viśvagrāsā absorbing what was so something new can be born.
usage_context: Chant during contemplation of cosmic cycles, when accepting endings, or during Pralaya meditation. Also during Mahashivaratri's dissolution theme.

meaning_en: She who glows with the lustre of fresh coral
meaning_hi: ताज़े मूँगे (प्रवाल) की आभा वाली
modern_context: मूँगा (coral) समुद्र से आता है और ज्योतिष में मंगल ग्रह का रत्न है जो साहस और ऊर्जा देता है। देवी का मूँगे जैसा लाल-गुलाबी वर्ण ऊर्जा और जीवन्तता का प्रतीक है। जब सुबह की लालिमा आकाश में फैले या गाल स्वास्थ्य से लाल हों, वह विद्रुमाभा है। मंगलवार को इस नाम का जाप विशेष है।
modern_context_en: Coral comes from the sea and is Mars' gemstone in Jyotish, granting courage and energy. Devi's coral-like pinkish-red hue symbolizes vitality and liveliness. When morning redness spreads across the sky or cheeks glow rosy with health, that is Vidrumabha. Chanting this name on Tuesdays is especially powerful.
nri_context: When the harsh climate abroad drains colour from your face and vitality from your spirit, this name restores the coral-glow of health and energy from within.
usage_context: Chant on Tuesdays (Mangalvar), when seeking vitality, or during coral-related Jyotish remedies. Also during Mangal Dosh Nivaran puja.

meaning_en: She who is Vaishnavi, the supreme power of Lord Vishnu
meaning_hi: वैष्णवी, भगवान विष्णु की परम शक्ति

vaiṣṇavī.en: Vaishnavi (Vishnu's Shakti; one of the Sapta Matrikas; the feminine power of preservation)
vaiṣṇavī.hi: वैष्णवी (विष्णु की शक्ति; सप्तमातृका में से एक; पालन की स्त्री शक्ति)

modern_context: वैष्णवी सप्तमातृकाओं में से एक हैं और विष्णु की शक्ति हैं। वे शंख, चक्र, गदा, पद्म धारण करती हैं। वैष्णो देवी (कटरा, जम्मू) का प्रसिद्ध मन्दिर इसी नाम से जुड़ा है। हर साल करोड़ों श्रद्धालु 13 किमी की पैदल यात्रा करके वैष्णो देवी के दर्शन करते हैं।
modern_context_en: Vaishnavi is one of the Sapta Matrikas and Vishnu's Shakti. She holds the conch, discus, mace, and lotus. The famous Vaishno Devi temple (Katra, Jammu) is connected to this name. Every year crores of devotees trek 13 km on foot for Vaishno Devi's darshan.
nri_context: When homesickness peaks, many NRI families plan their India trip around a Vaishno Devi yatra, making that 13 km climb the spiritual highlight of their homecoming.
usage_context: Chant during Vaishno Devi yatra, Sapta Matrika puja, or when seeking Vishnu's preserving power. Also during Navratri's second day worship.

meaning_en: She who embodies the form of Vishnu the preserver
meaning_hi: विष्णु (पालनकर्ता) का रूप धारण करने वाली
modern_context: विष्णु का अर्थ है 'विश्वं व्याप्नोति इति विष्णुः', जो विश्व में व्याप्त है। देवी स्वयं विष्णुरूपिणी हैं, अर्थात् पालन-शक्ति वे ही हैं। जब सरकार जनता की सेवा करे, जब NGO ग़रीबों को खाना खिलाए, जब doctor मरीज़ बचाए, सब विष्णुरूपिणी का कार्य कर रहे हैं।
modern_context_en: Vishnu means 'Vishvam Vyapnoti Iti Vishnuh', the one who pervades the universe. Devi herself is Vishnurupini, meaning the preserving power is she. When government serves people, when NGOs feed the poor, when doctors save patients, all are doing Vishnurupini's work.
nri_context: When you volunteer at a food bank abroad or donate to disaster relief, you are channelling Viṣṇurūpiṇī's preserving and sustaining energy across borders.
usage_context: Chant during Vishnu puja, seva activities, or when seeking protection and sustenance. Also during Ekadashi and Vaishnava festivals.

meaning_en: She who is unborn, not originating from any womb or source
meaning_hi: अयोनि, किसी भी योनि (गर्भ) या स्रोत से उत्पन्न नहीं, स्वयंभू
modern_context: हर प्राणी किसी से जन्मा है, लेकिन देवी अयोनि हैं, कहीं से नहीं जन्मीं। वे स्वयंभू हैं। Big Bang से पहले क्या था? वही अयोनि तत्त्व। जब बच्चा पूछे 'भगवान को किसने बनाया?', तो उत्तर है 'कोई नहीं, वे अयोनि हैं, स्वयं से हैं।' यह दर्शन का सबसे मूलभूत प्रश्न और उत्तर है।
modern_context_en: Every being is born from something, but Devi is Ayoni, born from nothing. She is self-existent. What existed before the Big Bang? That Ayoni principle. When a child asks 'who made God?', the answer is 'no one; she is Ayoni, self-originated.' This is philosophy's most fundamental question and answer.
nri_context: When you have rebuilt yourself from nothing abroad, with no inherited advantages, no connections, no prior foundation, that self-made quality echoes the Ayoni principle of arising from no prior source.
usage_context: Chant during philosophical contemplation of origins, when discussing creation with children, or during meditation on the uncaused cause.

meaning_en: She who is the abode and source of all creation
meaning_hi: सम्पूर्ण सृष्टि की योनि (उत्पत्ति स्थान) और निवास
modern_context: पिछला नाम (371) कहता है देवी अयोनि हैं (कहीं से नहीं जन्मीं), और यह नाम कहता है वे योनिनिलया हैं (सबकी उत्पत्ति का स्थान)। यह विरोधाभास नहीं बल्कि पूर्णता है: स्वयं अजन्मा होते हुए सबको जन्म देना। माँ बच्चे को जन्म देती है लेकिन माँ का 'माँपन' कहाँ से जन्मा? वह स्वयंसिद्ध है।
modern_context_en: The previous name (371) says Devi is Ayoni (unborn), and this name says she is Yoninilaya (the source of all birth). This is not contradiction but completeness: being unborn yet giving birth to all. A mother births a child, but where was the mother's 'motherhood' born from? It is self-existent.
nri_context: When you create a new family, a new home, a new community abroad that becomes the source for others, you embody the paradox of this name: originating from displacement yet becoming the origin for others.
usage_context: Chant during fertility prayers, Garbhadana samskara, or when contemplating the paradox of the uncreated creator. Pairs with name 371 as a philosophical duo.

meaning_en: She who is immovable and unchanging like the anvil
meaning_hi: कूटस्थ, निहाई (anvil) की भाँति अचल और अपरिवर्तनशील
modern_context: लोहार की निहाई (anvil) पर हथौड़े की मार पड़ती है लेकिन निहाई नहीं बदलती, लोहा बदलता है। देवी कूटस्था हैं: संसार बदलता रहता है लेकिन वे अचल हैं। जब share market गिरे, सरकार बदले, मौसम बदले, सब बदलता है लेकिन सत्य (देवी) नहीं बदलता। यही गीता का 'कूटस्थ' सिद्धान्त है।
modern_context_en: A blacksmith's anvil takes hammer blows but never changes; the iron changes. Devi is Kutastha: the world keeps changing but she remains immovable. Markets crash, governments change, seasons shift, everything changes but truth (Devi) does not. This is the Gita's 'Kutastha' principle.
nri_context: When everything around you abroad changes constantly, jobs, cities, friends, policies, the unchanging kūṭastha within you, your core values and identity, is what Devi represents.
usage_context: Chant during equanimity practice, Gita Chapter 6 study, or when seeking stability amidst constant change. Also during Sthitaprajna (steady-minded) meditation.

meaning_en: She who is the embodiment of the entire Kula (family, lineage, and tradition)
meaning_hi: सम्पूर्ण कुल (परिवार, वंश और परम्परा) का स्वरूप

kula.en: family, lineage, tradition, the Shakta Kula path

modern_context: कुल का अर्थ परिवार है और देवी स्वयं कुलरूपिणी हैं, अर्थात् परिवार ही देवी का रूप है। जब पूरा परिवार एक साथ बैठकर भोजन करे, जब दिवाली पर सब मिलकर पटाखे जलाएँ, जब शादी में सब नाचें, वह कुलरूपिणी का दर्शन है। परिवार बिखरना देवी का अपमान है।
modern_context_en: Kula means family and Devi herself is Kularupini, meaning family itself is Devi's form. When the whole family eats together, when everyone lights fireworks on Diwali, when all dance at a wedding, that is Kularupini's darshan. A family breaking apart is an affront to Devi.
nri_context: When you gather your small overseas family for a Sunday meal and insist everyone puts their phones away to talk, that deliberate act of family-building is worshipping Kularūpiṇī.
usage_context: Chant during family gatherings, Kula Devi puja, or when seeking to strengthen family bonds. Also during Pitru Paksha and family reunions.

meaning_en: She who loves the assembly of spiritual heroes and warriors of devotion
meaning_hi: वीरों (आध्यात्मिक योद्धाओं, भक्ति के वीरों) की सभा से प्रेम करने वाली
modern_context: वीरगोष्ठी का अर्थ है साहसी लोगों की सभा। जब Kargil के जवान एक साथ बैठकर देशभक्ति गाएँ, जब cancer survivors का support group मिले, जब startup founders networking event में अनुभव बाँटें, सब वीरगोष्ठी हैं। देवी ऐसी सभाओं से प्रसन्न होती हैं जहाँ वीर एक-दूसरे को प्रेरित करें।
modern_context_en: Viragoshthi means an assembly of the brave. When Kargil soldiers sing patriotic songs together, when cancer survivors meet in a support group, when startup founders share experiences at networking events, all are Viragoshthi. Devi is pleased by gatherings where heroes inspire each other.
nri_context: When Indian professionals abroad form mentorship circles, or immigrant women create support groups to share their unique challenges, those brave assemblies are the vīragoṣṭhī this name celebrates.
usage_context: Chant during satsang, veteran meetings, support group gatherings, or when forming communities of mutual encouragement. Also during Vira Sadhana.

meaning_en: She who is the supreme heroine, the bravest of all
meaning_hi: परम वीरा (वीरांगना), सबसे साहसी

vīrā.en: heroine, the brave one, the valiant

modern_context: वीरा नाम ही शक्ति का प्रतीक है। रानी लक्ष्मीबाई, रानी चेन्नम्मा, रानी दुर्गावती, सब वीरांगनाएँ देवी का रूप थीं। आज Kalpana Chawla (अन्तरिक्ष), Mary Kom (boxing), PV Sindhu (badminton) सब आधुनिक वीराएँ हैं। हर लड़की जो दुनिया से लड़कर अपना सपना पूरा करे, वह वीरा है।
modern_context_en: The name Vira itself symbolizes power. Rani Lakshmibai, Rani Chennamma, Rani Durgavati, all warrior queens were Devi's forms. Today Kalpana Chawla (space), Mary Kom (boxing), PV Sindhu (badminton) are all modern Viras. Every girl who fights the world to fulfil her dream is a Vira.
nri_context: Every immigrant woman who navigates a foreign country alone, builds a career, raises bilingual children, and maintains her identity is a vīrā whose bravery this name honours.
usage_context: Chant on Women's Day, during sports events, or when celebrating women warriors. Also during Vira Puja and Republic Day.

meaning_en: She who embodies the state beyond all karma and its fruits
meaning_hi: सभी कर्म और उसके फल से परे की अवस्था का स्वरूप

naiṣkarmyā.en: the state beyond action and its consequences; actionlessness that comes through perfect action (Gita concept)
naiṣkarmyā.hi: कर्म और उसके परिणाम से परे; पूर्ण कर्म से आने वाली निष्क्रियता (गीता सिद्धान्त)

modern_context: नैष्कर्म्य गीता का गहनतम सिद्धान्त है: कर्म करो लेकिन कर्म का बन्धन न हो। जैसे doctor operation करे, पूरे मन से करे, लेकिन result patient के भाग्य और देवी की इच्छा पर छोड़ दे। जब cricket team पूरी मेहनत करे और result 'ऊपरवाले के हाथ में' छोड़ दे, वही नैष्कर्म्य है।
modern_context_en: Naishkarmya is the Gita's deepest principle: act but do not be bound by action. Like a doctor who performs surgery with full focus but leaves the result to the patient's destiny and Devi's will. When a cricket team gives their all and leaves the result to the 'one above', that is Naishkarmya.
nri_context: When you have given your absolute best to a job application, interview, or project abroad and the result is out of your hands, surrendering that outcome is practising naiṣkarmya yoga.
usage_context: Chant during Karma Yoga practice, Gita Chapter 3-5 study, or when detaching from outcomes. Also during post-action surrender meditation.

meaning_en: She who is the embodiment of Nada, the primordial cosmic sound
meaning_hi: नाद (आदि ब्रह्माण्डीय ध्वनि) का स्वरूप

nāda.en: primordial sound, cosmic vibration, the unstruck sound
nāda.hi: नाद, आदि ध्वनि, ब्रह्माण्डीय कम्पन, अनाहत नाद

modern_context: ॐ आदि नाद है जिससे सृष्टि हुई। नाद योग में कान बन्द करके भीतर की ध्वनि सुनने का अभ्यास होता है। शंख की ध्वनि, मन्दिर की घण्टी, और ॐ का उच्चारण सब नाद के बाहरी रूप हैं। Scientists ने Big Bang की echo (Cosmic Microwave Background) खोजी है, वह भी आदि नाद का वैज्ञानिक प्रमाण है।
modern_context_en: Om is the primordial nada from which creation emerged. In Nada Yoga, one practises listening to the inner sound with ears closed. The conch sound, temple bell, and Om chanting are all external forms of nada. Scientists discovered the Big Bang's echo (Cosmic Microwave Background), which is scientific evidence of the primordial nada.
nri_context: When the sound of a temple bell in a video from home makes you pause mid-work abroad and your eyes close involuntarily, that nāda has travelled through digital waves to touch your soul.
usage_context: Chant during Nada Yoga, sound meditation, or when listening to sacred music. Also during Conch (Shankha) puja and OM meditation.

meaning_en: She who transcends all names and forms
meaning_hi: सभी नामों और रूपों से परे
modern_context: यह नाम विरोधाभासी लगता है: हम 1000 नाम पढ़ रहे हैं उस देवी के जो नाम-रूप से परे हैं! लेकिन यही सत्य है। नाम सीढ़ी है, मंज़िल नहीं। 1000 नाम पढ़कर अन्त में उस अनाम तत्त्व को जानना है। जैसे नाव से नदी पार करें और फिर नाव छोड़ दें, वैसे ही नामों से परमतत्त्व तक पहुँचें और नाम छोड़ दें।
modern_context_en: This name seems paradoxical: we are reading 1000 names of the one who is beyond names and forms! But that is the truth. Names are the ladder, not the destination. After reading 1000 names, ultimately know that nameless essence. Like crossing a river by boat and then leaving the boat, reach the supreme through names and then transcend them.
nri_context: When your identity abroad gets reduced to labels, 'Indian', 'immigrant', 'Hindu', 'engineer', this name frees you from all labels: your essence is nāmarūpavivarjita, beyond any tag.
usage_context: Chant at the end of Sahasranama recitation, during Nirguna meditation, or when moving from form to formless worship. One of the most paradoxically profound names.

meaning_en: She who is the power behind the sacred syllable Hrim
meaning_hi: 'ह्रीं' बीज मन्त्र की शक्ति स्वरूपा

hrīṃ.en: Hrim (the Shakti bija mantra; Maya bija; the seed syllable of the Goddess)
hrīṃ.hi: ह्रीं (शक्ति बीज मन्त्र; माया बीज; देवी का बीजाक्षर)

modern_context: ह्रीं देवी का सबसे शक्तिशाली बीज मन्त्र है। श्रीविद्या में पंचदशी मन्त्र के तीनों कूटों का अन्त ह्रीं से होता है। यह एक syllable में पूरी देवी समा जाती हैं। जब समय कम हो और लम्बा मन्त्र न बोल सकें, तो बस 'ह्रीं' बोल दें। यह shortest और most powerful mantra है।
modern_context_en: Hrim is Devi's most powerful bija mantra. In Sri Vidya, all three kutas of the Panchadashi mantra end with Hrim. The entire Goddess fits within this single syllable. When time is short and you cannot chant a long mantra, just say 'Hrim'. It is the shortest and most powerful mantra.
nri_context: When you have only seconds between meetings abroad for a prayer, one silent 'Hrīṃ' carries the entire power of the Goddess in a single syllable that takes less than a breath.
usage_context: Chant during Bija Mantra japa, Sri Vidya sadhana, or as the quickest invocation of Devi. Also during Panchadashi mantra practice.

meaning_en: She who possesses divine modesty and the power of Hrim
meaning_hi: ह्री (दिव्य लज्जा, शालीनता) और ह्रीं शक्ति से सम्पन्न

hrī.en: modesty, divine shame, sacred femininity; also: the bija Hrim
hrī.hi: ह्री, लज्जा, शालीनता, दिव्य स्त्रीत्व; ह्रीं बीज भी

modern_context: ह्री का अर्थ शालीनता और गरिमा है। भारतीय संस्कृति में लज्जा को स्त्री का आभूषण कहा गया है, लेकिन इसका अर्थ डर नहीं, बल्कि self-respect है। जब बड़ों के सामने विनम्रता से बात करें, जब सफलता के बाद घमण्ड न करें, वह ह्री है। Modesty कमज़ोरी नहीं, शक्ति है।
modern_context_en: Hri means dignity and modesty. In Indian culture, lajja is called a woman's ornament, but it does not mean fear; it means self-respect. Speaking humbly before elders, not boasting after success, that is Hri. Modesty is not weakness but strength.
nri_context: When success abroad tempts you to show off on social media or at community gatherings, the hrī quality is the quiet dignity of achievement without display.
usage_context: Chant when cultivating modesty, during Hrim mantra japa, or when seeking the balance between confidence and humility. Also during Lalita-specific sadhana.

meaning_en: She who dwells in the heart and is deeply pleasing to the heart
meaning_hi: हृदय में निवास करने वाली और हृदय को अत्यन्त प्रिय

hṛdyā.en: dwelling in the heart; pleasing to the heart; beloved of the heart
hṛdyā.hi: हृदय में रहने वाली; हृदय को प्रिय; दिल को भाने वाली

modern_context: हृद्य का अर्थ है जो दिल को भाए। जब कोई भजन सुनकर आँखें भर आएँ, जब बच्चे की पहली मुस्कान देखकर दिल पिघले, जब पुरानी तस्वीर देखकर nostalgia आए, वह सब हृद्य अनुभव है। देवी हृद्या हैं, अर्थात् वे हृदय में रहती हैं और हृदय को सबसे अधिक प्रिय हैं।
modern_context_en: Hridya means that which touches the heart. When a bhajan brings tears, when a baby's first smile melts you, when an old photograph triggers nostalgia, all are hridya experiences. Devi is Hridya; she lives in the heart and is the heart's greatest love.
nri_context: When the taste of home-cooked dal abroad, exactly like your mother makes it, creates a lump in your throat, that hṛdya moment is Devi stirring in your heart across the distance.
usage_context: Chant during heart-centred meditation, Anahata chakra focus, or when experiencing deeply moving emotions. Also during Hridaya (heart) meditation.

meaning_en: She who is beyond all that should be rejected or accepted
meaning_hi: हेय (त्याज्य) और उपादेय (ग्राह्य) दोनों से परे

heya.en: that which should be rejected, discarded

upādeya.en: that which should be accepted, adopted

modern_context: Marie Kondo कहती हैं 'यह spark joy करता है तो रखो, नहीं तो छोड़ो'। लेकिन देवी reject-accept दोनों से परे हैं। जब mindset इतना परिपक्व हो कि न कुछ पकड़ने की ज़रूरत लगे, न छोड़ने की, वह मुक्ति है। Shopping mall में बिना कुछ ख़रीदे और बिना regret के बाहर आना भी एक छोटी मुक्ति है।
modern_context_en: Marie Kondo says 'if it sparks joy keep it, otherwise discard it'. But Devi is beyond both reject and accept. When the mindset matures to the point where neither holding nor releasing feels necessary, that is liberation. Walking out of a shopping mall without buying anything and without regret is also a small liberation.
nri_context: When the immigrant's constant calculation of 'should I keep this Indian habit or adopt that Western one?' finally dissolves into effortless flow, you have touched the heyopādeya-free state.
usage_context: Chant during advanced non-dual meditation, when the accept-reject game exhausts you, or during Neti-Neti (not this, not that) practice.

meaning_en: She who is worshipped by Kubera, the king of kings (lord of wealth)
meaning_hi: राजराज (कुबेर, राजाओं के राजा, धन के स्वामी) द्वारा पूजित

rāja.en: king (of kings = Kubera, lord of wealth)

modern_context: कुबेर देवताओं के कोषाध्यक्ष हैं और वे भी ललिता की पूजा करते हैं। अर्थात् धन का देवता भी धन की देवी के अधीन है। Ambani, Tata, Adani जैसे अरबपति भी मन्दिर जाते हैं, क्योंकि उन्हें पता है कि उनकी सम्पत्ति देवी की कृपा है। जो सबसे अमीर है वह भी देवी का सेवक है।
modern_context_en: Kubera is the treasurer of the gods and even he worships Lalita. This means the god of wealth himself serves the goddess of wealth. Billionaires like Ambani, Tata, and Adani also visit temples because they know their wealth is Devi's grace. Even the richest is Devi's servant.
nri_context: When financial success abroad puts you among the wealthiest in your family or community, this name keeps perspective: Kubera himself, the king of wealth, bows before Devi.
usage_context: Chant during Kubera puja, Dhan Teras, or when seeking or managing great wealth. Also during Ashtalakshmi puja and financial planning with divine perspective.

meaning_en: She who bestows kingdoms and sovereign authority
meaning_hi: राज्य (साम्राज्य, सत्ता) प्रदान करने वाली
modern_context: छत्रपति शिवाजी महाराज ने तुलजा भवानी से प्रेरणा लेकर हिन्दवी स्वराज्य स्थापित किया। देवी राज्यदायिनी ने उन्हें राज्य दिया। आज राज्य का अर्थ चुनाव जीतना भी है। जब कोई सरपंच बने या मुख्यमन्त्री, वह भी राज्यदायिनी की कृपा है। लेकिन सत्ता ज़िम्मेदारी है, विलासिता नहीं।
modern_context_en: Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj drew inspiration from Tulja Bhavani and established Hindavi Swarajya. Devi Rajyadayini gave him the kingdom. Today kingdom means winning elections too. When someone becomes Sarpanch or Chief Minister, that too is Rajyadayini's grace. But power is responsibility, not luxury.
nri_context: When an Indian-origin person wins political office abroad, becoming mayor, council member, or even head of state, that is Rājyadāyinī extending her sovereign grace across continents.
usage_context: Chant when seeking leadership positions, during elections, or before assuming authority. Also during Rajya Lakshmi puja and Shivaji Jayanti.

meaning_en: She who is the beloved of all kingdoms, to whom all sovereignty belongs
meaning_hi: सभी राज्यों की वल्लभा (प्रिया), जिनकी सब सत्ता है
modern_context: राज्यवल्लभा का अर्थ है कि सत्ता देवी को प्रिय है, अर्थात् जहाँ देवी हैं वहाँ सत्ता स्वयं आती है। लक्ष्मी जहाँ जाती हैं, राज्य वहीं होता है। जब कोई company अपने कर्मचारियों का ध्यान रखे, ग्राहकों का सम्मान करे, तो market leadership (राज्य) स्वयं आता है।
modern_context_en: Rajyavallabha means sovereignty is dear to Devi, meaning where Devi is, power naturally follows. Where Lakshmi goes, the kingdom is. When a company cares for employees and respects customers, market leadership (rajya) comes naturally.
nri_context: When your sincere work ethic abroad naturally leads to promotions and recognition without aggressive self-promotion, that is Rājyavallabhā drawing sovereignty towards you.
usage_context: Chant when seeking natural authority and leadership, during business strategy sessions, or when cultivating the qualities that attract power. Also during Rajya Lakshmi puja.

meaning_en: She whose grace shines resplendently like a radiant king
meaning_hi: जिनकी कृपा राजसी वैभव से चमकती है
modern_context: देवी की कृपा छिपी नहीं, चमकती है। जब अचानक बहुत बड़ी समस्या हल हो जाए बिना किसी प्रयास के, जब impossible लगने वाली बात हो जाए, वह राजत्कृपा है। जैसे अँधेरे कमरे में अचानक बत्ती जल जाए और सब कुछ स्पष्ट हो जाए, वैसे ही देवी की कृपा एक क्षण में सब बदल देती है।
modern_context_en: Devi's grace is not hidden; it shines. When a massive problem suddenly resolves without effort, when the impossible happens, that is Rajatkrupa. Like a light suddenly switching on in a dark room making everything clear, Devi's grace can change everything in a single moment.
nri_context: When an impossible visa situation abroad suddenly resolves, or a dream job appears from nowhere at exactly the right moment, that dazzling intervention is Rājatkṛpā shining through.
usage_context: Chant when acknowledging miraculous interventions, during thanksgiving prayers, or when grace manifests unmistakably. Also during Kripa meditation.

meaning_en: She who seats her devotees upon royal thrones of sovereignty
meaning_hi: अपने भक्तों (आश्रितों) को राजसिंहासन पर बैठाने वाली
modern_context: देवी अपने भक्तों को ऊँचे पद पर बैठाती हैं। शिवाजी को माँ ने राजसिंहासन दिया, राम को माँ कौशल्या ने राजतिलक किया। जब माँ बेटे/बेटी को IAS बनते देखे, या PhD ceremony में cap पहनते देखे, वह माँ का अपने बच्चे को सिंहासन पर बैठाना है।
modern_context_en: Devi seats her devotees on high thrones. Mother gave Shivaji the royal throne; Mother Kaushalya anointed Rama. When a mother watches her child become an IAS officer, or wear the cap at a PhD ceremony, that is a mother seating her child on the throne.
nri_context: When your mother watches your graduation ceremony abroad via video call, tears streaming, and you walk across the stage, Devi herself is seating her āśrita upon the rāja-pīṭha through a mother's pride.
usage_context: Chant during graduation ceremonies, job promotions, or when receiving honours. Also during Rajyabhishek-themed celebrations and achievement milestones.

meaning_en: She who is the Lakshmi (fortune) of all kingdoms and governance
meaning_hi: राज्य (शासन) की लक्ष्मी (भाग्यदेवी)

lakṣmī.en: Lakshmi (fortune, prosperity, the goddess of wealth)

modern_context: अष्टलक्ष्मी में राज्यलक्ष्मी वह रूप हैं जो शासन और सत्ता की समृद्धि देती हैं। भारत जब G20 की अध्यक्षता करे या UN में महत्त्वपूर्ण भूमिका निभाए, वह राज्यलक्ष्मी की कृपा है। गाँव की पंचायत से लेकर संसद तक, हर शासन-संस्था में राज्यलक्ष्मी विराजमान होनी चाहिए।
modern_context_en: Among the Ashtalakshmi, Rajyalakshmi bestows the prosperity of governance and authority. When India chairs the G20 or plays a significant role at the UN, that is Rajyalakshmi's grace. From village panchayat to Parliament, Rajyalakshmi should preside in every governance institution.
nri_context: When Indian-origin leaders abroad shape policy, lead institutions, or influence governance in their adopted countries, Rājyalakṣmī's grace is crossing borders through their leadership.
usage_context: Chant on Republic Day, during elections, or when praying for good governance. Also during Ashtalakshmi puja's Rajyalakshmi section.

meaning_en: She who is the lord of all treasuries and sheaths of existence
meaning_hi: सभी कोशों (भण्डारों और अस्तित्व के आवरणों) की स्वामिनी

kośa.en: treasury, sheath (the five sheaths: Annamaya, Pranamaya, Manomaya, Vijnanamaya, Anandamaya); also: treasure
kośa.hi: कोश, भण्डार; पाँच कोश (अन्नमय, प्राणमय, मनोमय, विज्ञानमय, आनन्दमय); ख़ज़ाना भी

modern_context: कोश के दो अर्थ हैं: ख़ज़ाना और आवरण। RBI का gold reserve एक कोश है, और शरीर के पाँच कोश (अन्नमय से आनन्दमय तक) दूसरे कोश हैं। देवी दोनों की नाथा हैं। वेदान्त में पाँच कोशों को पार करके आत्मा तक पहुँचना ही मोक्ष है। देवी उन सभी कोशों की स्वामिनी और उनके पार की सत्ता हैं।
modern_context_en: Kosha has two meanings: treasury and sheath. RBI's gold reserve is a kosha, and the body's five sheaths (Annamaya to Anandamaya) are another. Devi is lord of both. In Vedanta, transcending all five koshas to reach the Atman is moksha. Devi is the sovereign of all these sheaths and the reality beyond them.
nri_context: When you protect your financial treasury abroad through wise saving and also nurture your five koshas through food, breath, mind, wisdom, and joy, you are honouring Kośanāthā at every level.
usage_context: Chant during Pancha Kosha meditation, when managing finances, or during Taittiriya Upanishad study on the five sheaths. A name bridging material and spiritual wealth.

meaning_en: She who commands the fourfold army of cosmic forces
meaning_hi: चतुरंग (चार अंगों वाली) सेना की ईश्वरी
modern_context: प्राचीन भारत में चतुरंगिणी सेना के चार अंग थे: हाथी, घोड़े, रथ, पैदल। शतरंज (chess) का नाम 'चतुरंग' इसी से आया। देवी इन चारों बलों की ईश्वरी हैं। आज के सन्दर्भ में थल सेना, वायुसेना, नौसेना और cyber forces चतुरंग हैं। गणतन्त्र दिवस की परेड में जब चारों सेनाएँ मार्च करें, वह चतुरंगबलेश्वरी का दर्शन है।
modern_context_en: Ancient India's chaturangini sena had four divisions: elephants, horses, chariots, infantry. Chess ('chaturang') got its name from this. Devi commands all four forces. In modern context, Army, Air Force, Navy, and Cyber forces are the chaturanga. When all four march on Republic Day, that is Chaturangabaleshvari's darshan.
nri_context: When Indian military contingents participate in international exercises abroad or Indian peacekeepers serve under the UN flag, Caturaṅgabaleśvarī's command extends beyond national borders.
usage_context: Chant on Republic Day, Army Day, or when seeking strategic power. Also during chess tournaments and war-strategy contemplation.

meaning_en: She who bestows complete sovereign empire upon her devotees
meaning_hi: सम्पूर्ण साम्राज्य (सार्वभौम सत्ता) प्रदान करने वाली
modern_context: साम्राज्य केवल भूमि का नहीं, किसी भी क्षेत्र में सर्वोच्चता का प्रतीक है। Reliance का business empire, ISRO का space dominance, या Bollywood का cultural empire, सब साम्राज्य हैं। देवी साम्राज्यदायिनी अपने भक्तों को उनके क्षेत्र में सर्वोच्चता देती हैं। लेकिन साम्राज्य ज़िम्मेदारी है, अधिकार नहीं।
modern_context_en: Samrajya is not just of land but symbolizes supremacy in any field. Reliance's business empire, ISRO's space dominance, or Bollywood's cultural empire are all samrajya. Devi Samrajyadayini gives her devotees supremacy in their field. But empire is responsibility, not entitlement.
nri_context: When an Indian-origin person abroad builds a business empire, a tech unicorn, or a cultural institution from scratch, Sāmrājyadāyinī has bestowed her gift across borders.
usage_context: Chant when building enterprises, seeking market dominance, or during business inaugurations. Also during Rajyabhishek-themed celebrations.

meaning_en: She whose resolve is always truthful and whose word never fails
meaning_hi: जिनका संकल्प सदा सत्य है और वचन कभी असफल नहीं होता
modern_context: सत्यसन्ध वह है जिसका वचन कभी न टूटे। राम को 'सत्यसन्ध' कहते हैं क्योंकि पिता का वचन निभाने वनवास गए। आज जब contract sign करें, promise दें, या शादी में सात फेरों के वचन बोलें, तो सत्यसन्ध रहें। देवी स्वयं सत्यसन्धा हैं, उनका वचन अटल है। यही विश्वसनीयता (credibility) का आधार है।
modern_context_en: Satyasandha is one whose word never breaks. Rama is called 'Satyasandha' because he went to exile to honour his father's word. Today when signing contracts, making promises, or taking wedding vows during the seven pheras, be Satyasandha. Devi herself is Satyasandha; her word is unbreakable. This is the foundation of credibility.
nri_context: When your word abroad, to an employer, a landlord, or a friend - carries the same unshakeable weight as a temple vow, you embody Satyasandhā's principle of truth-bound resolve.
usage_context: Chant when making important promises, signing contracts, or during Satya Vrat. Also during Ram Navami when honouring Satya-sandha Rama.

meaning_en: She who wears the oceans as her girdle (waist-belt)
meaning_hi: समुद्रों को अपनी मेखला (करधनी, कमरबन्ध) बनाने वाली
modern_context: पृथ्वी को समुद्र चारों ओर से घेरे हुए हैं जैसे करधनी कमर को। देवी का शरीर पृथ्वी है और समुद्र उनकी मेखला। जब beach पर खड़े होकर समुद्र देखें, तो जानें कि वह देवी की करधनी का एक हिस्सा है। Indian Navy जो 'सागरों की रक्षक' है, वह देवी की मेखला की रक्षा कर रही है।
modern_context_en: Oceans surround Earth like a girdle around the waist. Devi's body is the Earth and oceans are her mekhalā. When standing at the beach watching the ocean, know it is a part of Devi's waist-belt. The Indian Navy, guardian of the seas, is protecting Devi's mekhalā.
nri_context: When you fly across an ocean to reach your new country and look down at the vast blue expanse from the airplane window, you are crossing Sāgaramekhalā's divine girdle.
usage_context: Chant during beach meditations, Navy Day, or when contemplating Earth's geography. Also during Varuna puja and ocean-related rituals.

meaning_en: She who is initiated and consecrated, and who initiates her devotees
meaning_hi: दीक्षित (संस्कारित), और भक्तों को दीक्षा देने वाली

dīkṣitā.en: initiated, consecrated; one who has taken and gives diksha (initiation)
dīkṣitā.hi: दीक्षित, संस्कारित; दीक्षा लेने और देने वाली

modern_context: दीक्षा गुरु-शिष्य परम्परा का मूल है। जब गुरु कान में मन्त्र दें, वह दीक्षा है। श्रीविद्या की दीक्षा, सन्न्यास दीक्षा, या किसी भी आध्यात्मिक मार्ग में प्रवेश दीक्षा से होता है। आज MBA admission, PhD enrollment भी एक प्रकार की दीक्षा है। हर नई शुरुआत एक दीक्षा है।
modern_context_en: Diksha is the foundation of the Guru-Shishya tradition. When a guru whispers a mantra in the ear, that is diksha. Sri Vidya diksha, Sannyasa diksha, or entry into any spiritual path happens through diksha. Today MBA admission, PhD enrollment are also a type of diksha. Every new beginning is an initiation.
nri_context: The moment you stepped off the plane in a new country with a one-way ticket was your dīkṣā into the immigrant path - a consecration through courage that this name honours.
usage_context: Chant during diksha ceremonies, when beginning a new spiritual practice, or during any significant initiation. Also during Guru Purnima diksha events.

meaning_en: She who subdues and pacifies the demons (forces of darkness)
meaning_hi: दैत्यों (अन्धकार की शक्तियों) को शान्त और दमन करने वाली

daitya.en: demons, forces of darkness, sons of Diti

śamanī.hi: शान्त करने वाली, दमन करने वाली

modern_context: दैत्य केवल पौराणिक राक्षस नहीं, बल्कि आन्तरिक दुर्गुण भी हैं: काम, क्रोध, लोभ, मोह, मद, मात्सर्य (छह दैत्य)। बाहरी दैत्य भी हैं: भ्रष्टाचार, हिंसा, अन्याय। दुर्गा सप्तशती में देवी ने महिषासुर, शुम्भ-निशुम्भ सबका वध किया। आज के दैत्य cyber crime, drug mafia, terrorism हैं।
modern_context_en: Daityas are not just mythological demons but internal vices too: lust, anger, greed, delusion, pride, envy (six daityas). External daityas include corruption, violence, injustice. In Durga Saptashati, Devi slew Mahishasura, Shumbha-Nishumbha. Today's daityas are cybercrime, drug mafias, terrorism.
nri_context: When online scammers, identity thieves, or exploitative employers abroad target vulnerable immigrants, invoking Daityaśamanī summons the demon-quelling power to protect the community.
usage_context: Chant during Durga Saptashati recitation, when facing internal or external demons, or during Navratri. Also during Shadripu (six enemies) conquest meditation.

meaning_en: She who brings all worlds under her benevolent sway
meaning_hi: सभी लोकों (संसारों) को अपने वश में करने वाली

vaśaṅkarī.en: one who brings under control, enchantress

modern_context: 14 लोक (भूलोक से सत्यलोक तक) सब देवी के वश में हैं। Social media influencer लाखों followers को 'वश' में करता है, लेकिन देवी तो चौदह लोकों को वश में करती हैं। जब कोई नेता भाषण से लाखों लोगों को प्रेरित करे, वह भी सर्वलोकवशंकरी शक्ति का अंश है। लेकिन यह शक्ति सेवा के लिए है, शोषण के लिए नहीं।
modern_context_en: All 14 lokas (Bhuloka to Satyaloka) are under Devi's sway. A social media influencer controls lakhs of followers, but Devi controls fourteen worlds. When a leader's speech inspires millions, that is a fraction of Sarvalokavashankari's power. But this power is for service, not exploitation.
nri_context: When your influence abroad extends beyond your immediate circle, when your work, writing, or community leadership touches lives across countries, that expanding reach is this name's energy flowing through you.
usage_context: Chant when seeking positive influence, during leadership roles, or when wishing to inspire others. Also during Vashikarana (attraction) meditation for noble purposes.

meaning_en: She who grants all objects and purposes of life
meaning_hi: सभी अर्थ (जीवन के उद्देश्य और वस्तुएँ) प्रदान करने वाली

artha.en: purpose, wealth, meaning, objects of desire (one of the four purusharthas)
artha.hi: अर्थ, उद्देश्य, धन, जीवन का लक्ष्य (चार पुरुषार्थों में से एक)

modern_context: चार पुरुषार्थ हैं: धर्म, अर्थ, काम, मोक्ष। देवी चारों देती हैं। जब नौकरी चाहिए तो अर्थ देती हैं, जब प्रेम चाहिए तो काम देती हैं, जब मार्गदर्शन चाहिए तो धर्म देती हैं, जब मुक्ति चाहिए तो मोक्ष भी। सर्वार्थदात्री का अर्थ है कि आपको अलग-अलग देवताओं के पास जाने की ज़रूरत नहीं, एक देवी सब कुछ दे सकती हैं।
modern_context_en: The four Purusharthas are: Dharma, Artha, Kama, Moksha. Devi gives all four. When you need a job, she gives Artha; when you need love, Kama; when you need guidance, Dharma; when you need liberation, Moksha too. Sarvarthadatri means you do not need different deities; one Devi gives everything.
nri_context: When life abroad demands simultaneous fulfilment of financial goals, relationships, ethical living, and spiritual growth, this one name covers every dimension of the immigrant's prayer.
usage_context: Chant when seeking fulfilment in multiple life areas, during Purushartha contemplation, or as a universal prayer covering all needs. Also during comprehensive Devi puja.

meaning_en: She who is Savitri, the solar goddess, the power behind the Gayatri mantra
meaning_hi: सावित्री, सौर देवी, गायत्री मन्त्र के पीछे की शक्ति

sāvitrī.en: Savitri (the solar goddess; Vedic mother of the Gayatri mantra; also: Satyavan's wife who conquered death)
sāvitrī.hi: सावित्री (सौर देवी; गायत्री मन्त्र की वैदिक माता; सत्यवान की पत्नी जिन्होंने मृत्यु को जीता)

modern_context: गायत्री मन्त्र 'ॐ भूर्भुवः स्वः तत्सवितुर्वरेण्यम्...' सावित्री देवी का ही मन्त्र है। यह विश्व का सबसे अधिक जपा जाने वाला मन्त्र है। जनेऊ (उपनयन) संस्कार में बालक को पहला गायत्री मन्त्र सिखाया जाता है। सावित्री ने यमराज से पति के प्राण वापस लिए, वही स्त्री-शक्ति का सबसे बड़ा उदाहरण है।
modern_context_en: The Gayatri Mantra 'Om Bhur Bhuvah Svah Tat Savitur Varenyam...' is Savitri Devi's own mantra. It is the world's most chanted mantra. During the Upanayana (thread ceremony), a boy is first taught the Gayatri. Savitri won back her husband's life from Yama, the greatest example of feminine power.
nri_context: Teaching your child the Gayatri Mantra abroad, even without a formal Upanayana, keeps Sāvitrī's solar light burning in the next generation across continents.
usage_context: Chant during Gayatri Japa, Upanayana ceremony, Vat Savitri Vrat, or sunrise meditation. One of the most universally important names.

meaning_en: She who is the embodiment of Existence-Consciousness-Bliss (repeated for emphasis at name 400)
meaning_hi: सत्-चित्-आनन्द का साक्षात् स्वरूप (400वें नाम पर पुनः बल के लिए)
modern_context: यह नाम पहले (357) भी आया था और यहाँ 400वें milestone पर दोबारा आता है। सच्चिदानन्द इतना महत्त्वपूर्ण है कि इसे दोहराया जाता है। 400 नाम पढ़कर भी जो एक बात याद रखनी है: देवी अस्तित्व हैं, चेतना हैं, आनन्द हैं। बस। और आप भी वही हैं। यही सम्पूर्ण वेदान्त का सार है।
modern_context_en: This name appeared earlier (357) and returns at the 400th milestone. Satchidananda is so important it bears repetition. After reading 400 names, the one thing to remember: Devi is Existence, Consciousness, Bliss. That is all. And you are the same. This is the entire essence of Vedanta.
nri_context: After 400 names and years of immigrant life, the core truth remains unchanged: you exist (Sat), you are aware (Chit), your nature is joy (Ananda). No visa status can change that.
usage_context: Chant as a milestone reflection at name 400, during Vedanta study, or as the ultimate daily affirmation. The single most important concept in Hindu philosophy, worthy of repetition.

meaning_en: She who is not limited by space or time
meaning_hi: देश (स्थान) और काल (समय) से सीमित नहीं

aparicchinnā.hi: असीमित, अपरिमित, न काटी जा सकने वाली

modern_context: Einstein ने spacetime की सीमाएँ बताईं, लेकिन देवी spacetime से परे हैं। सुबह 5 बजे या रात 11 बजे, भारत में या अमेरिका में, मन्दिर में या kitchen में, देवी हर जगह, हर समय उपलब्ध हैं। 'अभी समय नहीं है पूजा का' या 'यहाँ मन्दिर नहीं है' कोई बहाना नहीं।
modern_context_en: Einstein described the limitations of spacetime, but Devi is beyond spacetime. At 5 AM or 11 PM, in India or America, in a temple or kitchen, Devi is available everywhere, every time. 'There is no time for puja now' or 'there is no temple here' is no excuse.
nri_context: This name is the ultimate answer to every NRI's excuse: Devi is not limited by the time zone you are in, the country you live in, or the language you pray in. She is deśakālāparicchinnā.
usage_context: Chant at any time, in any place, under any circumstance. The name that removes all barriers to worship. Also during spacetime meditation.

meaning_en: She who pervades everywhere, the all-reaching one
meaning_hi: सर्वत्र व्याप्त, सब जगह पहुँचने वाली
modern_context: WiFi signal हर कमरे में पहुँचता है, लेकिन देवी की उपस्थिति WiFi से भी अधिक सर्वव्यापी है। पहाड़ की चोटी पर, समुद्र की गहराई में, और अन्तरिक्ष में भी देवी हैं। जब Chandrayaan चन्द्रमा पर पहुँचे, देवी पहले से वहाँ थीं। जब Voyager अन्तरिक्ष के छोर पर पहुँचे, देवी उसके भी आगे हैं।
modern_context_en: WiFi signal reaches every room, but Devi's presence is more pervasive than WiFi. On mountain peaks, in ocean depths, and in space too, Devi is present. When Chandrayaan reached the moon, Devi was already there. When Voyager reaches the edge of space, Devi is already beyond.
nri_context: No matter where your immigration journey takes you, to the remotest corner of the globe, Sarvagā was there before you arrived, waiting.
usage_context: Chant when feeling Devi's presence everywhere, during nature meditation, or when marvelling at space exploration. Also during Vishvarupa contemplation.

meaning_en: She who enchants all beings with her divine beauty and grace
meaning_hi: अपने दिव्य सौन्दर्य और कृपा से सभी प्राणियों को मोहित करने वाली

mohinī.en: enchantress, one who captivates, the bewitching one
mohinī.hi: मोहिनी, मोहित करने वाली, मन्त्रमुग्ध करने वाली

modern_context: मोहिनी विष्णु का स्त्री रूप है जिसने समुद्र मन्थन के बाद असुरों को मोहित किया। देवी सर्वमोहिनी सबको मोहित करती हैं, लेकिन उनका मोह बाँधता नहीं, मुक्त करता है। जब Garba में लड़कियाँ चनिया-चोली पहनकर नाचें और सब मोहित हों, वह सर्वमोहिनी शक्ति है। सच्चा सौन्दर्य मोहित करता है।
modern_context_en: Mohini is Vishnu's feminine form who enchanted the demons after the ocean-churning. Devi Sarvamohinī captivates everyone, but her enchantment does not bind; it liberates. When girls dance Garba in chaniya-choli and everyone is mesmerized, that is Sarvamohinī Shakti. True beauty enchants.
nri_context: When a diaspora Navratri Garba night fills a foreign hall with colour, music, and spinning dancers, and even non-Indian neighbours are drawn in by the beauty, Sarvamohinī is at work.
usage_context: Chant during Garba, when seeking to charm positively, or during Mohini-related meditation. Also during beauty-appreciation practices and Shringar Rasa cultivation.

meaning_en: She who is Saraswati, the flowing river of knowledge and speech
meaning_hi: सरस्वती, ज्ञान और वाणी की प्रवाहमयी देवी

sarasvatī.en: Saraswati (goddess of knowledge, music, arts; the one who flows like a river of wisdom)
sarasvatī.hi: सरस्वती (विद्या, संगीत, कला की देवी; ज्ञान की नदी की तरह बहने वाली)

modern_context: सरस्वती विद्या, संगीत और कला की देवी हैं। वसन्त पञ्चमी उनका प्रमुख त्यौहार है जब बच्चों को पहली बार अक्षर लिखना सिखाया जाता है (विद्यारम्भ)। देवी ललिता स्वयं सरस्वती भी हैं। हर पुस्तक, हर कलम, हर वीणा सरस्वती का रूप है। जब बच्चा पहली बार 'क ख ग' या 'A B C' लिखे, वह सरस्वती पूजा है।
modern_context_en: Saraswati is the goddess of knowledge, music, and arts. Vasant Panchami is her main festival when children are first taught to write letters (Vidyarambha). Devi Lalita herself is Saraswati too. Every book, every pen, every veena is Saraswati's form. When a child first writes 'ka kha ga' or 'A B C', that is Saraswati puja.
nri_context: Celebrating Saraswati Puja abroad by placing your child's books, laptop, and musical instruments before the altar keeps Sarasvatī's blessing active in a foreign education system.
usage_context: Chant on Vasant Panchami, during Vidyarambha, or before any learning activity. One of the most beloved and universally recognized divine names.

meaning_en: She who is the embodiment of all sacred scriptures
meaning_hi: सभी शास्त्रों (पवित्र ग्रन्थों) का स्वरूप
modern_context: वेद, उपनिषद, पुराण, स्मृति, तन्त्र, सब शास्त्र देवी का शरीर हैं। जब Gita Press Gorakhpur से कोई पुस्तक ख़रीदें, तो जानें कि वह देवी का एक अंश है। Digital age में PDF और audiobook भी शास्त्र हैं। Eternal Raga app पर जब scripture पढ़ें, वह भी शास्त्रमयी देवी का दर्शन है।
modern_context_en: Vedas, Upanishads, Puranas, Smritis, Tantras, all scriptures are Devi's body. When you buy a book from Gita Press Gorakhpur, know it is a part of Devi. In the digital age, PDFs and audiobooks are also shastras. When you read scripture on the Eternal Raga app, that too is Shastramayī Devi's darshan.
nri_context: When your Eternal Raga app becomes the primary way your family abroad accesses scripture, each tap on a verse is a touch of Śāstramayī's digital form reaching across oceans.
usage_context: Chant during scripture study, when acquiring religious texts, or when developing the Eternal Raga scripture section. Also during Shastra Daan (gifting religious texts).

meaning_en: She who is the mother of Guha (Kartikeya/Murugan)
meaning_hi: गुह (कार्तिकेय/मुरुगन) की माता

guha.en: Guha (Kartikeya/Murugan/Skanda, the war-god; also means 'hidden one')

modern_context: कार्तिकेय (मुरुगन) दक्षिण भारत में अत्यन्त पूज्य हैं। तमिलनाडु में पलनी, तिरुचेन्दूर और स्वामीमलै मुरुगन के प्रसिद्ध मन्दिर हैं। थाईपुसम का उत्सव मलेशिया और सिंगापुर में भी भव्य होता है। देवी गुहाम्बा कार्तिकेय की माता के रूप में सेनापति को जन्म देने वाली शक्ति हैं।
modern_context_en: Kartikeya (Murugan) is immensely revered in South India. Palani, Tiruchendur, and Swamimalai in Tamil Nadu are famous Murugan temples. Thaipusam festival is celebrated grandly in Malaysia and Singapore too. Devi Guhamba as Kartikeya's mother is the power that birthed the divine commander.
nri_context: When Tamil families abroad celebrate Thaipusam or visit Murugan temples in Malaysia, they are honouring Guhāmbā, the Mother who birthed the warrior god of their hearts.
usage_context: Chant during Skanda Shashti, Thaipusam, or when worshipping Kartikeya/Murugan. Also during prayers for sons and warrior-energy.

meaning_en: She who is the embodiment of all that is secret and esoteric
meaning_hi: सभी गुह्य (गोपनीय, रहस्यमय) तत्त्वों का स्वरूप
modern_context: कुछ ज्ञान गुप्त रखा जाता है क्योंकि वह हर किसी के लिए नहीं। श्रीविद्या के मन्त्र गुरु-मुख से ही मिलते हैं, किताब से नहीं। Nuclear codes गुप्त हैं, medical records confidential हैं। देवी गुह्यरूपिणी सिखाती हैं कि हर ज्ञान हर किसी के लिए नहीं, कुछ ज्ञान तैयार होने पर ही मिलता है।
modern_context_en: Some knowledge is kept secret because it is not for everyone. Sri Vidya mantras come only from a guru's mouth, not books. Nuclear codes are classified, medical records confidential. Devi Guhyarupini teaches that not all knowledge is for everyone; some arrives only when you are ready.
nri_context: When a spiritual teacher abroad reveals a practice at exactly the right moment in your journey, not too early and not too late, that precise timing is Guhyarūpiṇī's wisdom in action.
usage_context: Chant during esoteric study, when receiving secret teachings, or during Sri Vidya diksha. Also during Gupt Navratri sadhana.

meaning_en: She who is completely free from all limiting adjuncts and conditions
meaning_hi: सभी उपाधियों (सीमित करने वाली शर्तों) से पूर्णतः मुक्त
modern_context: उपाधि वह condition है जो सत्य को सीमित दिखाती है। जैसे लाल काँच से देखें तो सब लाल दिखता है, वह काँच उपाधि है। 'मैं Indian हूँ', 'मैं Hindu हूँ', 'मैं engineer हूँ', ये सब उपाधियाँ हैं जो असली 'मैं' को सीमित करती हैं। देवी सबसे मुक्त हैं। ध्यान में जब सब labels हटें, वही मुक्ति है।
modern_context_en: Upadhi is a condition that makes truth appear limited. Like looking through red glass makes everything seem red; the glass is the upadhi. 'I am Indian', 'I am Hindu', 'I am an engineer', all are upadhis limiting the real 'I'. Devi is free from all. In meditation, when all labels drop, that is liberation.
nri_context: When the compound identity labels of immigrant life, Indian-American, Hindu-secular, traditional-modern, exhaust you, this name offers the freedom of dropping every single one.
usage_context: Chant during advanced Vedanta meditation, Neti-Neti practice, or when seeking freedom from identity labels. Also during Upadhi-elimination contemplation.

meaning_en: She who is eternally devoted to Sadashiva as her lord
meaning_hi: सदाशिव के प्रति शाश्वत पतिव्रता (समर्पित)

pativratā.en: devoted to her lord, faithful, one-pointed in devotion

modern_context: पतिव्रता का अर्थ केवल पति-भक्ति नहीं, बल्कि किसी भी लक्ष्य के प्रति एकनिष्ठ समर्पण है। देवी शिव के प्रति ऐसी ही एकनिष्ठ हैं। जब research scholar 5 साल एक ही विषय पर काम करे, वह भी एक प्रकार की पतिव्रता (एकनिष्ठता) है। Focus और commitment ही सफलता की कुंजी है।
modern_context_en: Pativrata does not merely mean wife-devotion but single-pointed dedication to any goal. Devi is thus devoted to Shiva. When a research scholar works on one topic for 5 years, that too is a form of pativrata (single-pointed focus). Focus and commitment are the keys to success.
nri_context: The unwavering commitment to building a life abroad despite every temptation to give up and return home mirrors the pativratā's single-pointed devotion to her chosen path.
usage_context: Chant for commitment and focus, during Shiva-Parvati puja, or when dedication to a long-term goal wavers. Also during Pativrata Stri celebrations.

meaning_en: She who is the sovereign of all spiritual lineages and traditions
meaning_hi: सभी आध्यात्मिक सम्प्रदायों (परम्पराओं) की ईश्वरी

sampradāya.en: tradition, lineage, spiritual heritage passed from guru to disciple

modern_context: शंकराचार्य का अद्वैत, रामानुज का विशिष्टाद्वैत, माध्वाचार्य का द्वैत, वल्लभाचार्य का शुद्धाद्वैत, सब सम्प्रदाय हैं। लेकिन देवी सबकी ईश्वरी हैं। जब सम्प्रदायों में बहस हो कि 'हमारा मार्ग सही, तुम्हारा ग़लत', तो यह नाम कहता है कि सब मार्ग एक ही देवी तक जाते हैं।
modern_context_en: Shankaracharya's Advaita, Ramanuja's Vishishtadvaita, Madhvacharya's Dvaita, Vallabhacharya's Shuddhadvaita, all are sampradayas. But Devi is sovereign of all. When traditions debate 'our path is right, yours is wrong', this name says all paths lead to the same Devi.
nri_context: When Hindu communities abroad divide by sampradaya, ISKCON vs Swaminarayan vs Arya Samaj, this name unites them all under one sovereign Devi who transcends every lineage.
usage_context: Chant during ecumenical Hindu gatherings, when seeking unity among traditions, or during Guru Parampara puja. A powerful unifying name.

meaning_en: She who is the good, the righteous, the accomplished one
meaning_hi: साधु, सज्जन, धार्मिक, सिद्ध

sādhuḥ.en: the good one, the righteous, the accomplished; also: exclamation of approval ('well done!')
sādhuḥ.hi: साधु, सज्जन, सिद्ध; 'शाबाश!' का उद्गार भी

modern_context: साधु का अर्थ केवल भगवा वस्त्र पहनना नहीं, बल्कि सज्जन होना, सही काम करना। जब कोई बिना स्वार्थ के मदद करे, जब कोई सच बोले भले ही नुक़सान हो, वह साधु है। 'साधु साधु!' कहना appreciation का तरीक़ा है। देवी स्वयं साधु हैं, अर्थात् सज्जनता का परम रूप।
modern_context_en: Sadhu does not just mean wearing saffron robes but being virtuous, doing the right thing. When someone helps selflessly, when someone speaks truth despite personal cost, that person is a sadhu. Saying 'Sadhu Sadhu!' is a way of appreciation. Devi herself is Sadhu, the supreme form of goodness.
nri_context: When you choose the ethical path abroad even when nobody from your community is watching, when integrity guides you over convenience, you embody the sādhu quality this name celebrates.
usage_context: Chant when cultivating goodness, during satsang, or when appreciating righteous people. Also during Sadhu Seva (serving holy people).

meaning_en: She who is the embodiment of the entire lineage of gurus
meaning_hi: सम्पूर्ण गुरु-मण्डल (गुरु परम्परा) का स्वरूप
modern_context: गुरु मण्डल में सदाशिव, आदि शंकराचार्य, और हमारे अपने गुरु तक की परम्परा शामिल है। गुरु पूर्णिमा पर जब गुरु को प्रणाम करें, तो जानें कि पूरी गुरु-शृंखला देवी का ही स्वरूप है। जैसे relay race में एक runner दूसरे को baton देता है, वैसे ही गुरु-शिष्य परम्परा में ज्ञान का baton पीढ़ी-दर-पीढ़ी चलता है।
modern_context_en: The Guru Mandala includes the lineage from Sadashiva through Adi Shankaracharya to our own guru. On Guru Purnima when bowing to the guru, know the entire guru-chain is Devi's form. Like a relay race where one runner passes the baton to another, in guru-shishya parampara the baton of knowledge passes generation to generation.
nri_context: When you cannot physically sit at a guru's feet abroad but learn through online satsangs, books, and apps, the guru-maṇḍala still reaches you because it is Devi herself connecting teacher to student across distances.
usage_context: Chant on Guru Purnima, during Guru Paduka puja, or when honouring the lineage of teachers. Also during Guru Mandala visualization in Sri Vidya.

meaning_en: She who transcends all family lineages and traditions
meaning_hi: सभी कुलों (वंशों, परम्पराओं) से ऊपर उठी हुई

uttīrṇā.hi: उत्तीर्ण, पार कर चुकी, से ऊपर

modern_context: पहले देवी कुलरूपिणी (374) थीं, अब कुलोत्तीर्णा हैं। वे परम्परा के भीतर भी हैं और परम्परा से ऊपर भी। जैसे पानी नदी में भी है और समुद्र में भी। जब जाति, वंश या सम्प्रदाय की दीवारें बनें, तो जानें कि देवी इन सबसे ऊपर हैं। Inter-caste marriage करना भी कुलोत्तीर्ण होना है।
modern_context_en: Earlier Devi was Kularupini (374, within tradition), now she is Kulottirna (transcending tradition). She is within tradition and above it. Like water exists in the river and in the ocean. When walls of caste, lineage, or sect arise, know Devi transcends them all. An inter-caste marriage is also being Kulottirna.
nri_context: When you marry outside your caste or community abroad, or when your child chooses a partner from a different background, this name validates transcending kula boundaries with Devi's own authority.
usage_context: Chant when transcending narrow identities, during inter-community marriages, or when moving beyond traditional limitations. Pairs with name 374 (Kularupini).

meaning_en: She who is worshipped through the six divine attributes (bhaga)
meaning_hi: छह दिव्य गुणों (भग) के माध्यम से आराधित

bhaga.en: the six divine attributes: lordship (aishvarya), righteousness (dharma), fame (yashas), prosperity (shri), knowledge (jnana), detachment (vairagya)
bhaga.hi: भग, छह दिव्य गुण: ऐश्वर्य, धर्म, यश, श्री, ज्ञान, वैराग्य

modern_context: भगवान शब्द 'भग' से आता है जिसमें छह गुण हैं: ऐश्वर्य, धर्म, यश, श्री, ज्ञान, वैराग्य। जिसमें ये छहों हों, वह भगवान है। देवी इन छहों से पूजित हैं। जब कोई व्यक्ति इन छहों गुणों को साधे, धनवान भी हो, धार्मिक भी, प्रसिद्ध भी, ज्ञानी भी, और विरक्त भी, वह भगवान जैसा जीवन जी रहा है।
modern_context_en: The word Bhagavan comes from 'Bhaga' which has six qualities: lordship, righteousness, fame, prosperity, knowledge, detachment. One who possesses all six is Bhagavan. Devi is worshipped through these six. When a person cultivates all six, wealthy yet righteous, famous yet knowledgeable, prosperous yet detached, they live a Bhagavan-like life.
nri_context: When you strive abroad for not just financial success but also ethical living, community respect, spiritual knowledge, and inner detachment, you are cultivating all six bhagas holistically.
usage_context: Chant during holistic spiritual development, when balancing the six qualities, or during Bhagavan-nature contemplation. Also during Vishnu Sahasranama study.

meaning_en: She who is Maya, the divine creative power that projects the universe
meaning_hi: माया, ब्रह्माण्ड को प्रक्षेपित करने वाली दिव्य सृजनात्मक शक्ति

māyā.en: Maya (the divine creative power; the power of illusion and manifestation; not mere 'illusion' but the cosmic architect's blueprint)
māyā.hi: माया (दिव्य सृजनात्मक शक्ति; प्रकट करने और छिपाने की शक्ति; केवल 'भ्रम' नहीं बल्कि ब्रह्माण्डीय वास्तुकार की नक़्शा)

modern_context: माया को ग़लत समझा जाता है। माया 'झूठ' नहीं, बल्कि वह शक्ति है जो एक ब्रह्म को अनेक रूपों में दिखाती है। जैसे एक अभिनेता कई characters खेलता है, वैसे ही देवी माया से अनेक रूप धारण करती हैं। Virtual Reality भी माया का आधुनिक उदाहरण है: एक screen पर अनन्त दुनियाएँ।
modern_context_en: Maya is misunderstood. Maya is not 'falsehood' but the power that shows one Brahman in many forms. Like one actor playing many characters, Devi through Maya takes many forms. Virtual Reality is a modern example: infinite worlds on one screen.
nri_context: The dual reality of immigrant life, appearing successful on the outside while struggling on the inside, is a personal experience of Māyā's power to simultaneously reveal and conceal truth.
usage_context: Chant during Maya contemplation, Vedanta study, or when seeking to understand the nature of reality. A foundational philosophical name.

meaning_en: She who is filled with sweetness and honey-like bliss
meaning_hi: मधु (मिठास, शहद जैसे आनन्द) से परिपूर्ण
modern_context: मधुमती का अर्थ है जो मिठास से भरी है। माँ जब बच्चे को 'मेरा लड्डू', 'मेरी गुड़िया' कहती है, वह मधुमती भाव है। गुड़ की चाय, माँ के हाथ का हलवा, बचपन की गोद, ये सब मधुमती के अनुभव हैं। भक्ति में जो मिठास है, कीर्तन में जो रस है, वह सब मधुमती देवी का प्रसाद है।
modern_context_en: Madhumati means one filled with sweetness. When a mother calls her child 'my laddu', 'my gudiya', that is the Madhumati spirit. Gur ki chai, mother's handmade halwa, childhood's lap, all are Madhumati experiences. The sweetness in devotion, the rasa in kirtan, all are Madhumati Devi's prasad.
nri_context: When a bite of jaggery or a sip of chai abroad transports you to your mother's kitchen across decades and continents, that time-travelling sweetness is Madhumatī's gift.
usage_context: Chant when experiencing sweetness in devotion, during Madhu Purnima, or when sharing sweet prasad. Also during Bhakti Rasa meditation.

meaning_en: She who is the great Earth herself
meaning_hi: महान् पृथ्वी स्वरूपा

mahī.en: the great one; the Earth; the ground

modern_context: मही पृथ्वी का नाम है। भारत को 'भारत माता' कहते हैं, यही मही है। जब सुबह नंगे पैर ज़मीन पर चलें (earthing/grounding), तो जानें कि आप देवी के शरीर पर चल रहे हैं। पर्यावरण प्रदूषण माँ मही का अपमान है। Earth Day पर पेड़ लगाना मही की सेवा है।
modern_context_en: Mahi is Earth's name. India is called 'Bharat Mata', that is Mahi. When you walk barefoot on the ground in the morning (earthing/grounding), know you are walking on Devi's body. Environmental pollution is an insult to Mother Mahi. Planting trees on Earth Day is Mahi's seva.
nri_context: When you touch down on Indian soil after years abroad and instinctively want to kiss the ground, that impulse is Mahī calling her child back to her body.
usage_context: Chant on Earth Day, during Bhumi Puja (ground-worship), or when practising grounding exercises. Also during Bharat Mata prayers and environmental initiatives.

meaning_en: She who is the mother of all celestial hosts and divine attendants
meaning_hi: सभी गणों (दिव्य अनुचरों, देवदलों) की माता
modern_context: गण शिव के अनुचर हैं और गणेश उनके नेता। देवी गणाम्बा उन सबकी माता हैं। जब सामूहिक कार्य हो, team project, community seva, या family event, तो गणाम्बा से प्रार्थना करें कि सब मिलकर अच्छा काम करें। Team building का divine आधार यह नाम है।
modern_context_en: Ganas are Shiva's attendants and Ganesha is their leader. Devi Ganamba is mother of them all. During collective work, team projects, community seva, or family events, pray to Ganamba that everyone works well together. This name is the divine foundation of team building.
nri_context: When organizing a community event abroad and coordinating volunteers from different Indian states speaking different languages, invoking Gaṇāmbā brings the motherly cohesion that holds diverse groups together.
usage_context: Chant during team activities, community organization, or Ganesha puja. Also during Gana Puja and collective worship.

meaning_en: She who is worshipped by the Guhyakas (hidden celestial beings)
meaning_hi: गुह्यकों (छिपे हुए दिव्य प्राणियों) द्वारा पूजित

guhyaka.en: Guhyakas (hidden celestial beings; semi-divine attendants of Kubera)
guhyaka.hi: गुह्यक (छिपे दिव्य प्राणी; कुबेर के अनुचर)

modern_context: गुह्यक अदृश्य दिव्य प्राणी हैं जो कुबेर की सेवा करते हैं। वे गुप्त रहते हैं लेकिन उनकी शक्ति महान् है। जो शक्तियाँ अदृश्य हैं लेकिन काम कर रही हैं, जैसे gravity, magnetism, WiFi, सब गुह्यक शक्तियाँ हैं। IT professionals जो backend पर काम करते हैं और दिखते नहीं, वे भी गुह्यक की तरह हैं।
modern_context_en: Guhyakas are invisible divine beings who serve Kubera. They stay hidden but their power is great. Forces that are invisible yet working, like gravity, magnetism, WiFi, are all Guhyaka powers. IT professionals working on the backend, unseen yet essential, are also like Guhyakas.
nri_context: The invisible support systems that make immigrant life possible, the back-office workers processing your visa, the anonymous taxpayers funding public schools your child attends - are all guhyakas serving silently.
usage_context: Chant when acknowledging invisible forces and helpers, during Kubera puja, or when appreciating behind-the-scenes workers. Also during Guhya Sadhana.

meaning_en: She whose every limb is soft, tender, and gentle
meaning_hi: जिनका प्रत्येक अंग कोमल, मुलायम और सुकुमार है
modern_context: कोमलता शक्ति की विपरीत नहीं, पूरक है। पानी सबसे कोमल है लेकिन पत्थर को काट देता है। देवी कोमलाङ्गी हैं लेकिन दैत्यों का संहार करने में सक्षम। जब बच्चे से बात करें तो कोमल स्वर में, बुज़ुर्गों को स्पर्श करें तो कोमल हाथ से। कोमलता empathy की शारीरिक अभिव्यक्ति है।
modern_context_en: Tenderness is not the opposite of strength but its complement. Water is softest yet cuts through rock. Devi is Komalangi yet capable of slaying demons. When speaking to a child, use a gentle voice; when touching elders, use gentle hands. Tenderness is the physical expression of empathy.
nri_context: When the hardness required to survive abroad makes you forget gentleness, and your child flinches at your stressed voice, this name calls you back to the komalatā that heals more than any achievement.
usage_context: Chant when cultivating gentleness, during child-rearing, or when caring for the elderly and sick. Also during Karuna (compassion) meditation. A tender name to close this batch.

meaning_en: She who is dear to the guru and who loves the guru
meaning_hi: गुरु को प्रिय और गुरु से प्रेम करने वाली
modern_context: गुरु-शिष्य परम्परा भारतीय संस्कृति की रीढ़ है। एकलव्य ने मिट्टी की मूर्ति से गुरुभक्ति की, द्रोणाचार्य के बिना भी सीखा। आज का गुरु school teacher भी है, YouTube educator भी, और life coach भी। देवी गुरुप्रिया हैं, अर्थात् जो गुरु का सम्मान करे, उससे देवी प्रसन्न होती हैं। Teacher's Day पर गुरु को धन्यवाद दें।
modern_context_en: The Guru-Shishya tradition is the backbone of Indian culture. Ekalavya practised guru-bhakti with a clay idol, learning even without Dronacharya. Today's guru is also a school teacher, YouTube educator, and life coach. Devi is Gurupriya; she is pleased by those who honour their guru. Thank your teacher on Teacher's Day.
nri_context: When the teacher who shaped your career in India never knew how far their influence carried, sending them a gratitude message from abroad is an act of Gurupriyā devotion across continents.
usage_context: Chant on Guru Purnima, Teacher's Day, or when expressing gratitude to teachers. Also during Guru Paduka puja and before beginning any learning.

meaning_en: She who is absolutely independent, self-governed and sovereign
meaning_hi: पूर्णतः स्वतन्त्र, स्वशासित और सार्वभौम

tantrā.en: system, governance, framework (one who is her own system)
tantrā.hi: तन्त्र, शासन, ढाँचा (जो स्वयं अपनी व्यवस्था है)

modern_context: स्वतन्त्रता 15 अगस्त का नारा ही नहीं, जीवन का सिद्धान्त है। देवी स्वतन्त्रा हैं, किसी के अधीन नहीं। कश्मीर शैवदर्शन का मूल सूत्र है 'चिति स्वतन्त्रा विश्वसिद्धिहेतुः', स्वतन्त्र चेतना ही विश्व का कारण है। जब स्त्री आर्थिक रूप से स्वतन्त्र हो, निर्णय स्वयं ले, वह स्वतन्त्रा है।
modern_context_en: Independence is not just a 15th August slogan but a life principle. Devi is Svatantra; she is under no one's control. Kashmir Shaivism's core sutra is 'Chiti Svatantra Vishvasiddhihetuh', free consciousness is the universe's cause. When a woman is financially independent and makes her own decisions, she is Svatantra.
nri_context: The very act of immigrating, choosing your own path against family expectations, building an independent life, is an exercise of the svatantratā that this name celebrates.
usage_context: Chant on Independence Day, during women's empowerment events, or when asserting personal sovereignty. Also during Kashmir Shaivism study.

meaning_en: She who is the sovereign of all systems, sciences, and sacred technologies
meaning_hi: सभी तन्त्रों (प्रणालियों, विज्ञानों, पवित्र प्रौद्योगिकियों) की ईश्वरी
modern_context: तन्त्र का अर्थ प्रणाली है। Banking system, legal system, education system, healthcare system सब तन्त्र हैं। देवी सबकी ईश्वरी हैं। जब कोई system ठीक से काम करे, ट्रेन समय पर आए, hospital में इलाज हो, वह सर्वतन्त्रेशी की कृपा है। जब system fail हो, तो जानें कि देवी की उपेक्षा हुई है।
modern_context_en: Tantra means system. Banking, legal, education, healthcare systems are all tantras. Devi is sovereign of all. When a system works properly, trains arrive on time, hospitals treat patients, that is Sarvatantreshi's grace. When systems fail, know that Devi has been neglected.
nri_context: When you marvel at how efficiently foreign systems work, from public transport to healthcare, and wish India had the same, recognize Sarvatantreśī's grace operating through well-maintained systems anywhere.
usage_context: Chant when seeking systemic efficiency, during organizational work, or when praying for institutional integrity. Also during Tantra study.

meaning_en: She who embodies Dakshinamurti, Shiva as the supreme silent teacher
meaning_hi: दक्षिणामूर्ति (मौन गुरु रूपी शिव) का स्वरूप

dakṣiṇāmūrti.en: Dakshinamurti (Shiva as the south-facing guru who teaches through silence; the adi-guru)
dakṣiṇāmūrti.hi: दक्षिणामूर्ति (दक्षिण दिशा की ओर मुख किए मौन गुरु शिव; आदि-गुरु)

modern_context: दक्षिणामूर्ति शिव का वह रूप है जो वटवृक्ष के नीचे बैठकर मौन में सिखाते हैं। शिष्य बूढ़े हैं, गुरु युवा। बोलकर नहीं, चुप रहकर ज्ञान देना सबसे ऊँची शिक्षा है। जब माता-पिता बच्चों को अपने आचरण से सिखाएँ, बिना lecture दिए, वह दक्षिणामूर्ति शिक्षा है। 'Actions speak louder than words.'
modern_context_en: Dakshinamurti is Shiva's form sitting under a banyan tree, teaching in silence. The disciples are old, the guru young. Teaching through silence, not words, is the highest education. When parents teach children through their conduct, without lecturing, that is Dakshinamurti's education. 'Actions speak louder than words.'
nri_context: When your child abroad learns Indian values not from your lectures but by watching you do puja, respect elders on video calls, and maintain integrity, you are Dakṣiṇāmūrti teaching through living example.
usage_context: Chant on Guru Purnima, during silent meditation, or when teaching by example. Also during Dakshinamurti Stotra recitation.

meaning_en: She who is worshipped by Sanaka and other primordial sages
meaning_hi: सनक आदि (सनक, सनन्दन, सनातन, सनत्कुमार) प्राचीन ऋषियों द्वारा पूजित

sanaka.en: Sanaka (one of the four Kumaras, eternally child-like sages born from Brahma's mind)
sanaka.hi: सनक (चार कुमारों में से एक, ब्रह्मा के मानसपुत्र)

modern_context: सनकादि कुमार ब्रह्मा के मानसपुत्र हैं जो शाश्वत बालक रूप में ज्ञान साधना करते हैं। वे संसार में नहीं आए, सीधे ज्ञान मार्ग पर चले। जो बच्चे बचपन से ही गम्भीर, चिन्तनशील और आध्यात्मिक हों, उनमें सनककुमार का अंश है। Child prodigies जो छोटी उम्र में बड़ा काम करें, वे भी ऐसे ही हैं।
modern_context_en: The Sanakadi Kumaras are Brahma's mind-born sons who remain eternally child-like while pursuing knowledge. They did not enter worldly life but walked directly on the path of wisdom. Children who are naturally serious, contemplative, and spiritual carry a fragment of Sanaka. Child prodigies who accomplish great things young are also like this.
nri_context: When your child abroad shows unexpected spiritual depth, asking profound questions about God and death at age five, that ancient Sanaka wisdom is surfacing through young eyes.
usage_context: Chant when nurturing gifted or spiritually inclined children, during Kumara puja, or when studying the path of Jnana (knowledge). Also during Brahma Kumara meditation.

meaning_en: She who bestows the supreme knowledge of Shiva (ultimate reality)
meaning_hi: शिवज्ञान (परम सत्य का ज्ञान) प्रदान करने वाली

śiva.en: Shiva (the auspicious; ultimate reality; pure consciousness)

modern_context: शिवज्ञान सबसे ऊँचा ज्ञान है: 'मैं कौन हूँ?' का उत्तर। IIT बताता है bridge कैसे बनाएँ, AIIMS बताता है शरीर कैसे ठीक करें, लेकिन शिवज्ञान बताता है कि bridge बनाने वाला और शरीर ठीक करने वाला 'मैं' कौन है। देवी यह ज्ञान देती हैं। जब ध्यान में 'मैं' का रहस्य खुले, वह शिवज्ञान है।
modern_context_en: Shiva Jnana is the highest knowledge: the answer to 'Who am I?' IIT teaches how to build bridges, AIIMS teaches how to heal bodies, but Shiva Jnana reveals who the 'I' is that builds and heals. Devi bestows this knowledge. When the mystery of 'I' unfolds in meditation, that is Shiva Jnana.
nri_context: After achieving every external goal abroad, when the question 'but who am I really?' becomes unavoidable, Śivajñānapradāyinī is the Devi who delivers the answer no university can teach.
usage_context: Chant during Atma Vichara (self-inquiry), Jnana Yoga, or when seeking the ultimate knowledge. Also during Mahashivaratri and Vedanta study. The culminating name of all knowledge-themed names.

meaning_en: She who is the creative art-expression of pure consciousness
meaning_hi: शुद्ध चेतना (चित्) की कला (सृजनात्मक अभिव्यक्ति)
modern_context: चित्कला चेतना की कला है। जब musician राग बजाए और स्वयं खो जाए, जब painter तूलिका चलाए और समय भूल जाए, जब writer लिखते-लिखते दूसरी दुनिया में पहुँच जाए, वह चित्कला है। Flow state जिसे psychology बताती है, वही चित्कला का अनुभव है। हर कलाकार अनजाने में चित्कला की साधना करता है।
modern_context_en: Chitkala is the art of consciousness. When a musician plays a raga and loses themselves, when a painter moves the brush and forgets time, when a writer enters another world while writing, that is Chitkala. The flow state that psychology describes is the Chitkala experience. Every artist unknowingly practises Chitkala sadhana.
nri_context: When creative work abroad, coding, designing, writing, cooking - puts you in a flow state where hours pass unnoticed, you have entered Citkalā's domain where consciousness creates through you.
usage_context: Chant before creative work, during artistic sadhana, or when seeking the flow state. Also during Saraswati puja for creative arts.

meaning_en: She who is the bud of bliss about to bloom
meaning_hi: आनन्द की कलिका (खिलने को तैयार कली)

kalikā.en: bud, unopened flower about to bloom
kalikā.hi: कलिका, कली, खिलने को तैयार फूल

modern_context: कली में वह सम्भावना छिपी है जो फूल में खिलेगी। देवी आनन्दकलिका वह आनन्द हैं जो अभी खिलने को तैयार है। जब बच्चा पहली बार 'माँ' बोले और माँ की आँखें भर आएँ, जब result day पर envelope खोलें और अच्छे marks दिखें, उस एक क्षण पहले जो anticipation है, वही कलिका है।
modern_context_en: A bud holds the potential that will bloom as a flower. Devi Anandakalika is the bliss that is just about to bloom. When a baby says 'Maa' for the first time and the mother's eyes fill, when opening the envelope on result day and seeing good marks, the anticipation just before that moment is the kalika.
nri_context: The night before a long-awaited India trip, when the bags are packed and excitement builds but you have not yet landed, that about-to-bloom joy is Ānandakalikā in its purest form.
usage_context: Chant when anticipation builds before joyful events, during spring-bloom meditations, or when cultivating the art of savouring moments before they fully arrive.

meaning_en: She who is the very form and embodiment of divine love
meaning_hi: दिव्य प्रेम का साक्षात् स्वरूप
modern_context: प्रेम सबसे शक्तिशाली शक्ति है। माँ का प्रेम बच्चे को ज़िन्दा रखता है, पति-पत्नी का प्रेम परिवार बनाता है, देश-प्रेम सैनिक को सीमा पर खड़ा रखता है। देवी प्रेमरूपा हैं, अर्थात् प्रेम ही उनका शरीर है। जब कहीं भी प्रेम दिखे, समझो देवी दिख गईं। जहाँ प्रेम है, वहाँ देवी हैं।
modern_context_en: Love is the most powerful force. A mother's love keeps a child alive, spousal love builds families, patriotic love keeps soldiers at the border. Devi is Premarupa; love itself is her body. Wherever love is seen, Devi is seen. Where there is love, there is Devi.
nri_context: When you video-call your mother and her face lights up, when your child runs to you after school, when a friend checks on you without being asked, Premarūpā is present in every act of love regardless of geography.
usage_context: Chant when celebrating love in any form, during Bhakti meditation, or as a daily affirmation of divine love. The simplest and most universal name.

meaning_en: She who does what is pleasing and beneficial for her devotees
meaning_hi: भक्तों के लिए प्रिय (अच्छा, हितकारी) कार्य करने वाली
modern_context: देवी वही करती हैं जो भक्तों के लिए अच्छा हो, भले ही उस समय समझ न आए। जब बच्चा कड़वी दवाई का विरोध करे, माँ फिर भी पिलाती है क्योंकि वह जानती है यह ज़रूरी है। जब UPSC में selection न हो लेकिन बाद में पता चले कि वह रास्ता और बेहतर था, वह प्रियङ्करी देवी का काम था।
modern_context_en: Devi does what is good for devotees even if they do not understand at the time. When a child resists bitter medicine, the mother still gives it because she knows it is necessary. When UPSC selection fails but later a better path reveals itself, that was Priyankari Devi's work.
nri_context: When a visa rejection or job loss abroad initially devastates you but later opens a door you never imagined, that delayed understanding of 'it was for the best' is Priyaṅkarī's hidden kindness.
usage_context: Chant when life's events seem unfair but may hold hidden blessings, during surrender meditation, or when trusting the divine plan.

meaning_en: She who delights in the systematic recitation of her sacred names
meaning_hi: अपने पवित्र नामों के विधिवत् पारायण (पाठ) से प्रसन्न होने वाली
modern_context: यह नाम पहले (278) भी आया और यहाँ फिर आता है, जो बताता है कि देवी को नाम-पारायण अत्यन्त प्रिय है। जैसे माँ को बच्चे का 'माँ-माँ' पुकारना कभी नहीं ऊबता, वैसे ही देवी को नाम सुनना कभी पुराना नहीं पड़ता। आप अभी जो पढ़ रहे हैं, यह 431 नाम, इससे देवी इसी क्षण प्रसन्न हो रही हैं।
modern_context_en: This name appeared before (278) and returns here, showing Devi deeply loves nama-parayana. Just as a mother never tires of her child calling 'Ma Ma', Devi never tires of hearing her names. What you are reading right now, this 431st name, Devi is pleased at this very moment.
